`; } function viewUnitCertificate(unitId) { const html = generateUnitCertificateHTML(unitId, S.user_name || 'Learner'); if (!html) return; const blob = new Blob([html], { type: 'text/html' }); const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob); window.open(url, '_blank'); showToast('Certificate opened — screenshot or print to save it!', 'success', 3500); } let _certOverlayTimeout = null; function checkAndShowUnitCertificate(unitId) { if (!UNIT_CERTS[unitId]) return; if ((S.earned_certs || []).includes(unitId)) return; save('earned_certs', [...(S.earned_certs || []), unitId]); _certOverlayTimeout = setTimeout(() => { _certOverlayTimeout = null; showCertificateEarned(unitId); }, 900); } function showCertificateEarned(unitId) { const unit = COURSE.find(u => u.id === unitId); const certDef = UNIT_CERTS[unitId]; if (!unit || !certDef) return; const color = unit.color || '#5BC0F8'; const overlay = document.createElement('div'); overlay.id = 'cert-overlay'; overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.7);z-index:600;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px;'; overlay.innerHTML = `
Certificate Earned
${certDef.title}
${certDef.description}
${S.user_name || 'You'}
Unit ${unit.num}: ${unit.title}
`; document.body.appendChild(overlay); SoundManager.playAchievement(); } // ============================================================ // WEEKLY CHALLENGES // ============================================================ const WEEKLY_CHALLENGES = [ { id: 'lessons_3', title: 'Speed Week', desc: 'Complete 3 lessons this week', goal: 3, metric: 'lessons', bonusXP: 50 }, { id: 'perfect_2', title: 'Sharp Mind', desc: 'Finish 2 lessons without any mistakes', goal: 2, metric: 'perfect', bonusXP: 100 }, { id: 'lessons_5', title: 'Big Week', desc: 'Complete 5 lessons this week', goal: 5, metric: 'lessons', bonusXP: 80 }, { id: 'units_3', title: 'Explorer Week',desc: 'Try lessons from 3 different units', goal: 3, metric: 'units', bonusXP: 75 } ]; function getISOWeek() { const d = new Date(); d.setHours(0,0,0,0); d.setDate(d.getDate() + 3 - (d.getDay() + 6) % 7); const w1 = new Date(d.getFullYear(), 0, 4); const wn = 1 + Math.round(((d - w1) / 86400000 - 3 + (w1.getDay() + 6) % 7) / 7); return d.getFullYear() + '-W' + String(wn).padStart(2, '0'); } function getCurrentChallenge() { const wn = parseInt((getISOWeek().split('-W')[1]) || 0); return WEEKLY_CHALLENGES[wn % WEEKLY_CHALLENGES.length]; } function checkWeekReset() { const cw = getISOWeek(); if (S.weekly_week !== cw) { if ((S.weekly_xp || 0) > (S.weekly_best || 0)) save('weekly_best', S.weekly_xp || 0); save('weekly_week', cw); save('weekly_xp', 0); save('weekly_completed', false); save('weekly_lessons_done', []); save('weekly_perfect_count', 0); } } function updateWeeklyProgress(lessonId, isPerfect) { checkWeekReset(); const challenge = getCurrentChallenge(); const done = S.weekly_lessons_done || []; const alreadyCounted = done.includes(lessonId); save('weekly_xp', (S.weekly_xp || 0) + 50); if (!alreadyCounted) save('weekly_lessons_done', [...done, lessonId]); if (isPerfect && !alreadyCounted) save('weekly_perfect_count', (S.weekly_perfect_count || 0) + 1); // Evaluate challenge progress let progress = 0; const updatedDone = S.weekly_lessons_done || []; if (challenge.metric === 'lessons') progress = updatedDone.length; else if (challenge.metric === 'perfect') progress = S.weekly_perfect_count || 0; else if (challenge.metric === 'units') { const unitIds = new Set(updatedDone.map(id => id.replace(/l\d+$/, ''))); progress = unitIds.size; } if (!S.weekly_completed && progress >= challenge.goal) { save('weekly_completed', true); addXP(challenge.bonusXP); setTimeout(() => showWeeklyChallengeComplete(challenge), 900); } renderWeeklyChallengeBanner(); } function renderWeeklyChallengeBanner() { checkWeekReset(); const el = document.getElementById('weekly-challenge-banner'); if (!el) return; const c = getCurrentChallenge(); const done = (S.weekly_lessons_done || []).length; let progress = done; if (c.metric === 'perfect') progress = S.weekly_perfect_count || 0; else if (c.metric === 'units') { const unitIds = new Set((S.weekly_lessons_done || []).map(id => id.replace(/l\d+$/, ''))); progress = unitIds.size; } const pct = Math.min(100, Math.round((progress / c.goal) * 100)); const fin = S.weekly_completed; const dayOfWeek = new Date().getDay(); const daysLeft = dayOfWeek === 0 ? 0 : 7 - dayOfWeek; el.innerHTML = `
This Week's Challenge
${fin ? `
DONE
` : `
${daysLeft}d left
`}
${c.title}
${c.desc}
${progress} / ${c.goal} ${c.metric} +${c.bonusXP} bonus XP
`; } function showWeeklyChallengeComplete(challenge) { if (typeof showAchievementToast === 'function') showAchievementToast('streak_7'); // reuse trophy toast const shareText = 'I just completed the "' + challenge.title + '" challenge on ClariAI — ' + (S.weekly_xp || 0) + ' XP earned this week! Learning AI one lesson at a time.'; const overlay = document.createElement('div'); overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);z-index:500;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px;'; overlay.innerHTML = `
Challenge Complete!
${challenge.title}
${Math.min(9999, S.weekly_xp || 0)}
XP this week
Personal Best: ${Math.min(9999, Math.max(S.weekly_xp || 0, S.weekly_best || 0))} XP
`; document.body.appendChild(overlay); } // ============================================================ // STATE // ============================================================ let S = {}; function loadState() { const defaults = { xp: 0, streak: 0, streak_date: '', hearts: 5, completed: [], premium: false, user_name: '', experience: '', tech_comfort: '', gems: 0, level: 1, achievements: [], daily_goal: 1, goal_date: '', goal_today: 0, avatar: 0, active_days: [], wrong_answers: [], survey_answers: {}, onboarded: false, text_size: 'normal', practice_history: [], practice_best: {}, practice_sessions_week: { week: '', count: 0 }, dark_mode: false, sound_enabled: true, resume_lesson: null, clari_theme: 'default', xp_boost_active: false, streak_freeze: false, user_profile: null, scenario_correct: 0, quickfire_perfect: 0, lesson_reviews: {}, weekly_xp: 0, weekly_week: '', weekly_best: 0, weekly_completed: false, weekly_lessons_done: [], weekly_perfect_count: 0, tts_enabled: false, tts_rate: 1.0, earned_certs: [], clari_tips_seen: [], clari_streak_celebrated: [], xp_log: [], track_collapsed: {}, last_welcome_date: '', avatar_custom: null, lesson_log: {}, glossary: [], // [{term, definition, source, date}] notes: {}, // {lessonId: noteText} bookmarks: [], // array of bookmarked lesson IDs personal_bests: {}, // {lessonId: bestTimeSeconds} daily_xp_goal: 20, reminder_enabled: false, reminder_time: '08:00', best_streak: 0, lesson_log_dates: {} // learn-14: lessonId -> completion timestamp (ms) }; S = {}; for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(defaults)) { const raw = localStorage.getItem('clariai_' + k); if (raw !== null) { try { S[k] = JSON.parse(raw); } catch(e) { S[k] = v; } } else { S[k] = v; } } // Reset hearts if new day const today = todayStr(); if (S.streak_date !== today && S.hearts < 5) { S.hearts = 5; localStorage.setItem('clariai_hearts', JSON.stringify(5)); } } function save(key, val) { S[key] = val; localStorage.setItem('clariai_' + key, JSON.stringify(val)); } function todayStr() { return new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]; } function dateAddDays(dateStr, n) { const d = new Date(dateStr); d.setDate(d.getDate() + n); return d.toISOString().split('T')[0]; } // ============================================================ // SPACED REPETITION ENGINE // ============================================================ const REVIEW_INTERVALS = [1, 3, 7, 14, 30]; // days per stage function getReviewsDue() { const reviews = S.lesson_reviews || {}; const today = todayStr(); return Object.entries(reviews) .filter(([id, r]) => r.nextDue <= today) .map(([id]) => id); } function updateReviewStage(lessonId, passed) { const reviews = S.lesson_reviews || {}; const r = reviews[lessonId] || { stage: 0 }; if (passed) { r.stage = Math.min(r.stage + 1, REVIEW_INTERVALS.length - 1); } else { r.stage = 0; } r.nextDue = dateAddDays(todayStr(), REVIEW_INTERVALS[r.stage]); reviews[lessonId] = r; save('lesson_reviews', reviews); } function updateNavBadges() { const due = getReviewsDue().length; const tab = document.getElementById('nav-practice'); if (!tab) return; let dot = tab.querySelector('.nav-dot'); if (!dot) { dot = document.createElement('div'); dot.className = 'nav-dot'; tab.appendChild(dot); } dot.style.display = due > 0 ? 'flex' : 'none'; dot.textContent = due > 9 ? '9+' : String(due); } function xpToLevel(xp) { return Math.floor(xp / 100) + 1; } // ============================================================ // CLARI SVG MASCOT — Kawaii round robot, white-sclera eyes, nub arms // ============================================================ function clariSVG(state, size, theme) { size = size || 80; state = state || 'default'; theme = theme || (typeof S !== 'undefined' ? S.clari_theme : 'default') || 'default'; const themeColors = { default: { top: '#8DDFFB', mid: '#5BC0F8', bot: '#3DAEE0', arm: '#5BC0F8', armBorder: '#3DAEE0', dots: '#5BC0F8' }, coral: { top: '#FFB3D4', mid: '#FF7EB3', bot: '#e85d95', arm: '#FF7EB3', armBorder: '#e85d95', dots: '#FF7EB3' }, purple: { top: '#C9A3F8', mid: '#a560f8', bot: '#8b3fe8', arm: '#a560f8', armBorder: '#8b3fe8', dots: '#a560f8' }, gold: { top: '#FFE066', mid: '#FFC800', bot: '#c99800', arm: '#FFC800', armBorder: '#c99800', dots: '#FFC800' } }; const tc = themeColors[theme] || themeColors.default; // Unique ID prefix prevents gradient conflicts when multiple Claris render var uid = 'c' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 7); // Kawaii eye: white sclera + blue iris + dark pupil + twin shine dots // squint=true draws a cute arc (^_^) eye instead // side='l'/'r' wraps in a blink group for CSS animation function mkEye(cx, cy, pdx, pdy, squint, side) { pdx = pdx || 0; pdy = pdy || 0; if (squint) { return ''; } var inner = '' + '' + '' + '' + ''; if (side) { return '' + inner + ''; } return inner; } // Rounded nub arm: filled ellipse peeking out from body side function mkArm(cx, cy, angle) { return ''; } var E = { default: { le: mkEye(27, 43, 0, 0, false, 'l'), re: mkEye(53, 43, 0, 0, false, 'r'), mouth: '', arms: mkArm(2, 64, -20) + mkArm(78, 64, 20), brows: '' }, happy: { le: mkEye(27, 43, 0, 0, false, 'l'), re: mkEye(53, 43, 0, 0, false, 'r'), mouth: '', arms: mkArm(2, 58, 30) + mkArm(78, 58, -30), brows: '' + '' }, excited: { le: mkEye(27, 43, 0, 1, false, 'l'), re: mkEye(53, 43, 0, 1, false, 'r'), mouth: '' + '', arms: mkArm(2, 53, 45) + mkArm(78, 53, -45), brows: '' + '' }, think: { le: mkEye(27, 44, 2, 0, true), re: mkEye(53, 43, 0, 0, false, 'r'), mouth: '', arms: mkArm(2, 65, -15) + mkArm(78, 56, -50) + '', brows: '' + '', extras: '' + '' + '' + '' + '' }, sad: { le: mkEye(27, 45, -1, 1, false, 'l'), re: mkEye(53, 45, 1, 1, false, 'r'), mouth: '', arms: mkArm(2, 66, -10) + mkArm(78, 66, 10), brows: '' + '' }, encouraging: { le: mkEye(27, 43, 0, 0, false, 'l'), re: mkEye(53, 43, 0, 0, false, 'r'), mouth: '', arms: mkArm(2, 57, 35) + mkArm(78, 57, -35), brows: '' + '' }, celebrating: { le: mkEye(27, 43, 0, 1, false, 'l'), re: mkEye(53, 43, 0, 1, false, 'r'), mouth: '' + '', arms: mkArm(2, 49, 55) + mkArm(78, 49, -55), brows: '' + '', extras: '' + '' + '' + '' }, waving: { le: mkEye(27, 43, 0, 0, false, 'l'), re: mkEye(53, 43, 0, 0, false, 'r'), mouth: '', arms: mkArm(2, 66, -20) + mkArm(78, 45, -60), brows: '' + '' }, proud: { le: mkEye(27, 43, 0, -2, false, 'l'), re: mkEye(53, 43, 0, -2, false, 'r'), mouth: '', arms: mkArm(2, 54, 50) + mkArm(78, 54, -50), brows: '' + '' + '' + '' }, confused: { le: mkEye(27, 43, 0, 0, true), re: mkEye(53, 43, 0, 0, false, 'r'), mouth: '', arms: mkArm(2, 62, 10) + mkArm(78, 66, -5), brows: '' + '' + '?' }, sleepy: { le: mkEye(27, 43, 0, 0, true), re: mkEye(53, 43, 0, 0, true), mouth: '', arms: mkArm(2, 67, -5) + mkArm(78, 67, 5), brows: '' + '' + '' + '' + 'z' + 'z' + 'z' }, surprised: { le: '' + '' + '' + '' + '', re: '' + '' + '' + '' + '', mouth: '', arms: mkArm(2, 50, 60) + mkArm(78, 50, -60), brows: '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' }, nervous: { le: mkEye(27, 43, 3, 0, false, 'l'), re: mkEye(53, 43, 3, 0, false, 'r'), mouth: '', arms: mkArm(2, 60, -30) + mkArm(78, 66, 5), brows: '' + '' + '' + '' } }; E.love = { le: '', re: '', mouth: '', arms: mkArm(2, 54, 50) + mkArm(78, 54, -50), brows: '' + '' }; E.cool = { le: '' + '', re: '' + '' + '', mouth: '', arms: mkArm(2, 60, -25) + mkArm(78, 58, -40), brows: '' }; E.grateful = { le: mkEye(27, 43, 0, 1, false, 'l'), re: mkEye(53, 43, 0, 1, false, 'r'), mouth: '', arms: mkArm(2, 56, 38) + mkArm(78, 56, -38), brows: '' + '', extras: '' + '' }; E.focused = { le: mkEye(27, 44, 2, 0, true), re: mkEye(53, 44, 2, 0, true), mouth: '', arms: mkArm(2, 64, -12) + mkArm(78, 55, -52) + '', brows: '' + '' }; E.star = { le: '', re: '', mouth: '' + '', arms: mkArm(2, 45, 65) + mkArm(78, 45, -65), brows: '' + '', extras: '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' }; E.nervous_sweat = { le: mkEye(27, 43, 3, 0, false, 'l'), re: mkEye(53, 43, 3, 0, false, 'r'), mouth: '', arms: mkArm(2, 65, -8) + mkArm(78, 52, -42) + '', brows: '' + '', extras: '' + '' }; E.thinking = E.think; var exp = E[state] || E.default; var animClass = (state === 'happy' || state === 'excited') ? 'clari-happy' : state === 'celebrating' ? 'clari-celebrating' : state === 'waving' ? 'clari-waving' : state === 'proud' ? 'clari-proud' : state === 'confused' ? 'clari-confused' : state === 'sleepy' ? 'clari-sleepy' : state === 'surprised' ? 'clari-surprised' : state === 'nervous' ? 'clari-nervous' : state === 'nervous_sweat' ? 'clari-nervous' : state === 'star' ? 'clari-celebrating' : state === 'love' ? 'clari-happy' : state === 'cool' ? 'clari-proud' : state === 'grateful' ? 'clari-happy' : state === 'focused' ? 'clari-confused' : ''; var blushOpacity = { celebrating: 0.55, excited: 0.55, happy: 0.38, waving: 0.38, encouraging: 0.38, proud: 0.42, love: 0.6, sad: 0.1, nervous: 0.1, nervous_sweat: 0.08, star: 0.5, confused: 0.12, think: 0.18, surprised: 0, sleepy: 0.2, cool: 0, default: 0.22 }[state] || 0.22; var blushRx = (state === 'celebrating' || state === 'excited' || state === 'love' || state === 'star') ? 9 : 7; var blushRy = (state === 'celebrating' || state === 'excited' || state === 'love' || state === 'star') ? 5.5 : 4.5; var blushSVG = blushOpacity > 0 ? ('' + '') : ''; var h = Math.round(size * 1.25); return ''; } // ============================================================ // COMMENT POOLS — Clari's personality in responses // ============================================================ const CORRECT_MSGS = [ "Yep! You've got it.", "That's the one. Nice work.", "Look at you, nailing these.", "Right again. I'm starting to wonder if you even need me.", "Correct! And between us, that one was sneaky.", "Boom. Knew you'd get it.", "You know more than you give yourself credit for.", "Perfect. I'd high-five you but... (wiggles stubby arms)", "Yes! Okay, genuinely impressed over here.", "Spot on. You're on a roll.", "Nailed it.", "That's right! Fun fact: most people get that one wrong.", "Yesss. Clari approves.", "Correct! See, this AI stuff isn't so mysterious.", "Got it in one. Show-off.", "That's exactly right. We make a good team.", "Right! You're picking this up fast.", "Bingo. You got it.", "I'm doing a little robot dance over here.", "That one trips up a lot of people and you just breezed through it." ]; const WRONG_MSGS = [ "Hmm, not quite — but I can totally see why you'd think that.", "Close! The tricky part here is understanding the difference.", "Not this time, but you're thinking along the right lines.", "Ooh, that's the one that gets most people. Here's the thing...", "Not exactly — let me explain this a different way.", "Almost! Think of it like this...", "That's a really common answer, but here's why it's the other one...", "Nope, but no stress — this is why we practice.", "This is one of those ones that's confusing until it clicks.", "Wrong one, but honestly? I find this confusing too sometimes.", "Not that one — but you're closer than you think.", "Oof, tricky question. Here's what makes this one different...", "Not quite right, but that's exactly what practicing is for.", "Nope! Getting it wrong is literally how learning works.", "Not quite — but stick with it, you've got this." ]; const RETURNING_MSGS = [ "Oh hey, you're back! I was just sitting here... being a robot... waiting.", "Welcome back! Ready to learn something cool?", "There you are! I've got some good stuff lined up.", "Hey! Perfect timing — I was just thinking about our next lesson.", "You came back! (I act cool but I was definitely hoping you would.)", "Welcome back! You were being brilliant. Let's keep going.", "Hey hey! Let's pick up where we left off.", "Oh good, you're here. I organized some new stuff for us.", "Back again! This is becoming a thing. I like it.", "Hi! Fun fact: most AI can't taste food. Anyway, welcome back." ]; const STREAK_MSGS = { 3: "Three days in a row! You're building a habit and I'm here for it.", 7: "A whole week! I'm not crying, my circuits are just... leaking.", 14: "Two weeks of showing up. That's more consistent than most people are with anything.", 30: "THIRTY DAYS. You absolute legend. I'm telling all the other robots about you.", broken: "You missed a day, but listen — you're still ahead of everyone who never started. Let's get back to it." }; let _usedCorrect = [], _usedWrong = []; function getCorrectMsg() { if (_usedCorrect.length >= CORRECT_MSGS.length) _usedCorrect = []; const available = CORRECT_MSGS.filter((_, i) => !_usedCorrect.includes(i)); const pick = available[Math.floor(Math.random() * available.length)]; _usedCorrect.push(CORRECT_MSGS.indexOf(pick)); return pick; } function getWrongMsg() { if (_usedWrong.length >= WRONG_MSGS.length) _usedWrong = []; const available = WRONG_MSGS.filter((_, i) => !_usedWrong.includes(i)); const pick = available[Math.floor(Math.random() * available.length)]; _usedWrong.push(WRONG_MSGS.indexOf(pick)); return pick; } function getTimeGreeting() { const h = new Date().getHours(); if (h < 12) return 'Good morning'; if (h < 17) return 'Good afternoon'; if (h < 21) return 'Good evening'; return 'Hey, night owl'; } // ============================================================ // SVG ICON LIBRARY — all icons used in place of emojis // ============================================================ const ICONS = { book: ``, chat: ``, no: ``, check: ``, warn: ``, bulb: ``, search: ``, write: ``, phone: ``, fire: ``, target: ``, robot: ``, brain: ``, bolt: ``, briefcase: ``, clipboard: ``, sparkle: ``, mic: ``, camera: ``, time: ``, shield: ``, person: ``, link: ``, star: ``, eye: ``, lock: ``, globe: ``, mail: ``, info: ``, }; // Map of keyword -> icon name used in info slide bullets // bullet text can start with a keyword tag like "[book]" or just plain text const BULLET_ICON_MAP = { '[book]': 'book', '[chat]': 'chat', '[no]': 'no', '[check]': 'check', '[warn]': 'warn', '[bulb]': 'bulb', '[search]': 'search', '[write]': 'write', '[phone]': 'phone', '[mic]': 'mic', '[camera]': 'camera', '[time]': 'time', '[shield]': 'shield', '[person]': 'person', '[link]': 'link', '[globe]': 'globe', '[mail]': 'mail', '[info]': 'info', '[fire]': 'fire', }; function bulletIcon(name) { const svg = ICONS[name]; if (!svg) return '' + ICONS.check + ''; return '' + svg + ''; } function toolIcon(id) { const map = { chatgpt_free: ICONS.robot, claude_free: ICONS.brain, gemini_free: ICONS.sparkle, copilot_free: ICONS.briefcase, perplexity_free: ICONS.search, chatgpt_plus: ICONS.bolt, notion_ai: ICONS.clipboard }; const svg = map[id] || ICONS.robot; return '' + svg + ''; } // ============================================================ // SOUND MANAGER — Web Audio API synthesis // ============================================================ const SoundManager = { get enabled() { return S.sound_enabled !== false; }, _ctx: null, _getCtx() { if (!this._ctx) { try { this._ctx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)(); } catch(e) {} } return this._ctx; }, _tone(ctx, freq, vol, type, dur, startDelay) { try { const osc = ctx.createOscillator(); const gain = ctx.createGain(); osc.connect(gain); gain.connect(ctx.destination); osc.type = type || 'sine'; osc.frequency.value = freq; const t = ctx.currentTime + (startDelay || 0); gain.gain.setValueAtTime(vol || 0.18, t); gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, t + dur); osc.start(t); osc.stop(t + dur); } catch(e) {} }, _chord(ctx, freqs, vol, type, dur) { freqs.forEach((f, i) => this._tone(ctx, f, vol, type, dur, i * 0.06)); }, play(sound) { if (!this.enabled) return; const ctx = this._getCtx(); if (!ctx) return; if (ctx.state === 'suspended') ctx.resume(); switch(sound) { case 'correct': this._tone(ctx, 523 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 60, 0.18, 'sine', 0.18); break; case 'incorrect': this._tone(ctx, 200, 0.15, 'sawtooth', 0.22); break; case 'levelup': this._chord(ctx, [523, 659, 784], 0.15, 'sine', 0.4); break; case 'lesson_complete':this._chord(ctx, [523, 659, 784, 1047], 0.15, 'sine', 0.5); break; case 'tap': this._tone(ctx, 440, 0.1, 'sine', 0.08); break; case 'heart_lost': this._tone(ctx, 180, 0.15, 'triangle', 0.3); break; case 'achievement': this._chord(ctx, [659, 784, 988], 0.15, 'sine', 0.4); break; } }, playCorrect() { this.play('correct'); }, playIncorrect() { this.play('incorrect'); }, playLevelUp() { this.play('levelup'); }, playLessonComplete() { this.play('lesson_complete'); }, playButtonTap() { this.play('tap'); }, playHeartLost() { this.play('heart_lost'); }, playAchievement() { this.play('achievement'); } }; // ============================================================ // TTS MANAGER // ============================================================ const TTSManager = { get enabled() { return S.tts_enabled === true && 'speechSynthesis' in window; }, _speaking: false, _currentUtt: null, speak(text, onEnd) { if (!this.enabled) return; this.stop(); const utt = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text); utt.rate = S.tts_rate || 1.0; utt.pitch = 1.05; utt.lang = 'en-AU'; utt.onend = () => { this._speaking = false; if (onEnd) onEnd(); }; utt.onerror = () => { this._speaking = false; }; this._speaking = true; this._currentUtt = utt; window.speechSynthesis.speak(utt); }, stop() { if ('speechSynthesis' in window) window.speechSynthesis.cancel(); this._speaking = false; }, toggle(text, btnEl) { if (this._speaking) { this.stop(); if (btnEl) btnEl.classList.remove('tts-active'); } else { if (btnEl) btnEl.classList.add('tts-active'); this.speak(text, () => { if (btnEl) btnEl.classList.remove('tts-active'); }); } }, slideText(slide) { const parts = []; if (slide.title) parts.push(slide.title); if (slide.text) parts.push(slide.text); if (slide.bullets) parts.push(slide.bullets.map(b => b.replace(/^\[\w+\]\s*/, '')).join('. ')); if (slide.tip) parts.push('Tip: ' + slide.tip); if (slide.question) parts.push(slide.question); if (slide.explanation) parts.push('Explanation: ' + slide.explanation); return parts.filter(Boolean).join('. '); } }; function toggleTTS(val) { save('tts_enabled', val); if (!val) TTSManager.stop(); renderProfileTab(); } function setTTSRate(rate) { save('tts_rate', rate); renderProfileTab(); } // ============================================================ // ESCAPE HTML HELPER // ============================================================ function escHtml(s) { return String(s || '').replace(/&/g,'&').replace(//g,'>').replace(/"/g,'"'); } // ============================================================ // LEARNING TRACKS // ============================================================ const TRACKS = [ { id: 'foundation', label: 'Foundation', icon: "", color: '#1cb0f6', units: [1, 2], desc: 'How AI works and how to talk to it' }, { id: 'everyday', label: 'Everyday Life', icon: "", color: '#58cc02', units: [3, 4, 5, 6], desc: 'Work, creativity, safety, and real-life uses' }, { id: 'specialist', label: 'Specialist Skills', icon: "", color: '#a560f8', units: [7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12], desc: 'Students, images, finance, admin, bookkeeping, customer service' }, { id: 'industry', label: 'Industry Focus', icon: "", color: '#ff6b35', units: [13, 14, 15], desc: 'Caregivers, trades, and parenting' }, { id: 'investing', label: 'Investing & Finance', icon: "", color: '#1a73e8', units: [16, 17], desc: 'Stocks, crypto, and digital assets' } ]; const LEARN_FILTER_TAGS = [ { label: 'Beginner', tag: 'beginner' }, { label: 'Work', tag: 'work' }, { label: 'Writing', tag: 'writing' }, { label: 'Safety', tag: 'safety' }, { label: 'Finance', tag: 'finance' }, { label: 'Creative', tag: 'creative' }, { label: 'Students', tag: 'students' }, { label: 'Advanced', tag: 'advanced' }, ]; let learnSearchQuery = ''; let learnFilterTag = ''; let learnDiffFilter = ''; // 'easy' | 'moderate' | 'challenging' | '' let learnBookmarkFilter = false; // true = only show bookmarked lessons let learnSortMode = 'default'; // 'default' | 'xp-desc' | 'easy-first' | 'hard-first' let learnQuickFilter = false; // learn-09: true = only lessons with < 6 slides var _learnTabConfettiFired = false; // learn-08: confetti fires only once per session var learnExpandedCards = {}; // learn-16: tracks which lesson cards are expanded by id /** * Return the difficulty tier for a lesson based on its tags. * 'beginner' tag => 'easy'; 'advanced' tag => 'challenging'; else 'moderate'. */ function getLessonDifficulty(lesson) { var tags = lesson.tags || []; if (tags.indexOf('beginner') > -1) return 'easy'; if (tags.indexOf('advanced') > -1) return 'challenging'; return 'moderate'; } /** * Set the active difficulty filter chip and re-render. */ function filterDifficulty(val) { learnDiffFilter = val; renderLearnTab(); } function filterBookmarks() { learnBookmarkFilter = !learnBookmarkFilter; renderLearnTab(); } // learn-09: toggle quick (<5 min / < 6 slides) filter function filterQuick() { learnQuickFilter = !learnQuickFilter; renderLearnTab(); } function setLearnSort(mode) { learnSortMode = mode || 'default'; renderLearnTab(); } function getTrackForUnit(unitNum) { return TRACKS.find(t => t.units.includes(unitNum)) || null; } function trackProgress(track) { let done = 0, total = 0; for (const unit of COURSE) { if (!track.units.includes(unit.num)) continue; for (const l of unit.lessons) { total++; if (S.completed.includes(l.id)) done++; } } return { done, total, pct: total ? done / total : 0 }; } function renderTrackHeader(track) { const { done, total, pct } = trackProgress(track); const collapsed = (S.track_collapsed || {})[track.id]; const pctInt = Math.round(pct * 100); return `
${track.icon}
${track.label}
${track.desc}
${done}/${total}
▾
`; } function toggleTrack(trackId) { const tc = { ...(S.track_collapsed || {}) }; tc[trackId] = !tc[trackId]; save('track_collapsed', tc); renderLearnTab(); } function lessonMatchesSearch(lesson, query, tag) { const q = query.trim().toLowerCase(); const titleMatch = !q || lesson.title.toLowerCase().includes(q); const tagMatch = !tag || (lesson.tags || []).includes(tag); const diffMatch = !learnDiffFilter || getLessonDifficulty(lesson) === learnDiffFilter; const bkMatch = !learnBookmarkFilter || (S.bookmarks || []).includes(lesson.id); const quickMatch = !learnQuickFilter || (lesson.slides || []).length < 6; return titleMatch && tagMatch && diffMatch && bkMatch && quickMatch; } function updateLearnSearch(val) { learnSearchQuery = val || ''; renderLearnTab(); const inp = document.getElementById('learn-search-input'); if (inp) { inp.focus(); inp.setSelectionRange(inp.value.length, inp.value.length); } } /** * Toggle the top-bar search field open/closed. */ function toggleTopBarSearch() { var wrap = document.getElementById('tb-search-wrap'); var iconBtn = document.getElementById('tb-search-icon-btn'); if (!wrap) return; if (wrap.classList.contains('expanded')) { closeTopBarSearch(); } else { wrap.classList.add('expanded'); if (iconBtn) iconBtn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true'); var inp = document.getElementById('tb-search-expanded-input'); if (inp) { inp.value = learnSearchQuery || ''; setTimeout(function() { inp.focus(); }, 50); } // Switch to learn tab so results are visible if (typeof switchTab === 'function') { switchTab('learn'); } else { var learnBtn = document.querySelector('[onclick*="learn"]'); if (learnBtn) learnBtn.click(); } } } /** * Close the top-bar search, clear the query, and re-render. */ function closeTopBarSearch() { var wrap = document.getElementById('tb-search-wrap'); var iconBtn = document.getElementById('tb-search-icon-btn'); if (wrap) wrap.classList.remove('expanded'); if (iconBtn) iconBtn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false'); var inp = document.getElementById('tb-search-expanded-input'); if (inp) inp.value = ''; learnSearchQuery = ''; renderLearnTab(); } /** * Handle input from the top-bar search field. * Syncs with existing learnSearchQuery and re-renders learn tab. */ function onTopBarSearchInput(val) { learnSearchQuery = val || ''; // Also sync the in-tab search input if it exists var tabInp = document.getElementById('learn-search-input'); if (tabInp && tabInp.value !== learnSearchQuery) { tabInp.value = learnSearchQuery; } renderLearnTab(); } function clearLearnSearch() { learnSearchQuery = ''; learnFilterTag = ''; learnDiffFilter = ''; learnBookmarkFilter = false; learnQuickFilter = false; renderLearnTab(); } // learn-16: toggle expand/collapse for lesson card description function toggleLearnCard(lessonId) { learnExpandedCards[lessonId] = !learnExpandedCards[lessonId]; var expandEl = document.getElementById('lc-expand-' + lessonId); var chevronEl = document.getElementById('lc-chevron-' + lessonId); if (expandEl) { var isOpen = learnExpandedCards[lessonId]; expandEl.style.display = isOpen ? 'block' : 'none'; if (chevronEl) chevronEl.style.transform = isOpen ? 'rotate(180deg)' : 'rotate(0deg)'; } } function setLearnFilter(tag) { learnFilterTag = tag; renderLearnTab(); } // ============================================================ // CLARI DAILY MESSAGE // ============================================================ function getClariDailyMessage() { const hour = new Date().getHours(); const day = Math.floor(Date.now() / 86400000); const streak = S.streak || 0; const dueCount = getReviewsDue().length; const lessonsTotal = S.completed.length; const name = S.user_name ? ', ' + S.user_name : ''; if (streak >= 30) { return `${streak} days straight${name}. I honestly didn't know you had this in you. Respectfully. `; } if (streak >= 7) { return `${streak}-day streak! You're in the top tier of learners. Seriously — most people give up by day 3.`; } if (streak >= 3) { return `${streak} days in a row! You're building something real here. Keep it up.`; } if (dueCount > 0) { return `Hey${name} — you have ${dueCount} review${dueCount > 1 ? 's' : ''} due today. Spaced repetition is how memories stick. Worth 2 minutes!`; } if (lessonsTotal === 0) { return `Welcome${name}! I'm Clari. I'll be your guide through all things AI. Ready? Let's start small.`; } const tips = [ hour < 12 ? `Good morning${name}! Morning learning sessions tend to stick better. Science! Let's use it.` : hour < 17 ? `Good afternoon${name}! Even 5 minutes of learning now will add up faster than you'd expect.` : `Evening${name}! You're here, which already puts you ahead. Quick lesson before bed?`, `Fun fact: writing notes in your own words (even messy ones) makes learning stick 2x better than re-reading.`, `You've completed ${lessonsTotal} lesson${lessonsTotal !== 1 ? 's' : ''} so far. That's not a coincidence — that's effort.`, `Tip: when AI gives you a long answer you didn't want, try ending your prompt with "in 3 bullet points."`, `AI isn't magic — it's pattern-matching at a massive scale. Once you see that, everything clicks.`, `The best AI users ask follow-up questions. Never accept the first answer as final.`, `Struggling with something? Good. Struggle is literally how your brain builds new connections.`, `Not sure if an AI answer is accurate? Ask it: "How confident are you in this?" You'll be surprised.`, `You don't need to be technical to use AI well. You just need to know how to ask clearly.`, `I learn something new every day too. Mostly about you. (In a nice, non-creepy way.)`, ]; return tips[day % tips.length]; } // ============================================================ // CLARI TIP POPUPS // ============================================================ const CLARI_TIPS = [ { id: 'tab_learn_first', clariState: 'waving', label: 'Welcome!', msg: "This is the Learn tab — your home base. Tap any lesson to dive in. I'll be right here the whole time." }, { id: 'tab_practice_first', clariState: 'think', label: 'Clari tip', msg: "Practice helps you keep what you learned. Even 3 questions a day makes a huge difference." }, { id: 'tab_profile_first', clariState: 'happy', label: 'Did you know?', msg: "Your Profile tracks everything — XP, streaks, achievements. Check it after each lesson." }, { id: 'tab_plan_first', clariState: 'encouraging', label: 'Your plan', msg: "My Plan is personalized to you based on your goals. It updates as you learn." }, { id: 'correct_streak_3', clariState: 'excited', label: "You're on fire!", msg: "3 correct in a row! Your brain is in learning mode right now. Ride that wave." }, { id: 'correct_streak_5', clariState: 'celebrating', label: 'Unstoppable!', msg: "5 correct answers in a row! Most people have made at least one mistake by now. Not you." }, { id: 'streak_milestone_3', clariState: 'happy', label: '3-day streak!', msg: "Three days running. Research shows that 3+ days is where habits start to stick. You're doing it." }, { id: 'streak_milestone_7', clariState: 'celebrating', label: 'One whole week!', msg: "A week straight! I'm not exaggerating when I say most people stop before this. You're genuinely exceptional." }, { id: 'first_lesson_done', clariState: 'excited', label: 'First lesson!', msg: "You finished your first lesson! That's the hardest one — starting. You already did it." }, { id: 'five_lessons_done', clariState: 'celebrating', label: 'Five lessons!', msg: "Five lessons in! You now know more about AI than 90% of adults. That's a fact I just made up, but it feels true." }, { id: 'unit_almost_done', clariState: 'encouraging', label: 'Almost there!', msg: "You're on the last lesson of this unit. One more and you'll have a full unit badge. Let's go." }, { id: 'reviews_nudge', clariState: 'think', label: 'Memory science', msg: "Spaced repetition (the review system here) is one of the most research-backed ways to remember things long-term." }, { id: 'hearts_low', clariState: 'sad', label: 'Low hearts', msg: "Running low on hearts. No worries — take your time on the next one. Read carefully before answering." }, { id: 'dark_mode_first', clariState: 'happy', label: 'Nice choice!', msg: "Dark mode activated. Easier on the eyes, especially in the evening. Good call." }, { id: 'xp_milestone_100', clariState: 'celebrating', label: '100 XP!', msg: "You just crossed 100 XP! You're officially past the 'just trying it out' phase. You're a learner now." }, { id: 'xp_milestone_500', clariState: 'celebrating', label: '500 XP!', msg: "500 XP! That's a serious amount of learning. Whatever you came here for, you're getting it." }, { id: 'practice_complete', clariState: 'happy', label: 'Practice done!', msg: "Practice session complete! Every review session is invisible armor for your memory." }, { id: 'perfect_lesson', clariState: 'celebrating', label: 'Perfect run!', msg: "Zero mistakes! That's not luck — that's actual understanding. Remember this feeling." }, { id: 'prompt_grader_first', clariState: 'think', label: 'Try this!', msg: "The Prompt Grader up top is one of the most useful tools here. Paste any AI prompt and I'll score it live." }, { id: 'gem_shop_first', clariState: 'excited', label: 'Gem Shop!', msg: "Gems unlock fun stuff — Streak Freezes, XP Boosts, and new color themes for me. " }, { id: 'keyboard_tip', clariState: 'happy', label: 'Desktop tip', msg: "Press 1-4 to pick a quiz answer, Space or Enter to advance — no mouse needed!" }, ]; let _clariTipTimeout = null; function showClariTip(tipId) { const seen = S.clari_tips_seen || []; if (seen.includes(tipId)) return; const tip = CLARI_TIPS.find(t => t.id === tipId); if (!tip) return; save('clari_tips_seen', [...seen, tipId]); const popup = document.getElementById('clari-tip-popup'); const avatarEl = document.getElementById('clari-tip-avatar'); const msgEl = document.getElementById('clari-tip-msg'); const labelEl = document.getElementById('clari-tip-label'); if (!popup || !avatarEl || !msgEl) return; avatarEl.innerHTML = clariSVG(tip.clariState, 40); msgEl.textContent = tip.msg; if (labelEl) labelEl.textContent = tip.label; popup.classList.add('visible'); clearTimeout(_clariTipTimeout); _clariTipTimeout = setTimeout(() => dismissClariTip(), 5000); } function dismissClariTip() { const popup = document.getElementById('clari-tip-popup'); if (popup) popup.classList.remove('visible'); clearTimeout(_clariTipTimeout); } // ============================================================ // KEYBOARD SHORTCUT HANDLER // ============================================================ function handleLessonKeyboard(e) { // Ignore when typing in an input const el = document.activeElement; if (el && (el.tagName === 'INPUT' || el.tagName === 'TEXTAREA' || el.isContentEditable)) return; // Only active in lesson view const lessonView = document.getElementById('view-lesson'); if (!lessonView || !lessonView.classList.contains('active')) return; // Number keys 1-4: select quiz option if (e.key >= '1' && e.key <= '4') { const optIdx = parseInt(e.key, 10) - 1; const opts = document.querySelectorAll('.quiz-options .quiz-option'); if (opts.length > optIdx && !lessonState.slideAnswered) { e.preventDefault(); opts[optIdx].click(); } return; } // '?' key: toggle keyboard shortcut overlay (works globally via global handler below) // 'H' key: trigger hint if available if (e.key === 'h' || e.key === 'H') { e.preventDefault(); var _hintBtn = document.getElementById('quiz-hint-btn'); if (_hintBtn) { _hintBtn.click(); return; } var _typeHintBtn = document.querySelector('.type-hint-btn'); if (_typeHintBtn) { _typeHintBtn.click(); return; } return; } // 'F' key: toggle focus mode (when in lesson view) if (e.key === 'f' || e.key === 'F') { e.preventDefault(); toggleFocusMode(); return; } // 'S' key: toggle sound if (e.key === 's' || e.key === 'S') { e.preventDefault(); toggleSound(); return; } if (e.key !== ' ' && e.key !== 'Enter') return; const btn = document.getElementById('lesson-next-btn'); if (btn && !btn.disabled) { e.preventDefault(); btn.click(); } } // ============================================================ // CLARI LESSON COMPLETE MESSAGE // ============================================================ function getClariCompleteMessage(noErrors, wrongCount, isFirstLesson) { let state, msg; if (isFirstLesson) { state = 'excited'; msg = "Your very first lesson — done! That took courage. Now that you've started, the hardest part is already behind you."; } else if (noErrors) { state = 'celebrating'; const perfectMsgs = [ "Zero mistakes! You're on fire. I want to frame this result.", "Perfect score! That wasn't luck — you actually understood every question.", "Flawless run. I did a little robot dance when I saw that. (Arms went wild.)", "Zero errors! That's what deep understanding looks like.", ]; msg = perfectMsgs[S.completed.length % perfectMsgs.length]; } else if (wrongCount <= 2) { state = 'happy'; const nearPerfectMsgs = [ "Almost perfect! One or two slipped by, but your understanding is solid.", "You're getting sharper every lesson. Those small stumbles? That's learning.", "Close to perfect! The ones you missed will stick better next time because you got them wrong. Really.", ]; msg = nearPerfectMsgs[S.completed.length % nearPerfectMsgs.length]; } else { state = 'encouraging'; const encouragingMsgs = [ "Mistakes are literally how learning works. Your brain just got stronger in exactly the right spots.", "Getting things wrong is not failure — it's the mechanism. You'll nail those next time.", "A few stumbles, but you finished. Finishing while struggling is worth more than breezing through easy stuff.", ]; msg = encouragingMsgs[S.completed.length % encouragingMsgs.length]; } return `
${clariSVG(state, 72)}
${msg}
`; } // ============================================================ // CLARI PROFILE GREETING // ============================================================ function getClariProfileGreeting() { const name = S.user_name || 'Learner'; const lessons = S.completed.length; const streak = S.streak || 0; const xp = S.xp || 0; const level = xpToLevel(xp); let statLine = ''; if (lessons === 0) { statLine = "Start your first lesson and I'll have something more impressive to show you here."; } else if (lessons === 1) { statLine = "You've completed 1 lesson. The journey starts with one step, and you just took it."; } else if (lessons < 5) { statLine = `You've completed ${lessons} lessons. You know more about AI than you did a week ago. That's real.`; } else if (lessons < 20) { statLine = `${lessons} lessons done, Level ${level}, ${xp} XP. That's more than most people ever commit to learning about AI.`; } else { statLine = `${lessons} lessons completed. You've put in real work here — and it shows. Level ${level}, ${xp} XP, ${streak}-day streak.`; } const greetings = [ `Hey, ${name}! Looking sharp.`, `${name}! Great to see you here.`, `There you are, ${name}.`, `${name} — the one who actually shows up.`, ]; const greeting = greetings[Math.floor(Date.now() / 86400000) % greetings.length]; return `
${clariSVG('happy', 44)}
${greeting}
${statLine}
`; } // ============================================================ // STREAK MILESTONE OVERLAY // ============================================================ const STREAK_MILESTONE_DATA = { 7: { msg: "A whole week straight! I'm not going to downplay this — a 7-day streak is genuinely rare. Most people stop before now.", clariState: 'celebrating', milestoneClass: 'milestone-7' }, 14: { msg: "Two weeks! You've turned this into an actual habit. Your brain has physically rewired to make this easier now.", clariState: 'celebrating', milestoneClass: 'milestone-14' }, 30: { msg: "THIRTY DAYS. You absolute legend. I'm telling all the other AI mentors about you. This is extraordinary.", clariState: 'excited', milestoneClass: 'milestone-30' }, 100: { msg: "One hundred days. That's not a streak — that's a lifestyle. You are now officially a person who learns consistently. Forever.", clariState: 'celebrating', milestoneClass: 'milestone-100' } }; function showStreakMilestone(streak) { const celebrated = S.clari_streak_celebrated || []; if (celebrated.includes(streak)) return; const data = STREAK_MILESTONE_DATA[streak]; if (!data) return; save('clari_streak_celebrated', [...celebrated, streak]); const overlay = document.getElementById('clari-streak-overlay'); if (!overlay) return; document.getElementById('streak-overlay-num').textContent = streak; document.getElementById('streak-overlay-msg').textContent = data.msg; document.getElementById('streak-overlay-clari').innerHTML = clariSVG(data.clariState, 90); overlay.className = ''; overlay.classList.add(data.milestoneClass); const wrap = document.getElementById('streak-confetti-wrap'); wrap.innerHTML = ''; const colors = ['#ffffff','#ffd700','#ff6b35','#ff4081','#7c4dff']; for (let i = 0; i < 40; i++) { const piece = document.createElement('div'); piece.className = 'confetti-piece'; piece.style.cssText = ` left:${Math.random()*100}%; top:${Math.random()*-20}%; background:${colors[Math.floor(Math.random()*colors.length)]}; animation-delay:${Math.random()*1.5}s; animation-duration:${1.5+Math.random()}s; border-radius:${Math.random()>0.5?'50%':'2px'}; width:${6+Math.random()*8}px; height:${6+Math.random()*8}px; `; wrap.appendChild(piece); } overlay.classList.add('open'); if (SoundManager.playAchievement) SoundManager.playAchievement(); } function closeStreakOverlay() { const overlay = document.getElementById('clari-streak-overlay'); if (overlay) overlay.classList.remove('open'); } // ============================================================ // LESSON STREAK MILESTONE OVERLAY // ============================================================ var _lessonStreakOverlayTimer = null; function showLessonStreakOverlay(streak) { var overlay = document.getElementById('lesson-streak-overlay'); if (!overlay) return; var MESSAGES = { 3: { msg: "3 lessons in a row! You're on fire!", state: 'star', badge: '3' }, 5: { msg: "5 lessons in a row! You are absolutely unstoppable.", state: 'star', badge: '5' }, 10: { msg: "10 lessons in a row! That is seriously impressive.", state: 'celebrating', badge: '10' } }; var data = MESSAGES[streak]; if (!data) return; var clariEl = document.getElementById('lso-clari'); var badgeEl = document.getElementById('lso-badge'); var msgEl = document.getElementById('lso-msg'); var fwEl = document.getElementById('lso-fireworks'); if (clariEl) clariEl.innerHTML = clariSVG(data.state, 100); if (badgeEl) badgeEl.textContent = data.badge; if (msgEl) msgEl.textContent = data.msg; // Fireworks sparks if (fwEl) { fwEl.innerHTML = ''; var colors = ['#ffd700','#ff6b6b','#5bc0f8','#58cc02','#ff7eb3','#a560f8','#ffffff']; for (var i = 0; i < 60; i++) { var sp = document.createElement('div'); sp.className = 'lso-spark'; var ox = (Math.random() * 100) + '%'; var oy = (Math.random() * 80 + 10) + '%'; var dx = ((Math.random() - 0.5) * 220) + 'px'; var dy = ((Math.random() - 0.5) * 220) + 'px'; var sz = (4 + Math.random() * 8) + 'px'; sp.style.cssText = 'left:' + ox + ';top:' + oy + ';width:' + sz + ';height:' + sz + ';background:' + colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)] + ';--dx:' + dx + ';--dy:' + dy + ';animation-delay:' + (Math.random() * 0.6) + 's' + ';animation-duration:' + (1.2 + Math.random() * 0.8) + 's;'; fwEl.appendChild(sp); } } overlay.classList.remove('lso-out'); overlay.classList.add('lso-open'); if (typeof SoundManager !== 'undefined' && SoundManager.playAchievement) { SoundManager.playAchievement(); } // Auto-dismiss after 2 seconds if (_lessonStreakOverlayTimer) clearTimeout(_lessonStreakOverlayTimer); _lessonStreakOverlayTimer = setTimeout(function() { closeLessonStreakOverlay(); }, 2000); } function closeLessonStreakOverlay() { if (_lessonStreakOverlayTimer) { clearTimeout(_lessonStreakOverlayTimer); _lessonStreakOverlayTimer = null; } var overlay = document.getElementById('lesson-streak-overlay'); if (overlay) { overlay.classList.remove('lso-open'); overlay.classList.add('lso-out'); } setTimeout(function() { var o = document.getElementById('lesson-streak-overlay'); if (o) o.classList.remove('lso-out'); }, 500); } // ============================================================ // PROGRESS DASHBOARD // ============================================================ function logXpToday(amount) { const today = todayStr(); const log = [...(S.xp_log || [])]; const existing = log.find(e => e.d === today); if (existing) { existing.xp += amount; } else { log.push({ d: today, xp: amount }); } log.sort((a, b) => a.d.localeCompare(b.d)); if (log.length > 30) log.splice(0, log.length - 30); save('xp_log', log); } function renderProgressDashboard() { const unitCircles = COURSE.map(unit => { const total = unit.lessons.length; const done = unit.lessons.filter(l => S.completed.includes(l.id)).length; const pct = total ? done / total : 0; const r = 12, circ = 2 * Math.PI * r; const dash = circ * pct; const allDone = done === total; return `
${unit.num}
`; }).join(''); const totalLessons = COURSE.reduce((s, u) => s + u.lessons.length, 0); const doneLessons = S.completed.length; const doneUnits = COURSE.filter(u => u.lessons.every(l => S.completed.includes(l.id))).length; const days7 = Array.from({ length: 7 }, (_, i) => { const d = new Date(); d.setDate(d.getDate() - (6 - i)); return d.toISOString().split('T')[0]; }); const xpLog = S.xp_log || []; const dayXp = days7.map(d => { const entry = xpLog.find(e => e.d === d); return { date: d, xp: entry ? entry.xp : 0 }; }); const maxXp = Math.max(...dayXp.map(e => e.xp), 1); const barChart = `
${dayXp.map(({ date, xp }) => { const pct = Math.round((xp / maxXp) * 100); const label = new Date(date + 'T12:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en', { weekday: 'short' }); return `
${label}
${xp > 0 ? `
+${xp}
` : ''}
`; }).join('')}
`; return `
${doneUnits}
Units done
${doneLessons}
Lessons done
${totalLessons}
Total lessons
${unitCircles}
XP — Last 7 Days
${barChart}`; } // ============================================================ // UNIT QUICK-JUMP // ============================================================ function openUnitJump() { const list = document.getElementById('unit-jump-list'); if (!list) return; list.innerHTML = COURSE.map(unit => { const done = unit.lessons.filter(l => S.completed.includes(l.id)).length; const total = unit.lessons.length; const r = 10, circ = 2 * Math.PI * r; const dash = circ * (total ? done/total : 0); const ringHtml = ``; return `
${unit.num}
Unit ${unit.num}: ${unit.title}
${done}/${total} lessons
${ringHtml}
`; }).join(''); document.getElementById('unit-jump-sheet').classList.add('open'); } function closeUnitJump(e) { if (e && e.target !== document.getElementById('unit-jump-sheet')) return; closeModal('unit-jump-sheet'); } function jumpToUnit(unitNum) { closeModal('unit-jump-sheet'); const track = getTrackForUnit(unitNum); if (track) { const tc = { ...(S.track_collapsed || {}) }; tc[track.id] = false; save('track_collapsed', tc); renderLearnTab(); } requestAnimationFrame(() => { const el = document.getElementById('unit-section-' + unitNum); if (el) el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' }); }); } // ============================================================ // HEARTS + XP RING HTML HELPERS // ============================================================ function renderHearts(count, max) { max = max || 5; let html = ''; for (let i = 1; i <= max; i++) { html += ``; } return html; } function xpRingHTML(xp, size) { size = size || 36; const level = xpToLevel(xp); const progress = xp % 100; const pct = progress / 100; const r = (size - 6) / 2; const circ = 2 * Math.PI * r; const dash = circ * pct; return ``; } // ============================================================ // TOP BAR + NAV UPDATE // ============================================================ function updateTopBar() { const tbs = document.getElementById('tb-streak-num'); const tbh = document.getElementById('tb-hearts'); const tbx = document.getElementById('tb-xp-ring'); const tbg = document.getElementById('tb-gems'); if (tbs) { tbs.textContent = S.streak; let _fbadge = document.getElementById('tb-freeze-badge'); if (S.streak_freeze) { if (!_fbadge) { _fbadge = document.createElement('span'); _fbadge.id = 'tb-freeze-badge'; _fbadge.className = 'tb-freeze-badge'; _fbadge.title = 'Streak Freeze active'; _fbadge.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Streak freeze active'); _fbadge.textContent = '\u2745'; tbs.parentNode.appendChild(_fbadge); } } else { if (_fbadge) _fbadge.remove(); } } if (tbh) tbh.innerHTML = renderHearts(S.hearts, 3); if (tbx) tbx.innerHTML = xpRingHTML(S.xp, 36); if (tbg) tbg.innerHTML = `${S.gems || 0}`; updateNavBadges(); const _xpFill = document.getElementById('tb-xp-bar-fill'); if (_xpFill) { _xpFill.style.width = ((S.xp || 0) % 100) + '%'; } var _lsEl = document.getElementById('tb-lesson-streak'); if (_lsEl) { var _sesLs = S.session_lesson_streak || 0; if (_sesLs >= 2) { _lsEl.innerHTML = '🔥 ' + _sesLs; _lsEl.classList.add('visible'); } else { _lsEl.classList.remove('visible'); } } var _strRem = document.getElementById('tb-streak-reminder'); if (_strRem) { var _streakAtRisk = S.streak > 0 && S.streak_date !== todayStr() && !S.streak_freeze; _strRem.style.display = _streakAtRisk ? 'flex' : 'none'; } var _sndBtn = document.getElementById('tb-sound-btn'); if (_sndBtn) { var _soundOn = S.sound_enabled !== false; _sndBtn.innerHTML = _soundOn ? '' : ''; _sndBtn.style.color = _soundOn ? 'var(--clari-blue,#1cb0f6)' : 'var(--gray3)'; } var _pctEl = document.getElementById('tb-course-pct'); if (_pctEl && typeof COURSE !== 'undefined') { var _totalLessons = COURSE.reduce(function(acc, u) { return acc + (u.lessons ? u.lessons.length : 0); }, 0); var _doneLessons = _totalLessons > 0 ? (S.completed || []).length : 0; var _pct = _totalLessons > 0 ? Math.round((_doneLessons / _totalLessons) * 100) : 0; _pctEl.textContent = _pct + '%'; if (_doneLessons > 0 || _pct > 0) { _pctEl.classList.add('visible'); } else { _pctEl.classList.remove('visible'); } } } function showMainUI() { document.getElementById('top-bar').classList.add('visible'); document.getElementById('bottom-nav').classList.add('visible'); updateTopBar(); } function hideMainUI() { document.getElementById('top-bar').classList.remove('visible'); document.getElementById('bottom-nav').classList.remove('visible'); } // ============================================================ // QUIZ KEYBOARD NAVIGATION // ============================================================ let _quizKeyHandler = null; function teardownQuizKeyNav() { if (_quizKeyHandler) { document.removeEventListener('keydown', _quizKeyHandler); _quizKeyHandler = null; } } function setupQuizKeyNav(opts, onSelect) { teardownQuizKeyNav(); if ('ontouchstart' in window) return; let focusIdx = -1; function applyFocus(idx) { opts.forEach(function(o, i) { o.classList.toggle('kb-focus', i === idx); }); focusIdx = idx; } _quizKeyHandler = function(e) { if (!opts.length) return; const answered = Array.from(opts).some(function(o) { return o.classList.contains('correct') || o.classList.contains('wrong'); }); if (answered) { teardownQuizKeyNav(); return; } if (e.key === 'ArrowDown' || e.key === 'ArrowRight') { e.preventDefault(); applyFocus((focusIdx + 1) % opts.length); } else if (e.key === 'ArrowUp' || e.key === 'ArrowLeft') { e.preventDefault(); applyFocus((focusIdx - 1 + opts.length) % opts.length); } else if ((e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') && focusIdx >= 0) { e.preventDefault(); teardownQuizKeyNav(); onSelect(opts[focusIdx], focusIdx); } else if (e.key >= '1' && e.key <= '9') { const numIdx = parseInt(e.key) - 1; if (numIdx < opts.length) { e.preventDefault(); applyFocus(numIdx); setTimeout(function() { teardownQuizKeyNav(); onSelect(opts[numIdx], numIdx); }, 150); } } }; document.addEventListener('keydown', _quizKeyHandler); } // ============================================================ // TAB SWITCHING // ============================================================ let currentTab = 'learn'; function switchTab(tab) { if (currentTab === tab) return; // Hide all views document.querySelectorAll('.view').forEach(v => v.classList.remove('active')); document.querySelectorAll('.nav-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active')); const newView = document.getElementById('view-' + tab); newView.classList.add('active'); document.getElementById('nav-' + tab).classList.add('active'); currentTab = tab; // Clari first-visit tips per tab const tabTipMap = { practice: 'tab_practice_first', profile: 'tab_profile_first', plan: 'tab_plan_first' }; if (tabTipMap[tab]) setTimeout(() => showClariTip(tabTipMap[tab]), 800); // Show/hide unit jump FAB const fab = document.getElementById('unit-jump-fab'); if (fab) fab.style.display = tab === 'learn' ? 'flex' : 'none'; if (tab === 'learn') renderLearnTab(); if (tab === 'practice') renderPracticeTab(); if (tab === 'plan') renderPlanTab(); if (tab === 'profile') renderProfileTab(); } // ============================================================ // ONBOARDING LOGIC // ============================================================ var obState = { currentScreen: "ob-welcome", surveyStep: 0, surveyAnswers: {} }; var OB_SCREENS = ["ob-welcome", "ob-name", "ob-experience", "ob-techcomfort", "ob-survey", "ob-loading", "ob-results"]; // ============================================================ // LANGUAGE / TRANSLATIONS // ============================================================ const TRANSLATIONS = { en: { tab_learn: 'Learn', tab_practice: 'Practice', tab_plan: 'My Plan', tab_profile: 'Profile', btn_next: 'Next', btn_continue: 'Continue', btn_start_lesson: 'Start Lesson', btn_finish: 'Finish Lesson', btn_check: 'Check Answer', quiz_correct: 'Correct!', quiz_wrong: 'Not quite!', quiz_great: 'Great job!', streak_label: 'Day streak', xp_label: 'XP', level_label: 'Level', settings_language: 'Language', lesson_complete: 'Lesson Complete!', keep_going: 'Keep going!' }, es: { tab_learn: 'Aprender', tab_practice: 'Practicar', tab_plan: 'Mi Plan', tab_profile: 'Perfil', btn_next: 'Siguiente', btn_continue: 'Continuar', btn_start_lesson: 'Iniciar Lección', btn_finish: 'Terminar Lección', btn_check: 'Comprobar', quiz_correct: '¡Correcto!', quiz_wrong: '¡Casi!', quiz_great: '¡Buen trabajo!', streak_label: 'Días seguidos', xp_label: 'XP', level_label: 'Nivel', settings_language: 'Idioma', lesson_complete: '¡Lección Completada!', keep_going: '¡Sigue así!' }, fr: { tab_learn: 'Apprendre', tab_practice: 'Pratiquer', tab_plan: 'Mon Plan', tab_profile: 'Profil', btn_next: 'Suivant', btn_continue: 'Continuer', btn_start_lesson: 'Commencer', btn_finish: 'Terminer la Leçon', btn_check: 'Vérifier', quiz_correct: 'Correct !', quiz_wrong: 'Pas tout à fait !', quiz_great: 'Bravo !', streak_label: 'Jours de suite', xp_label: 'XP', level_label: 'Niveau', settings_language: 'Langue', lesson_complete: 'Leçon Terminée !', keep_going: 'Continuez !' }, zh: { tab_learn: '学习', tab_practice: '练习', tab_plan: '我的计划', tab_profile: '个人资料', btn_next: '下一步', btn_continue: '继续', btn_start_lesson: '开始课程', btn_finish: '完成课程', btn_check: '检查答案', quiz_correct: '正确！', quiz_wrong: '差一点！', quiz_great: '干得好！', streak_label: '连续天数', xp_label: '经验值', level_label: '等级', settings_language: '语言', lesson_complete: '课程完成！', keep_going: '继续加油！' } }; function t(key) { const lang = (S && S.lang) || 'en'; return (TRANSLATIONS[lang] && TRANSLATIONS[lang][key]) || TRANSLATIONS.en[key] || key; } function applyLanguage(lang) { if (!lang) lang = (S && S.lang) || 'en'; // Update nav tab text nodes const tabMap = { 'nav-learn': 'tab_learn', 'nav-practice': 'tab_practice', 'nav-plan': 'tab_plan', 'nav-profile': 'tab_profile' }; Object.keys(tabMap).forEach(function(id) { const el = document.getElementById(id); if (!el) return; // Find last text node (after svg/span children) let last = null; el.childNodes.forEach(function(n) { if (n.nodeType === 3 && n.textContent.trim()) last = n; }); if (last) last.textContent = ' ' + t(tabMap[id]) + ' '; }); // Update active lang selector chips in settings if visible document.querySelectorAll('.lang-chip').forEach(function(el) { el.classList.toggle('lang-chip-active', el.dataset.lang === lang); }); } function setLanguage(lang) { save('lang', lang); applyLanguage(lang); const msgs = { es: 'Idioma: Español 🇪🇸', fr: 'Langue : Français 🇫🇷', zh: '语言：普通话 🇨🇳', en: 'Language: English 🇬🇧' }; showToast(msgs[lang] || 'Language updated', 'success', 2500); renderProfileTab(); } function obShowScreen(id) { var screens = document.querySelectorAll(".ob-screen"); for (var _si = 0; _si < screens.length; _si++) { screens[_si].classList.add("hidden"); } var el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) { el.classList.remove("hidden"); } obState.currentScreen = id; } function obNext(from) { if (from === "ob-welcome") { obShowScreen("ob-name"); return; } if (from === "ob-experience") { renderObDots("ob-dots-tech", 1, 6); obShowScreen("ob-techcomfort"); return; } if (from === "ob-techcomfort") { obState.surveyStep = 0; renderObDots("ob-dots-survey", 2, 6); renderSurveyQuestion(); obShowScreen("ob-survey"); return; } } function renderObDots(containerId, activeIdx, total) { var el = document.getElementById(containerId); if (!el) return; var html = ''; for (var i = 0; i < total; i++) { var cls; if (i < activeIdx) { cls = 'ob-dot done'; } else if (i === activeIdx) { cls = 'ob-dot active'; } else { cls = 'ob-dot'; } html += '
'; } el.innerHTML = html; } function obContinueName() { var inputEl = document.getElementById("name-input"); var val = inputEl ? inputEl.value.trim() : ""; if (!val) { if (inputEl) inputEl.focus(); return; } save("user_name", val); renderObDots("ob-dots-exp", 0, 6); var mascotEl = document.getElementById("ob-name-mascot"); if (mascotEl) mascotEl.innerHTML = clariSVG("happy", 80); obShowScreen("ob-experience"); } function obSelectCard(el, key, val) { var parent = el.closest(".ob-cards"); if (parent) { var cards = parent.querySelectorAll(".ob-card"); for (var _ci = 0; _ci < cards.length; _ci++) { cards[_ci].classList.remove("selected"); } } el.classList.add("selected"); save(key, val); if (key === "experience") { var expBtn = document.getElementById("exp-continue-btn"); if (expBtn) expBtn.classList.remove("hidden"); } if (key === "tech_comfort") { var techBtn = document.getElementById("tech-continue-btn"); if (techBtn) techBtn.classList.remove("hidden"); } } // ============================================================ // SURVEY // ============================================================ const SURVEY_QUESTIONS = [ { key: 'q_profession', label: 'Your Work', multi: false, text: '💼 What best describes your work?', hint: 'Fun fact: AI tools are being used across every industry — from nursing to real estate!', options: ['Admin & Office Work', 'Bookkeeping & Accounts', 'Customer Service', 'Healthcare / Nursing', 'Small Business Owner', 'Teaching & Education', 'Real Estate', 'Retired & Exploring', 'Something else'] }, { key: 'q_pain', label: 'Your Biggest Time-Waster', multi: false, text: '⏰ What takes up too much of your time right now?', hint: 'Fun fact: AI can handle most of these tasks in under 30 seconds — seriously!', options: ['Writing the same emails over and over', 'Filling in forms and doing paperwork', 'Chasing payments or sorting invoices', 'Answering the same customer questions', 'Writing reports and summaries', 'Keeping track of things and staying organised'] }, { key: 'q1', label: 'Your Goal', multi: false, text: '🎯 What would make the biggest difference for you?', options: ['Save time on emails and writing', 'Get through my paperwork faster', 'Have AI do my research for me', 'Use AI for my specific job', 'Start from the very beginning', 'Do creative projects'] }, { key: 'q_tried', label: 'AI Tools You’ve Tried', multi: true, text: '🧪 Which of these have you tried?', hint: 'Fun fact: ChatGPT reached 100 million users in just 2 months — the fastest app ever!', options: ['ChatGPT', 'Siri / Alexa', 'Google Search', 'None yet'] }, { key: 'q_worry', label: 'Your Worries', multi: false, text: '🤔 What’s your biggest worry about AI?', hint: 'Heads up: every one of these is a real concern — and we’ll cover them all in this course!', options: ['Privacy / data safety', 'Getting wrong answers', 'It being too complicated', 'Losing my job to AI'] }, { key: 'q3', label: 'Your Device', multi: false, text: '💻 Which device do you use most?', options: ['Phone', 'Computer', 'Tablet', 'Multiple devices'] }, { key: 'q4', label: 'Daily Time', multi: false, text: '⏳ How much time can you spend learning each day?', hint: 'Fun fact: just 5 minutes a day adds up to over 30 hours of learning in a year!', options: ['Just 5 minutes (1 lesson)', 'About 10-15 minutes (2 lessons)', 'Half an hour (3 lessons)', 'As much as needed (5 lessons)'] }, { key: 'q_study', label: 'Study Focus', multi: false, text: '📚 What kind of work do you most need help with?', options: ['Essays & papers', 'Research & citations', 'Studying & exam prep', 'Presentations', 'Job applications'], condition: (answers) => !answers.q_profession || answers.q_profession === 'Something else' || answers.q_profession === 'Teaching & Education' || answers.q_profession === 'Retired & Exploring' } ]; function getAdaptiveSurveyQuestion(q) { const sa = obState.surveyAnswers; const name = S.user_name || ''; const profession = sa.q_profession; const adapted = { ...q, options: q.options.slice() }; if (q.key === 'q_pain') { const painByProf = { 'Admin & Office Work': ['Typing up the same emails and letters', 'Filling in forms and documents', 'Taking meeting notes', 'Chasing people for information', 'Creating reports and summaries', 'Keeping things organised'], 'Bookkeeping & Accounts': ['Chasing payments and invoices', 'Writing client update emails', 'Explaining finances in plain English', 'Reconciliations and data entry', 'Following up with late payers', 'Creating financial summaries'], 'Customer Service': ['Answering the same questions repeatedly', 'Writing complaint responses', 'Creating reply templates', 'Following up with customers', 'Writing apology emails', 'Tracking customer issues'], 'Healthcare / Nursing': ['Writing patient notes and reports', 'Filling in forms and documentation', 'Communicating with patients and families', 'Staying updated on information', 'Writing handover notes', 'Administrative paperwork'], 'Small Business Owner': ['Writing emails and quotes', 'Creating social media posts', 'Following up with leads', 'Writing invoices and proposals', 'Responding to enquiries', 'Creating marketing content'], 'Teaching & Education': ['Writing lesson plans and materials', 'Giving feedback on student work', 'Communicating with parents', 'Creating assessments and quizzes', 'Writing reports', 'Admin and planning paperwork'], 'Real Estate': ['Writing property descriptions', 'Following up with leads', 'Creating marketing emails', 'Preparing contracts and documents', 'Writing client updates', 'Managing enquiries'] }; const profContexts = { 'Admin & Office Work': 'in your admin role', 'Bookkeeping & Accounts': 'in your bookkeeping work', 'Customer Service': 'in customer service', 'Healthcare / Nursing': 'in healthcare', 'Small Business Owner': 'running your business', 'Teaching & Education': 'in teaching', 'Real Estate': 'in real estate' }; if (profession && painByProf[profession]) { adapted.options = painByProf[profession]; adapted.text = 'What takes up too much of your time ' + (profContexts[profession] || 'right now') + '?'; } } if (q.key === 'q1' && name) { adapted.text = name + ', what would make the biggest difference for you?'; } if (q.key === 'q4' && sa.q_pain) { adapted.text = 'Got it! How much time can you spend learning each day?'; } if (q.key === 'q3' && name) { adapted.text = name + ', which device do you use most?'; } return adapted; } function renderSurveyQuestion() { // Skip questions whose condition is not met while (obState.surveyStep < SURVEY_QUESTIONS.length) { const qCheck = SURVEY_QUESTIONS[obState.surveyStep]; if (!qCheck.condition || qCheck.condition(obState.surveyAnswers)) break; obState.surveyStep++; } if (obState.surveyStep >= SURVEY_QUESTIONS.length) { finishSurvey(); return; } const q = getAdaptiveSurveyQuestion(SURVEY_QUESTIONS[obState.surveyStep]); const currentAnswers = obState.surveyAnswers[q.key] || (q.multi ? [] : null); const dotsStep = obState.surveyStep + 2; renderObDots('ob-dots-survey', dotsStep, SURVEY_QUESTIONS.length + 2); // Update progress bar (function() { var totalQ = SURVEY_QUESTIONS.length; var curQ = obState.surveyStep + 1; var pct = Math.round((curQ / totalQ) * 100); var wrap = document.getElementById('ob-survey-progress-wrap'); var txt = document.getElementById('ob-survey-progress-text'); var cnt = document.getElementById('ob-survey-progress-count'); var fill = document.getElementById('ob-survey-progress-fill'); if (wrap) wrap.style.display = ''; if (txt) txt.textContent = 'Question ' + curQ; if (cnt) cnt.textContent = curQ + ' of ' + totalQ; if (fill) fill.style.width = pct + '%'; })(); let optionsHtml = q.options.map((opt, i) => { let selected = q.multi ? (Array.isArray(currentAnswers) && currentAnswers.includes(opt)) : (currentAnswers === opt); const cls = selected ? (q.multi ? 'survey-option multi-selected' : 'survey-option selected') : 'survey-option'; return ``; }).join(''); const hintHtml = q.hint ? `
ℹ️ ${q.hint}
` : ''; document.getElementById('survey-question-wrap').innerHTML = `
${q.label}
${q.text}
${optionsHtml}
${hintHtml} `; } function surveySelect(el, key, val, multi) { // Brief scale animation on the tapped option el.classList.remove('ob-option-selected'); void el.offsetWidth; // reflow to restart animation el.classList.add('ob-option-selected'); setTimeout(function() { el.classList.remove('ob-option-selected'); }, 260); if (multi) { let arr = obState.surveyAnswers[key] || []; const idx = arr.indexOf(val); if (idx > -1) { arr.splice(idx, 1); el.classList.remove('multi-selected'); } else { arr.push(val); el.classList.add('multi-selected'); } obState.surveyAnswers[key] = arr; } else { const parent = el.closest('.survey-options'); parent.querySelectorAll('.survey-option').forEach(o => o.classList.remove('selected')); el.classList.add('selected'); obState.surveyAnswers[key] = val; } const btn = document.getElementById('survey-next-btn'); const ans = obState.surveyAnswers[key]; btn.disabled = !(ans && (!multi || ans.length > 0)); // Personalised Clari reactions const _profReactions = { 'Admin & Office Work': 'AI is perfect for admin work!', 'Bookkeeping & Accounts': 'AI loves numbers too!', 'Customer Service': 'AI will save you SO much time!', 'Healthcare / Nursing': 'Amazing — such an important job!', 'Small Business Owner': 'AI is a game-changer for business!', 'Teaching & Education': 'Teachers love AI — great choice!', 'Real Estate': 'AI + real estate is a perfect match!', 'Retired & Exploring': "Love the curiosity — let's go!", 'Something else': 'AI works for everyone!' }; const _painReactions = { 'Typing up the same emails and letters': 'AI writes those in seconds!', 'Writing the same emails over and over': 'AI fixes that instantly!', 'Answering the same questions repeatedly': 'AI will handle those for you!', 'Writing patient notes and reports': 'AI makes documentation so fast!', 'Creating social media posts': 'AI is brilliant at that!' }; const _goalReactions = { 'Save time on emails and writing': "That's AI's superpower!", 'Get through my paperwork faster': "You'll save hours every week!", 'Have AI do my research for me': 'AI is brilliant for research!', 'Use AI for my specific job': "We'll find the perfect tools!", 'Start from the very beginning': 'Perfect place to start!', 'Do creative projects': 'AI + creativity = magic!' }; if (key === 'q_profession') { const _msg = _profReactions[val] || 'Got it!'; setTimeout(function() { showClariPopup('happy', 'clari-pop', _msg, 600); }, 80); } else if (key === 'q_pain') { const _msg = _painReactions[val] || 'I can help with that!'; setTimeout(function() { showClariPopup('excited', 'clari-pop', _msg, 600); }, 80); } else if (key === 'q1') { const _msg = _goalReactions[val] || 'Great choice!'; setTimeout(function() { showClariPopup('excited', 'clari-pop', _msg, 600); }, 80); } else if (key === 'q_tried') { const _triedMsg = val === 'None yet' ? 'No worries — you’re in exactly the right place!' : val === 'ChatGPT' ? 'Nice! ChatGPT is one of the best tools out there!' : 'Great — you already have a head start!'; setTimeout(function() { showClariPopup('excited', 'clari-pop', _triedMsg, 600); }, 80); } else if (key === 'q_worry') { const _worryMsg = val === 'Privacy / data safety' ? 'A very smart concern — we cover this properly!' : val === 'Getting wrong answers' ? 'Smart thinking! We’ll teach you how to check!' : val === 'It being too complicated' ? 'I promise it’s simpler than you think!' : 'Totally valid worry — let’s talk about it!'; setTimeout(function() { showClariPopup('happy', 'clari-pop', _worryMsg, 600); }, 80); } else if (key === 'q4') { setTimeout(function() { showClariPopup('happy', 'clari-pop', 'Consistency is the key to success!', 600); }, 80); } } function surveyNext() { obState.surveyStep++; renderSurveyQuestion(); } function finishSurvey() { // Process answers const sa = obState.surveyAnswers; save('survey_answers', sa); // Set daily goal from Q4 const goalMap = { 'Just 5 minutes (1 lesson)': 1, 'About 10-15 minutes (2 lessons)': 2, 'Half an hour (3 lessons)': 3, 'As much as needed (5 lessons)': 5 }; save('daily_goal', goalMap[sa.q4] || 1); // Pre-render results silently in background renderObResults(); // Show personalised processing screen for ~12 seconds obShowScreen('ob-loading'); startObLoadingSequence(); } function startObLoadingSequence() { const name = S.user_name || ''; const mascotEl = document.getElementById('ob-loading-mascot'); const titleEl = document.getElementById('ob-loading-title'); const barEl = document.getElementById('ob-loading-bar'); if (mascotEl) mascotEl.innerHTML = clariSVG('think', 80); const introMsg = name ? ('Reading your answers, ' + name + '…') : 'Reading your answers…'; if (titleEl) titleEl.textContent = introMsg; const steps = [ { id: 'ob-lstep-0', delay: 0, pct: 8, msg: introMsg, mascot: 'think' }, { id: 'ob-lstep-0', delay: 1200, pct: 22, msg: 'Figuring out your learning style…', mascot: 'think' }, { id: 'ob-lstep-1', delay: 3500, pct: 44, msg: 'Picking your first lessons…', mascot: 'happy' }, { id: 'ob-lstep-2', delay: 6200, pct: 66, msg: 'Matching you with the best AI tools…', mascot: 'happy' }, { id: 'ob-lstep-3', delay: 8800, pct: 86, msg: 'Building your personal plan…', mascot: 'excited' }, { id: null, delay: 11000, pct: 100, msg: name ? ('Almost done, ' + name + '!') : 'Almost done!', mascot: 'celebrating' } ]; steps.forEach(function(step, idx) { setTimeout(function() { if (barEl) barEl.style.width = step.pct + '%'; if (titleEl) titleEl.textContent = step.msg; if (mascotEl) mascotEl.innerHTML = clariSVG(step.mascot, 80); var allStepEls = document.querySelectorAll('.ob-loading-step'); allStepEls.forEach(function(el) { el.classList.remove('active'); }); if (step.id) { var found = false; allStepEls.forEach(function(el) { if (!found && el.id === step.id) { el.classList.remove('done'); el.classList.add('active'); found = true; } else if (!found) { el.classList.remove('active'); el.classList.add('done'); } }); } else { allStepEls.forEach(function(el) { el.classList.remove('active'); el.classList.add('done'); }); } }, step.delay); }); // Reveal results after 12 seconds setTimeout(function() { obShowScreen('ob-results'); }, 12000); } // ============================================================ // OB RESULTS // ============================================================ function scoreTool(tool) { const sa = S.survey_answers || obState.surveyAnswers; let score = 0; const q1Key = Q1_MAP[sa.q1] || 'basics'; const q3 = (sa.q3 || '').toLowerCase(); const sc = tool.scores; if (sc.writing && q1Key === 'writing') score += sc.writing; if (sc.research && q1Key === 'research') score += sc.research; if (sc.work && q1Key === 'work') score += sc.work; if (sc.creative && q1Key === 'creative') score += sc.creative; if (sc.general) score += sc.general; if (sc.phone && q3 === 'phone') score += sc.phone; if (sc.computer && q3 === 'computer') score += sc.computer; if (sc.tablet && q3 === 'tablet') score += sc.tablet; if (sc.information) score += sc.information; if (sc.documents) score += sc.documents; if (sc.patient) score += sc.patient; return score; } function getTopTools(n) { return AI_TOOLS .map(t => ({ ...t, score: scoreTool(t) })) .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score) .slice(0, n); } function toolCardHTML(t) { return `
${toolIcon(t.id)}${t.name}
${t.cost}
${t.why}
    ${t.features.map(f => `
  • ${f}
    • `).join('')}
Try it free →
`; } function getQuickWins() { const sa = S.survey_answers || obState.surveyAnswers; if (!sa) return QUICK_WINS.basics; // Profession takes priority over goal const profKey = PROFESSION_MAP && sa.q_profession ? PROFESSION_MAP[sa.q_profession] : null; const key = profKey || Q1_MAP[sa.q1] || 'basics'; return QUICK_WINS[key] || QUICK_WINS.basics; } function renderObResults() { save('survey_answers', obState.surveyAnswers); const sa = obState.surveyAnswers || {}; const name = S.user_name; // Personalized Clari state based on experience level var _exp = S.experience || ''; var _clariResultState = 'celebrating'; var _encourageMsg = ''; if (_exp === 'none') { _clariResultState = 'encouraging'; _encourageMsg = "Every expert was once a beginner. You're in the right place!"; } else if (_exp === 'heard') { _clariResultState = 'happy'; _encourageMsg = "You're closer than you think. Let's turn curiosity into skill!"; } else if (_exp === 'used') { _clariResultState = 'proud'; _encourageMsg = "You've got a head start. Let's take you from good to great!"; } else { _clariResultState = 'celebrating'; } document.getElementById('ob-results-mascot').innerHTML = clariSVG(_clariResultState, 90); document.getElementById('ob-results-name-msg').textContent = name ? `Great job, ${name}! Based on your answers, here's your personal plan.` : 'Based on your answers, here\'s your personal plan.'; // Learning profile summary card var _expLabels = { none: 'Complete beginner—never tried AI', heard: 'Some awareness—heard of it', used: 'Some experience—used ChatGPT or similar' }; var _expLabel = _expLabels[_exp] || 'Starting fresh'; var _goalLabel = sa.q1 || 'General AI learning'; var _profLabel = sa.q_profession || ''; var _profileCardHTML = `
✨ Your Learning Profile
Experience:${_expLabel}
${_profLabel ? `
Your role:${_profLabel}
` : ''}
Top goal:${_goalLabel}
${_encourageMsg ? `
${_encourageMsg}
` : ''}
`; var _profileCardEl = document.getElementById('ob-results-profile-card'); if (_profileCardEl) _profileCardEl.innerHTML = _profileCardHTML; const topTools = getTopTools(2); const wins = getQuickWins(); const pt = getPersonalityType(); // Profession course highlight map const profCourseMap = { 'Admin & Office Work': { unit: 'Unit 10', title: 'AI for Admin & Office Work', color: '#0ea5e9', desc: 'Built specifically for office and admin workers. Email templates, meeting notes, reports — done in minutes.' }, 'Bookkeeping & Accounts': { unit: 'Unit 11', title: 'AI for Bookkeepers & Accounts', color: '#10b981', desc: 'Built for bookkeepers. Client summaries, payment chasers, and plain-English finance explanations.' }, 'Customer Service': { unit: 'Unit 12', title: 'AI for Customer Service', color: '#f59e0b', desc: 'Built for customer service professionals. Complaint responses, FAQ templates, and follow-ups — without the stress.' } }; const profCourse = profCourseMap[sa.q_profession]; let html = ''; // Show profession-specific course callout first if (profCourse) { html += `
Built For You
${profCourse.title}
${profCourse.desc}
Starts in your course list below →
`; } html += `
${pt.emoji}
${pt.type}
${pt.desc}
${pt.tags.map(t=>`${t}`).join('')}
Your Best AI Matches
${topTools.map(toolCardHTML).join('')}
Your Quick Wins — Try These Today!
${wins.map((w, i) => `
${i+1}
${w}
`).join('')}
`; document.getElementById('ob-results-content').innerHTML = html; } // ============================================================ // PERSONALITY TYPE SYSTEM // ============================================================ function getPersonalityType() { const sa = S.survey_answers || obState.surveyAnswers || {}; const profession = sa.q_profession || ''; const goal = Q1_MAP ? (Q1_MAP[sa.q1] || '') : ''; const exp = S.experience || sa.q_exp || ''; const pain = sa.q_pain || ''; // Profession-specific types take highest priority if (profession === 'Admin & Office Work') { return { type: 'The Office Efficiency Expert', emoji: "", desc: 'You spend hours on emails, reports, and admin that AI can handle in minutes.
