Your lessons are built specifically for office and admin work.', tags: ['Faster emails', 'Meeting notes', 'Reports in minutes'] }; } if (profession === 'Bookkeeping & Accounts') { return { type: 'The Numbers Communicator', emoji: "", desc: 'You know the numbers — now AI helps you explain them clearly, chase payments professionally, and send client summaries in minutes.', tags: ['Client summaries', 'Payment chasers', 'Plain-English finance'] }; } if (profession === 'Customer Service') { return { type: 'The Customer Champion', emoji: "", desc: 'You handle complaints, questions, and follow-ups all day. AI keeps your responses consistent, professional, and fast — even on your toughest days.', tags: ['Complaint responses', 'FAQ templates', 'Follow-ups'] }; } if (profession === 'Healthcare / Nursing') { return { type: 'The Care Professional', emoji: "", desc: 'You\'re in one of the most important jobs there is. AI helps with documentation, explaining complex information simply, and keeping up with research.', tags: ['Patient notes', 'Plain-English explanations', 'Research summaries'] }; } if (profession === 'Small Business Owner') { return { type: 'The Business Builder', emoji: "️", desc: 'Running a business means wearing every hat. AI helps you write like a pro, market yourself confidently, and reclaim hours from admin.', tags: ['Marketing copy', 'Professional emails', 'Save hours daily'] }; } if (profession === 'Teaching & Education') { return { type: 'The Classroom Innovator', emoji: "", desc: 'AI is your new teaching assistant — for lesson planning, feedback, parent communication, and making complex ideas simple.', tags: ['Lesson planning', 'Student feedback', 'Parent emails'] }; } if (profession === 'Real Estate') { return { type: 'The Property Pro', emoji: "", desc: 'Property descriptions, client emails, market reports — AI handles the writing so you can focus on the deals.', tags: ['Property listings', 'Client communication', 'Market summaries'] }; } if (profession === 'Retired & Exploring') { return { type: 'The Curious Explorer', emoji: "", desc: 'You\'ve got the time and the curiosity — now you get to discover what AI can actually do for your life. No pressure, no jargon.', tags: ['No jargon', 'Go at your pace', 'Practical & fun'] }; } // Fall back to goal-based types if (goal === 'creative') { return { type: 'The Creative', emoji: "", desc: 'You see AI as a creative partner — for writing, images, and bringing ideas to life.', tags: ['AI images', 'Creative writing', 'Idea generation'] }; } if (goal === 'research') { return { type: 'The Researcher', emoji: "", desc: 'You want accurate, sourced information fast. AI helps you go deeper on any topic.', tags: ['Fast research', 'Fact checking', 'Cited sources'] }; } if (exp === 'none' || exp === 'heard') { return { type: 'The Curious Beginner', emoji: "", desc: 'You\'re starting fresh — and that\'s perfect. No jargon, no pressure, just you and Clari.', tags: ['No jargon', 'Go at your pace', 'Real examples'] }; } return { type: 'The Time-Saving Professional', emoji: "️", desc: 'You want AI to handle the repetitive work so you can focus on what only you can do.', tags: ['Save hours', 'Better emails', 'Work faster'] }; } // ============================================================ // PROFILE MODAL // ============================================================ function openProfileModal() { const p = S.user_profile || {}; const pt = getPersonalityType(); const html = `
Your Profile
${pt.emoji}
${pt.type}
${pt.desc}
${pt.tags.map(t=>`${t}`).join('')}
`; document.body.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', html); } function closeProfileModal() { const el = document.getElementById('profile-modal-overlay'); if (el) el.remove(); } function saveProfileModal() { const name = document.getElementById('pf-name').value.trim(); const goal = document.getElementById('pf-goal').value; const role = document.getElementById('pf-role').value; if (name) save('user_name', name); const p = S.user_profile || {}; p.role = role; p.primaryGoal = goal; save('user_profile', p); closeProfileModal(); renderLearnTab(); showToast('Profile updated!', 'success', 2500); } // ============================================================ // PROMPT GRADER // ============================================================ function gradePrompt() { const input = document.getElementById('pg-input'); const text = (input ? input.value : '').trim(); if (!text || text.length < 5) return; const lower = text.toLowerCase(); const words = text.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean); let score = 0; const good = [], improve = []; // 1. Length if (words.length >= 25) { score += 20; good.push(" Great length — enough detail for AI to work with"); } else if (words.length >= 12) { score += 12; good.push(" Decent length"); improve.push(" Add more detail — who is this for? What format do you want?"); } else { score += 4; improve.push(" Too short — AI needs more context to give a useful answer"); } // 2. Role / persona if (/\byou are\b|\bact as\b|\bas a\b|\byou're a\b/.test(lower)) { score += 20; good.push(" Role prompting detected — this focuses AI like an expert"); } else { improve.push(" Try starting with \"You are a [expert]...\" to get specialist-level answers"); } // 3. Format request if (/\btable\b|\bbullet\b|\blist\b|\bnumbered\b|\bstep\b|\bformat\b|\bpoints\b|\bsummary\b|\bparagraph\b/.test(lower)) { score += 15; good.push(" Format specified — AI will structure the output exactly how you need it"); } else { improve.push(" Specify a format: \"Give me this as bullet points\" or \"Format as a table\""); } // 4. Audience / context if (/\bfor\b.{2,30}\b(age|year|old|profession|audience|student|beginner|expert|colleague|client|customer)\b|\bmy\b|\bi am\b|\bi'm\b|\bwe are\b/.test(lower)) { score += 15; good.push(" Context provided — AI knows who this is for"); } else { improve.push(" Tell AI who this is for: \"for a 10-year-old\" or \"for a business client\""); } // 5. Specific goal if (/\bhelp me\b|\bi need\b|\bwrite\b|\bcreate\b|\bexplain\b|\banalyse\b|\banalyze\b|\bsummarise\b|\bsummarize\b|\bdraft\b|\bgenerate\b|\breview\b|\bimprove\b|\bsuggest\b/.test(lower)) { score += 15; good.push(" Clear goal — AI knows exactly what you want"); } else { improve.push(" State your goal clearly: \"Write me...\", \"Explain...\", \"Create a...\""); } // 6. Tone if (/\btone\b|\bformal\b|\bcasual\b|\bfriendly\b|\bprofessional\b|\bhumorous\b|\bserious\b|\bwarm\b|\bempathetic\b/.test(lower)) { score += 15; good.push(" Tone specified — output will match your voice"); } score = Math.min(100, score); let grade, gradeColor, gradeBg, gradeMsg; if (score >= 90) { grade='A+'; gradeColor='#166534'; gradeBg='#dcfce7'; gradeMsg='Outstanding prompt! You\'re thinking like a power user.'; } else if (score >= 75) { grade='A'; gradeColor='#15803d'; gradeBg='#f0fdf4'; gradeMsg='Excellent prompt — you\'ll get a great response from this.'; } else if (score >= 60) { grade='B'; gradeColor='#1d4ed8'; gradeBg='#eff6ff'; gradeMsg='Good prompt. A few tweaks would make it great.'; } else if (score >= 45) { grade='C'; gradeColor='#d97706'; gradeBg='#fffbeb'; gradeMsg='Decent start — but AI could use more to work with.'; } else { grade='D'; gradeColor='#dc2626'; gradeBg='#fef2f2'; gradeMsg='AI will give a generic answer. Try adding more detail.'; } const tipsHtml = [ ...good.map(t=>`
${t}
`), ...improve.map(t=>`
${t}
`) ].join(''); const resultEl = document.getElementById('pg-result'); resultEl.style.display = 'block'; resultEl.innerHTML = `
${grade}
${score}%
${gradeMsg}
Prompt score: ${score}/100
${tipsHtml}
`; document.getElementById('pg-btn').style.display = 'none'; } function resetPromptGrader() { document.getElementById('pg-input').value = ''; document.getElementById('pg-result').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('pg-btn').style.display = 'block'; document.getElementById('pg-input').focus(); } function obStartTrial() { finishOnboarding(); setTimeout(() => openPremiumModal(), 400); } function finishOnboarding() { save('onboarded', true); const sa = obState.surveyAnswers || S.survey_answers || {}; save('survey_answers', sa); // Synthesise user_profile from survey answers const profile = { profession: sa.q_profession || null, painPoint: sa.q_pain || null, primaryGoal: Q1_MAP[sa.q1] || null, device: sa.q3 || null, profCategory: PROFESSION_MAP[sa.q_profession] || null, role: '' }; save('user_profile', profile); save('achievements', [...(S.achievements || []), ...((S.achievements || []).includes('plan_done') ? [] : ['plan_done'])]); checkAchievements(); showMainUI(); document.querySelectorAll('.view').forEach(v => v.classList.remove('active')); document.getElementById('view-learn').classList.add('active'); document.getElementById('nav-learn').classList.add('active'); renderLearnTab(); } // ============================================================ // LEARN TAB // ============================================================ function renderLearnTab() { // learn-08: confetti burst if user just completed a lesson (within 5 min, once per session) if (!_learnTabConfettiFired) { var _lcAt = S.last_completed_at || 0; var _lcElapsed = Date.now() - Number(_lcAt); if (_lcElapsed >= 0 && _lcElapsed < 5 * 60 * 1000) { _learnTabConfettiFired = true; setTimeout(fireLearnTabConfetti, 350); } } const name = S.user_name; const greeting = getTimeGreeting(); document.getElementById('learn-greeting').textContent = greeting + (name ? ', ' + name + '!' : '!'); const subs = [ 'Ready to learn something cool?', "Let's figure out this AI thing together.", 'Your lessons are right here when you are.', 'Pick up where you left off — no rush.' ]; document.getElementById('learn-sub').textContent = subs[new Date().getDay() % subs.length]; // Daily goal const today = todayStr(); if (S.goal_date !== today) { save('goal_date', today); save('goal_today', 0); } const goalDone = S.goal_today || 0; const goalTarget = S.daily_goal || 1; const goalPct = Math.min(100, (goalDone / goalTarget) * 100); document.getElementById('daily-goal-label-text').textContent = 'Daily Goal'; document.getElementById('daily-goal-count').textContent = `${goalDone} / ${goalTarget} lesson${goalTarget !== 1 ? 's' : ''}`; document.getElementById('daily-goal-fill').style.width = goalPct + '%'; // Hearts refilled badge const _heartsRefillEl = document.getElementById('hearts-refilled-badge'); if (_heartsRefillEl) { _heartsRefillEl.style.display = (S.hearts === 5 && S.last_welcome_date === todayStr() && S.streak > 0) ? 'inline-flex' : 'none'; } // -- Continue pill -- let nextLesson = null; for (const unit of COURSE) { for (const l of unit.lessons) { if (!S.completed.includes(l.id) && (l.free || S.premium)) { nextLesson = { lesson: l, unit }; break; } } if (nextLesson) break; } // -- Streak warning -- const todayDate = todayStr(); const streakAtRisk = S.streak > 0 && S.streak_date !== todayDate; // -- Goal progress -- const goalMet = goalDone >= goalTarget; // Render units let html = ''; // Bookmarks strip var _bkIds = S.bookmarks || []; if (_bkIds.length > 0) { var _bmLessons = []; for (var _bui = 0; _bui < COURSE.length; _bui++) { var _bunit = COURSE[_bui]; for (var _bli = 0; _bli < _bunit.lessons.length; _bli++) { var _bls = _bunit.lessons[_bli]; if (_bkIds.indexOf(_bls.id) > -1) _bmLessons.push({lesson:_bls,unit:_bunit}); } } if (_bmLessons.length > 0) { var _chips = _bmLessons.map(function(item) { var _lk = !item.lesson.free && !S.premium; return '
' + '★' + escHtml(item.lesson.title) + '✕' + '
'; }).join(''); html += '
★ Saved Lessons
' + _chips + '
'; } } // Enhanced Continue Card — PRIMARY CTA (first) if (nextLesson) { const { lesson: _cl, unit: _cu } = nextLesson; const _levelXp = (S.xp || 0) % 100; const _curLevel = xpToLevel(S.xp || 0); const _mins = estimateLessonMinutes(_cl); html += `
Unit ${_cu.num}: ${_cu.title}
${_cl.title}
~${_mins} min • +${_cl.xp} XP
Level ${_curLevel} → ${_curLevel + 1}
${_levelXp}/100 XP
Continue →
`; } // Goal bar — directly below continue card html += '
' + '' + (goalMet ? ICONS.target : ICONS.book) + '' + '
' + (goalMet ? 'Daily goal complete!' : 'Daily goal') + '
' + '
' + '
' + goalDone + '/' + goalTarget + '
' + '
'; // Streak warning — urgency after goal if (streakAtRisk) { html += '
' + '' + ICONS.fire + '' + '
Your ' + S.streak + '-day streak is at risk! Do a lesson today to keep it alive.
' + '
'; } // Clari welcome banner — social/motivational const _tod = (function() { const h = new Date().getHours(); if (h >= 5 && h < 12) return { state: 'waving', greeting: 'Good morning', emoji: '\u2600\uFE0F' }; if (h >= 12 && h < 17) return { state: 'happy', greeting: 'Good afternoon', emoji: '\u26C5' }; if (h >= 17 && h < 21) return { state: 'excited', greeting: 'Good evening', emoji: '\uD83C\uDF1F' }; return { state: 'think', greeting: 'Still up?', emoji: '\uD83C\uDF19' }; })(); // Clari mood: session streak overrides all; otherwise use daily streak thresholds const _clariWelcomeState = (function() { var _sesLs = S.session_lesson_streak || 0; if (_sesLs >= 3) return 'star'; var _st = S.streak || 0; if (_st >= 7) return 'excited'; if (_st >= 3) return 'happy'; if (_st === 0) return 'encouraging'; return _tod.state; // streak 1-2: keep time-of-day expression })(); const _name = S.user_name ? (', ' + S.user_name) : ''; // Did You Know fact card var _dyk = DID_YOU_KNOW[Math.floor(Math.random() * DID_YOU_KNOW.length)]; html += '
💡 Did you know?' + _dyk + '
'; // Recommended Next — 1-2 next-in-order incomplete lessons (function() { var _recNext = []; for (var _rui = 0; _rui < COURSE.length && _recNext.length < 2; _rui++) { var _ru = COURSE[_rui]; for (var _rli = 0; _rli < _ru.lessons.length && _recNext.length < 2; _rli++) { var _rl = _ru.lessons[_rli]; if (!S.completed.includes(_rl.id) && (_rl.free || S.premium)) { _recNext.push({ lesson: _rl, unit: _ru }); } } } if (_recNext.length > 0) { var _rnCards = _recNext.map(function(item) { return '
' + '
' + '
Unit ' + item.unit.num + ': ' + escHtml(item.unit.title) + '
' + '
' + escHtml(item.lesson.title) + '
' + '
' + '+' + item.lesson.xp + ' XP' + 'Start →' + '
'; }).join(''); html += '
▶ Recommended Next
' + _rnCards + '
'; } })(); // Daily XP Goal card (function() { var _dxpGoal = S.daily_xp_goal || 20; var _todayStr = todayStr(); var _xpLog = S.xp_log || []; var _todayEntry = _xpLog.find(function(e) { return e.d === _todayStr; }); var _earnedToday = _todayEntry ? (_todayEntry.xp || 0) : 0; var _dxpPct = Math.min(100, Math.round((_earnedToday / _dxpGoal) * 100)); var _dxpMet = _earnedToday >= _dxpGoal; var _dxpIcon = _dxpMet ? '✅' : '⚡'; html += '
' + '' + _dxpIcon + '' + '
' + '
' + (_dxpMet ? '✓ Daily XP Goal Met!' : 'Daily XP Goal') + '
' + '
' + '
' + '
' + _earnedToday + ' / ' + _dxpGoal + ' XP
' + '
'; })(); // Comeback message after 3+ days away var _lastActive = S.streak_date || S.goal_date; if (_lastActive && (S.completed || []).length > 0) { var _daysSince = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(_lastActive).getTime()) / 86400000); if (_daysSince >= 3 && _daysSince < 60) { var _cbName = S.user_name ? (', ' + S.user_name) : ''; html += '
' + '
👋
' + '
Welcome back' + _cbName + '!
' + '
It’s been ' + _daysSince + ' day' + (_daysSince !== 1 ? 's' : '') + ' — no worries, let’s pick up where you left off!
' + '
'; } } html += `
${clariSVG(_clariWelcomeState, 52)}
${_tod.emoji} ${_tod.greeting}${_name}!
${getClariDailyMessage()}
`; // Recently completed lesson recap card (learn-04) (function() { var _todayD = todayStr(); var _reviews = S.lesson_reviews || {}; var _completed = S.completed || []; // Find most recently completed lesson that was finished today // Walk S.completed in reverse (last added = most recent) var _recapLesson = null; for (var _ri = _completed.length - 1; _ri >= 0; _ri--) { var _rid = _completed[_ri]; var _rev = _reviews[_rid]; if (_rev && _rev.completedAt === _todayD) { // Find lesson object for (var _rui = 0; _rui < COURSE.length; _rui++) { var _runit = COURSE[_rui]; for (var _rli = 0; _rli < _runit.lessons.length; _rli++) { if (_runit.lessons[_rli].id === _rid) { _recapLesson = _runit.lessons[_rli]; break; } } if (_recapLesson) break; } break; } } if (_recapLesson) { html += '
' + '
\u2705
' + '
' + '
Last completed today
' + '
' + escHtml(_recapLesson.title) + '
' + '
Keep it up! \u2b50 +' + (_recapLesson.xp || 0) + ' XP earned
' + '
' + '
'; } })(); html += `
`; // Pro nudge (for free users) — last before units if (!S.premium) { const locked = COURSE.reduce((acc, u) => acc + u.lessons.filter(l => !l.free).length, 0); html += `
⭐
Unlock ${locked} more lessons — 7 days free
No card needed · Cancel anytime · Everything included
›
`; } // Prompt grader card — tool, right before unit list html += `
Grade My Prompt
Type any AI prompt below — Clari will score it and show you how to improve it.
`; // Recommended strip if (S.user_profile) { html += buildRecommendedStrip(3); } // Search bar + filter tags (difficulty chips + text search + topic tags) var _dcAll = learnDiffFilter === '' ? 'active' : ''; var _dcEasy = learnDiffFilter === 'easy' ? 'active' : ''; var _dcMod = learnDiffFilter === 'moderate' ? 'active' : ''; var _dcHard = learnDiffFilter === 'challenging' ? 'active' : ''; html += `
All
Easy
Moderate
Challenging
★ Bookmarks
⏱ Quick
${learnSearchQuery ? `` : ''}
All
${LEARN_FILTER_TAGS.map(f => `
${f.label}
` ).join('')}
`; // Sort units by average relevance score (descending), keeping original order for ties const sortedCourse = S.user_profile ? [...COURSE].sort((a, b) => { const avgA = a.lessons.reduce((s, l) => s + scoreLessonRelevance(l), 0) / (a.lessons.length || 1); const avgB = b.lessons.reduce((s, l) => s + scoreLessonRelevance(l), 0) / (b.lessons.length || 1); return avgB - avgA; }) : COURSE; const activeSearch = learnSearchQuery.trim() || learnFilterTag || learnDiffFilter || learnBookmarkFilter || learnQuickFilter; let totalMatches = 0; // Group units by track const trackGroups = new Map(); for (const unit of sortedCourse) { const track = getTrackForUnit(unit.num); const tid = track ? track.id : '__other__'; if (!trackGroups.has(tid)) trackGroups.set(tid, []); trackGroups.get(tid).push(unit); } const trackCollapsed = S.track_collapsed || {}; const renderOrder = [...TRACKS.map(t => t.id), '__other__']; for (const tid of renderOrder) { if (!trackGroups.has(tid)) continue; const units = trackGroups.get(tid); const track = TRACKS.find(t => t.id === tid); if (track) { html += renderTrackHeader(track); } if (trackCollapsed[tid]) continue; for (const unit of units) { const unitLessons = unit.lessons; // Filter lessons if search is active var _filteredLessons = activeSearch ? unitLessons.filter(l => lessonMatchesSearch(l, learnSearchQuery, learnFilterTag)) : unitLessons; // Sort filtered lessons per learnSortMode var visibleLessons = _filteredLessons.slice(); if (learnSortMode === 'xp-desc') { visibleLessons.sort(function(a, b) { return (b.xp || 0) - (a.xp || 0); }); } else if (learnSortMode === 'easy-first') { var _diffOrder = { easy: 0, moderate: 1, challenging: 2 }; visibleLessons.sort(function(a, b) { return (_diffOrder[getLessonDifficulty(a)] || 1) - (_diffOrder[getLessonDifficulty(b)] || 1); }); } else if (learnSortMode === 'hard-first') { var _diffOrderH = { easy: 0, moderate: 1, challenging: 2 }; visibleLessons.sort(function(a, b) { return (_diffOrderH[getLessonDifficulty(b)] || 1) - (_diffOrderH[getLessonDifficulty(a)] || 1); }); } if (activeSearch && visibleLessons.length === 0) continue; totalMatches += visibleLessons.length; const doneCount = unitLessons.filter(l => S.completed.includes(l.id)).length; const ringPct = unitLessons.length ? doneCount / unitLessons.length : 0; html += `
${unit.num}
Unit ${unit.num} · ${unit.title}
${doneCount}/${unitLessons.length} done
${(function(){ var _remXp = unitLessons.filter(function(l){ return !S.completed.includes(l.id); }).reduce(function(s,l){ return s+(l.xp||0); },0); return _remXp > 0 ? '
' + _remXp + ' XP remaining in this unit
' : ''; })()}
${smallRingHTML(ringPct, unit.color)}
`; visibleLessons.forEach(lesson => { const done = S.completed.includes(lesson.id); const locked = !lesson.free && !S.premium; // learn-12: NEW badge logic var _isNew = (!done && LESSONS.indexOf(lesson) >= LESSONS.length - 3); if (!_isNew && lesson.addedDate) { var _addedMs = new Date(lesson.addedDate).getTime(); _isNew = !done && !isNaN(_addedMs) && (Date.now() - _addedMs) < 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000; } var _newBadge = _isNew ? 'NEW' : ''; let badgeHtml = ''; if (done) badgeHtml = 'Done'; else if (locked) badgeHtml = 'Plus'; else if (lesson.free) badgeHtml = 'Free'; let diffBadge = ''; if (!done && !locked) { if (S.tech_comfort === 'basic' && unit.num <= 2) { diffBadge = 'Beginner Friendly'; } else if (S.tech_comfort === 'savvy' && unit.num >= 3) { diffBadge = 'Advanced'; } if (S.user_profile && scoreLessonRelevance(lesson) >= 3) { diffBadge += 'For You'; } // Difficulty badge based on XP value const _xpVal = lesson.xp || 0; if (_xpVal <= 15) { diffBadge += 'Easy'; } else if (_xpVal <= 25) { diffBadge += 'Medium'; } else { diffBadge += 'Hard'; } } let iconBg = unit.color + '22'; let iconContent = lessonIconSVG(unit.color); var _lessonTags = lesson.tags || []; var _tagsHtml = ''; if (_lessonTags.length > 0 && !done) { var _tPills = _lessonTags.slice(0, 3).map(function(t) { return '' + escHtml(t) + ''; }).join(''); _tagsHtml = '
' + _tPills + '
'; } let starsHtml = ''; if (done) { starsHtml = '
' + '
'.repeat(3) + '
'; } // Rating stars (learn-06): show saved 1-5 star rating inline var _savedRating = ((S.lesson_ratings || {})[lesson.id]) || 0; var _ratingStarsHtml = ''; if (done && _savedRating > 0) { var _rStars = ''; for (var _ri5 = 1; _ri5 <= 5; _ri5++) { _rStars += _ri5 <= _savedRating ? '★' : '☆'; } _ratingStarsHtml = '' + _rStars + ''; } // learn-14: completed-date label var _completedDateHtml = ''; if (done) { var _lldTs = (S.lesson_log_dates || {})[lesson.id]; if (_lldTs) { var _lldDays = Math.floor((Date.now() - Number(_lldTs)) / 86400000); var _lldLabel; if (_lldDays === 0) { _lldLabel = 'today'; } else if (_lldDays === 1) { _lldLabel = 'yesterday'; } else if (_lldDays < 14) { _lldLabel = _lldDays + ' days ago'; } else { _lldLabel = Math.floor(_lldDays / 7) + ' weeks ago'; } _completedDateHtml = '✓ Completed ' + _lldLabel + ''; } } const _reviewEntry = (S.lesson_reviews || {})[lesson.id]; const _reviewDue = _reviewEntry && _reviewEntry.nextDue <= todayStr(); // Note indicator const _noteText = (S.lesson_notes || {})[lesson.id] || ''; const _notePreview = _noteText.trim().slice(0, 60) + (_noteText.trim().length > 60 ? '…' : ''); const _noteHtml = _noteText.trim() ? `📝${_notePreview.replace(//g,'>')}` : ''; // learn-11: play button title reflects completion state var _playTitle = done ? 'Review lesson' : 'Start lesson'; var _playStroke = done ? 'var(--green)' : 'var(--clari-blue)'; var _playHint = locked ? '' : ''; html += `
${_newBadge}
${iconContent}
${lesson.title}
~${estimateLessonMinutes(lesson)} min • +${lesson.xp} XP${diffBadge}${_ratingStarsHtml} • ${(lesson.slides||[]).length} slide${(lesson.slides||[]).length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}
${starsHtml}${_tagsHtml} ${_completedDateHtml}
${locked ? `` : _reviewDue ? `${badgeHtml}` : badgeHtml}
${_playHint}Bookmarked${_noteHtml}${(function(){ var _d = (lesson.slides&&lesson.slides[0]) ? (lesson.slides[0].text||lesson.slides[0].title||'') : ''; if (!_d) return ''; var _open = learnExpandedCards[lesson.id] ? 'block' : 'none'; return '
' + escHtml(_d.slice(0,200)) + (_d.length>200?'…':'') + '
'; })()}`; }); // Motivational nudge (learn-07) — show when unit is not complete and not searching if (!activeSearch) { var _unitRemainingCount = unitLessons.filter(function(l) { return !S.completed.includes(l.id); }).length; if (_unitRemainingCount === 1) { html += '
Almost there! 1 lesson to go 🎯
'; } else if (_unitRemainingCount >= 2 && _unitRemainingCount <= 3) { html += '
Keep going! ' + _unitRemainingCount + ' lessons to go 💪
'; } } // Unit complete banner — shown only if every lesson in the unit is done var _unitAllDone = unitLessons.length > 0 && unitLessons.every(function(l) { return S.completed.includes(l.id); }); if (_unitAllDone && !activeSearch) { // learn-18: fire one-time Clari celebration popup when unit is JUST completed var _unitCompleted = S.unit_completed || {}; if (!_unitCompleted[unit.num]) { _unitCompleted[unit.num] = true; save('unit_completed', _unitCompleted); (function(_uNum, _uTitle) { setTimeout(function() { showClariPopup('star', 'clari-tada', 'You finished Unit ' + _uNum + '! Amazing work!', 3000); }, 300); })(unit.num, unit.title); } var _unitTotalXP = unitLessons.reduce(function(sum, l) { return sum + (l.xp || 0); }, 0); html += '
' + '
⭐
' + '
' + '
Unit ' + unit.num + ' Complete!
' + '
' + unit.title + ' — all lessons done
' + '
' + '
+' + _unitTotalXP + ' XP
' + '
'; } html += '
'; } } // learn-13: empty state with Clari mascot when search/filter returns zero lessons if (activeSearch && totalMatches === 0) { html += '
' + '
' + clariSVG('happy', 60) + '
' + '
No lessons found
' + '
Try a different word or clear the filters.
' + '' + '
'; } document.getElementById('units-container').innerHTML = html; renderDailyTip(); renderWeeklyChallengeBanner(); // learn-17: attach swipe-to-bookmark touch listeners to each .lesson-row (function() { var _rows = document.querySelectorAll('.lesson-row'); _rows.forEach(function(row) { var _tx = 0, _ty = 0; row.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e) { var t = e.changedTouches[0]; _tx = t.clientX; _ty = t.clientY; }, { passive: true }); row.addEventListener('touchend', function(e) { var t = e.changedTouches[0]; var dx = t.clientX - _tx; var dy = Math.abs(t.clientY - _ty); if (dx >= 60 && dy < 40) { // Find the lesson id from the bookmark button inside this row var _bBtn = row.parentElement && row.parentElement.querySelector ? row.parentElement.querySelector('.lesson-bookmark-btn') : null; if (!_bBtn) _bBtn = row.nextElementSibling; // Fallback: extract id from onclick on the row itself var _rowOnclick = row.getAttribute('onclick') || ''; var _idMatch = _rowOnclick.match(/startLesson\('([^']+)'\)/); if (_idMatch && _idMatch[1]) { var _lid = _idMatch[1]; toggleBookmark(_lid); row.classList.add('swipe-bookmark-flash'); setTimeout(function() { row.classList.remove('swipe-bookmark-flash'); }, 300); } } }, { passive: true }); }); })(); // Show unit jump FAB const fab = document.getElementById('unit-jump-fab'); if (fab) fab.style.display = 'flex'; } // ============================================================ // LESSON TIME ESTIMATE // ============================================================ function estimateLessonMinutes(lesson) { const timePerType = { info:45, quiz:30, tap_correct:30, fill_blank:30, match_pairs:30, sim_chat:40, scenario:50, quick_fire:35, clari_react:10 }; const secs = lesson.slides.reduce(function(t, s) { return t + (timePerType[s.type] || 30); }, 0); return Math.max(1, Math.round(secs / 60)); } // ============================================================ // LESSON RELEVANCE SCORING // ============================================================ function scoreLessonRelevance(lesson) { const tags = lesson.tags || []; const p = S.user_profile || {}; let score = 0; if (p.role) { const roleTag = p.role.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '').replace('workingprofessional','professional').replace('businessowner','business').replace('justexploring','exploring'); if (tags.includes(roleTag)) score += 3; } if (p.primaryGoal && tags.includes(p.primaryGoal)) score += 2; if (p.industry && tags.includes(p.industry.toLowerCase())) score += 2; if (p.studyFocus && tags.some(t => p.studyFocus.toLowerCase().includes(t))) score += 1; return score; } function buildRecommendedStrip(n) { // Gather all non-completed lessons, scored const candidates = []; for (const unit of COURSE) { for (const lesson of unit.lessons) { if (!S.completed.includes(lesson.id)) { candidates.push({ lesson, unit, score: scoreLessonRelevance(lesson) }); } } } candidates.sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score); const top = candidates.slice(0, n).filter(c => c.score > 0); if (!top.length) return ''; let cards = top.map(({ lesson, unit }) => { const locked = !lesson.free && !S.premium; return `
Unit ${unit.num}
${lesson.title}
${lesson.slides.length} slides • +${lesson.xp} XP
${locked ? 'Plus' : 'For You'}
`; }).join(''); return `
✨ Recommended for You
${cards}
`; } function smallRingHTML(pct, color) { const size = 36, r = 14, circ = 2 * Math.PI * r; const dash = circ * pct; return ``; } function lessonIconSVG(color) { return ``; } // ============================================================ // LESSON ENGINE // ============================================================ let lessonState = { lessonId: null, slideIdx: 0, sessionSlides: null, hearts: 5, wrongThisLesson: 0, xpEarned: 0, gemsEarned: 0, slideAnswered: false, practiceMode: false, practiceType: null, practiceQuestions: [], practiceIdx: 0, practiceScore: 0, timedInterval: null, timedSeconds: 60, matchSelected: null, matchLeftDone: new Set(), matchRightDone: new Set(), matchPairs: [], fillBlanks: [], fillBankUsed: [], tapSelected: new Set(), matchRightOrder: [], correctStreak: 0 }; const LESSON_POOLS = { 'u1l1': [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'Tom asks: "Does AI search the internet every time I ask it something?" What is the correct answer?', options: ['Yes, it searches in real time like Google', 'No — AI generates answers from patterns it learned during training, not live searches', 'Yes, but only for recent questions', 'No — AI gets answers from a secret database'], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI generates language based on training data, not live searches. This is why it can give confident-sounding answers about things that changed after its training cutoff.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Rachel uses AI to write a birthday card. She notices the AI created something new — it wasn\'t copied from anywhere. Why is this possible?', options: ['AI remembered a card from its training data and repeated it', 'AI generates new text by predicting what words fit together based on patterns it learned', 'AI copied it from another user\'s conversation', 'AI downloaded the card from a greeting card website'], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI generates original text every time — it predicts the most fitting words based on billions of examples it learned from, but the output is freshly composed.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'AI learns from ___ data to generate responses. It does not ___ the internet in real time.', blanks: ['training', 'search'], wordBank: ['training', 'search', 'copy', 'millions of', 'scan'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'A language model ___ new text each time. It is not a ___ engine like Google.', blanks: ['generates', 'search'], wordBank: ['generates', 'search', 'copies', 'database', 'cloud'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap every statement that correctly describes how AI assistants work:', items: [ { text: 'AI generates responses based on patterns from training data', correct: true }, { text: 'AI searches the live internet for every answer', correct: false }, { text: 'AI can produce text it has never seen word-for-word before', correct: true }, { text: 'AI memorises exact conversations to reuse later', correct: false }, { text: 'AI may state incorrect facts with full confidence', correct: true }, { text: 'AI always knows what happened yesterday', correct: false } ]}, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Which of these are TRUE about AI language models?', items: [ { text: 'They were trained on large amounts of text data', correct: true }, { text: 'They have a knowledge cutoff date', correct: true }, { text: 'They can update their own knowledge automatically', correct: false }, { text: 'They can generate writing in different styles', correct: true }, { text: 'They never make factual mistakes', correct: false } ]}, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'What do we call it when an AI states something false as if it were fact?', placeholder: 'Type the term...', answers: ['hallucination', 'hallucinating'], hint: 'It starts with H — like seeing something that isn\'t there...' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'David asks AI about AI', prompt: 'David, 62, has never used AI before. He asks his grandson: "Is it just a search engine with a chat window?" His grandson isn\'t sure how to explain it. Which answer is most accurate?', options: ['Yes — it\'s Google but with a text box', 'No — it generates brand-new responses from patterns it learned, rather than finding existing web pages', 'Yes — it searches the web and summarises the results', 'No — it downloads answers from a central AI database'], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI generates text — it doesn\'t retrieve pages. Search engines find existing content; AI creates new content based on learned patterns.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Maria asks AI to explain something, and the AI gives a confident but completely wrong answer. What explains this?', options: ['The AI misheard the question', 'AI can generate plausible-sounding but inaccurate text — called a hallucination', 'The internet was down during the response', 'Maria typed the question wrong'], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI doesn\'t "know" — it predicts. Sometimes the most statistically likely output is wrong. Always verify important facts from a trusted source.' } ], 'u1l2': [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'James wants to know the current price of a specific medication. Should he ask AI or use Google?', options: ['AI — it always has the latest prices', 'Google — medication prices change and AI may have outdated information', 'Either — they give the same result', 'Neither — only a pharmacist knows'], answer: 1, explanation: 'For real-time information like prices, stock levels, or today\'s news, Google finds current web pages. AI may be months or years out of date.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Grace needs to understand how photosynthesis works for her grandchild\'s homework. Which tool gives the most useful response?', options: ['Google — it gives 10 links to read', 'AI — it explains the concept clearly and directly in plain English', 'Neither — she should use an encyclopaedia', 'Both give identical results'], answer: 1, explanation: 'For explaining concepts and ideas that don\'t change, AI is faster and more readable. It gives a direct, tailored explanation rather than a list of links to scan.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'Use ___ when you need live information. Use AI when you need something ___ or created fresh.', blanks: ['Google', 'explained'], wordBank: ['Google', 'explained', 'AI', 'searched', 'verified'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'AI ___ an answer from scratch. Google ___ for pages that already exist.', blanks: ['writes', 'searches'], wordBank: ['writes', 'searches', 'downloads', 'creates', 'finds'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Which tasks are better suited to AI than Google?', items: [ { text: 'Explaining a complex medical term in simple language', correct: true }, { text: 'Finding today\'s weather forecast', correct: false }, { text: 'Writing a personalised thank-you note', correct: true }, { text: 'Checking if a local restaurant is still open', correct: false }, { text: 'Summarising a long document you paste in', correct: true }, { text: 'Finding a specific news article from yesterday', correct: false } ]}, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap the tasks where Google is the smarter choice:', items: [ { text: 'Finding a live train time', correct: true }, { text: 'Getting a recipe adapted for dietary needs', correct: false }, { text: 'Checking if a product is in stock right now', correct: true }, { text: 'Getting today\'s currency exchange rate', correct: true }, { text: 'Drafting an email to your manager', correct: false }, { text: 'Looking up a local business phone number', correct: true } ]}, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'What is the name for the text you type to give AI a task or question?', placeholder: 'Type the word...', answers: ['prompt', 'query', 'input'], hint: 'It\'s the instruction you give AI — starts with P...' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'Carlos chooses his tool', prompt: 'Carlos needs to: (1) find out his council\'s bin collection day, and (2) write a letter to the council about a missed collection. Which tools should he use?', options: ['Google for both tasks', 'AI for both tasks', 'Google to find the bin day (real-time local info), AI to write the letter', 'He should phone the council for both'], answer: 2, explanation: 'Real-time local information is best found via Google (or the council website). Drafting a clear, professional letter is exactly what AI is brilliant at.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Sue is researching a historical event for her book club. Which tool is more useful?', options: ['Google — historical events are recent', 'AI — historical facts don\'t change, so AI can explain them clearly and conversationally', 'Neither — she should use a library', 'Both are equally useless for this'], answer: 1, explanation: 'Historical facts are stable — they won\'t have changed since AI\'s training cutoff. AI can give a clear, readable overview in plain English, which is much easier than scanning 10 Google links.' } ], 'u1l3': [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'Ahmed types: "email". He gets a generic response. What went wrong?', options: ['AI doesn\'t know how to write emails', 'The prompt was too vague — no context, format, or purpose was given', 'AI needs to be updated before it can write emails', 'He should have used Google instead'], answer: 1, explanation: 'The more context and detail you give AI, the better the output. "Email" tells AI nothing about who it\'s for, why it\'s being sent, what tone to use, or how long it should be.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Claire wants AI to write a firm but polite letter to her landlord about a repair. Which prompt works best?', options: ['"Write a letter"', '"Write a firm but polite letter to my landlord asking them to fix a broken boiler that has been unrepaired for 3 weeks. Tone: professional but urgent."', '"Write something about my landlord"', '"Letter about boiler"'], answer: 1, explanation: 'The best prompts include: who you\'re writing to, why, the tone you want, and key facts. The more context you give, the less editing the AI output needs.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'A strong prompt includes a ___, context about who it\'s for, the ___ you want, and the format.', blanks: ['topic', 'tone'], wordBank: ['topic', 'tone', 'format', 'length', 'colour'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'Adding ___ to your prompt — like the purpose and the audience — gives AI what it needs to write something ___', blanks: ['context', 'useful'], wordBank: ['context', 'useful', 'keywords', 'better', 'longer'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap all the elements that make a prompt stronger:', items: [ { text: 'Specifying who the writing is for', correct: true }, { text: 'Asking for a specific format (list, email, bullet points)', correct: true }, { text: 'Keeping the prompt as short as possible', correct: false }, { text: 'Including the tone you want (formal, friendly, urgent)', correct: true }, { text: 'Giving background context about the situation', correct: true }, { text: 'Using all capitals so AI understands it\'s important', correct: false } ]}, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Which of these are signs of a WEAK prompt?', items: [ { text: '"Email"', correct: true }, { text: '"Write a thank-you email to my client Sarah who just placed her first order"', correct: false }, { text: '"Help"', correct: true }, { text: '"Explain this for someone who has never used a computer before"', correct: false }, { text: '"Letter about the meeting"', correct: true }, { text: '"Make it sound professional and keep it under 100 words"', correct: false } ]}, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'What is the word for the background information you include in a prompt to help AI understand your situation?', placeholder: 'Type the word...', answers: ['context', 'background', 'detail'], hint: 'It\'s the extra information that explains the situation — starts with C...' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'Ben\'s cover letter', prompt: 'Ben asks AI: "Write me a cover letter." He gets a very generic result. He tries again: "Write a cover letter for a reception manager role at a hotel. I have 12 years of customer-facing experience. Tone: warm and confident. Length: 3 short paragraphs." Which attempt gets a better result?', options: ['The first — shorter prompts are clearer', 'The second — it gives AI the context, tone, and purpose it needs', 'Both produce identical results', 'Neither — AI can\'t write cover letters'], answer: 1, explanation: 'The second prompt gives AI four key things: the job, his experience, the tone, and the length. The output requires far less editing. Context is the most powerful tool in prompting.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Yuki gets a long rambling answer from AI. What is the best next step?', options: ['Start a completely new conversation', 'Ask AI: "Make that shorter — give me the 3 key points as bullet points"', 'Assume AI can\'t do better', 'Copy the long answer and edit it all manually'], answer: 1, explanation: 'Follow-up prompts are powerful. You don\'t need to start over — just tell AI what to change. "Make it shorter", "use bullet points", "make it more formal" are all effective follow-ups.' } ], 'u1l4': [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'Marcus asks AI for a list of academic papers on climate change. AI provides 5 titles with author names and journal references. What should Marcus do first?', options: ['Submit the list — AI is reliable for academic references', 'Search for each paper to verify it actually exists — AI can invent citations', 'Ask AI for more papers', 'Copy the references straight into his essay'], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI frequently invents plausible-sounding but completely fake academic citations. This is one of the most dangerous hallucinations because they look convincing. Always verify academic references independently.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Linda asks AI: "What were the side effects of the medication I took last year?" What is wrong with this question?', options: ['AI doesn\'t understand the question', 'AI has no memory of past conversations — each session starts fresh', 'AI is not allowed to answer medical questions', 'Linda should have used a search engine instead'], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI has no memory between conversations. It can\'t remember what you discussed before. Each new conversation is a blank slate — you need to re-provide any relevant context each time.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'AI does not have ___ between conversations. Always re-provide ___ context at the start of each new chat.', blanks: ['memory', 'relevant'], wordBank: ['memory', 'relevant', 'training', 'important', 'extra'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'When AI states a fact ___, that does not mean the fact is ___. Always check important information.', blanks: ['confidently', 'correct'], wordBank: ['confidently', 'correct', 'loudly', 'true', 'quickly'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap the things AI genuinely struggles with or cannot do reliably:', items: [ { text: 'Providing real-time information (today\'s news, live prices)', correct: true }, { text: 'Writing a professional email', correct: false }, { text: 'Remembering what you told it in a previous conversation', correct: true }, { text: 'Summarising a document you paste in', correct: false }, { text: 'Always citing accurate sources', correct: true }, { text: 'Explaining concepts in simple language', correct: false } ]}, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Which of these are genuine AI capabilities — things it does well?', items: [ { text: 'Drafting emails and letters quickly', correct: true }, { text: 'Browsing live websites for current information', correct: false }, { text: 'Adapting its tone and style when asked', correct: true }, { text: 'Knowing what happened in the news today', correct: false }, { text: 'Explaining complex topics in plain language', correct: true }, { text: 'Accurately recalling your past sessions', correct: false } ]}, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'What is the term for when AI generates false information that sounds completely convincing?', placeholder: 'Type the word...', answers: ['hallucination', 'hallucinating'], hint: 'Think of it as the AI imagining something that isn\'t real...' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'Patrick checks AI\'s work', prompt: 'Patrick uses AI to get information about a medication interaction for a patient. The AI gives a clear, confident answer with specific details. Patrick is about to act on this advice. What should he do?', options: ['Act on it immediately — AI gave a clear answer', 'Verify the information against an official medical source before acting — AI can hallucinate medical facts', 'Ask AI the same question twice to double-check', 'Reject AI entirely — it\'s useless for medical topics'], answer: 1, explanation: 'Medical information is one of the highest-risk areas for AI hallucinations. AI should be a starting point for understanding, never the final authority on health decisions. Always verify with official sources or qualified professionals.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'What is the safest mindset for using AI in professional or important contexts?', options: ['"AI is always right — it has access to vast knowledge"', '"AI is a useful starting point, but important facts must be verified independently"', '"AI is never useful for professional work"', '"AI output should be submitted without editing"'], answer: 1, explanation: 'The safest and most productive approach: use AI to save time drafting, exploring, and understanding — but always verify facts that matter before acting on them.' } ], 'u2l1': [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'Sue opens ChatGPT for the first time and types: "Hi." She gets a polite greeting back. What should she do next to actually get help?', options: ['Type "Hi" again to confirm it\'s working', 'Tell AI what she needs help with — describe the task clearly', 'Wait for AI to ask her questions first', 'Close the app and try again tomorrow'], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI responds to what you give it. A greeting is fine, but the conversation becomes useful when you explain what you actually need. The clearer your first message, the better the first response.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Carlos asks AI for help writing a speech. The first draft is too formal. What\'s the best follow-up?', options: ['Start a new conversation from scratch', 'Ask AI: "Make this more conversational and warmer — it\'s for a family birthday party"', 'Accept the formal version', 'Ask AI: "Do it again"'], answer: 1, explanation: 'Follow-up prompts with specific feedback are the fastest way to improve AI output. "More conversational", "shorter", "funnier" — tell AI exactly what to change and why.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'In your first AI message, include what you need ___ and give enough ___ for AI to understand the situation.', blanks: ['done', 'context'], wordBank: ['done', 'context', 'quickly', 'detail', 'correctly'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'If the first response isn\'t right, use a ___ prompt to guide AI. You don\'t need to ___ the whole conversation.', blanks: ['follow-up', 'restart'], wordBank: ['follow-up', 'restart', 'better', 'longer', 'second'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Which of these make a good opening message to AI?', items: [ { text: 'Including what you need done', correct: true }, { text: 'Typing just one word', correct: false }, { text: 'Saying who the output is for', correct: true }, { text: 'Giving context about your situation', correct: true }, { text: 'Asking AI to be less helpful', correct: false }, { text: 'Specifying the format you want (list, email, short paragraph)', correct: true } ]}, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Which follow-up messages would improve an AI response?', items: [ { text: '"Make it shorter — maximum 5 bullet points"', correct: true }, { text: '"That\'s fine, never mind"', correct: false }, { text: '"Use a friendlier tone — this is for customers, not colleagues"', correct: true }, { text: '"Do it again"', correct: false }, { text: '"Add a brief introduction sentence before the list"', correct: true }, { text: '"Wrong. Fix it."', correct: false } ]}, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'What is the name for a message you send to AI to improve or refine its previous response?', placeholder: 'Type your answer...', answers: ['follow-up', 'follow up', 'refinement', 'follow-up prompt'], hint: 'Two words — you send it after the first response...' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'Maria\'s first conversation', prompt: 'Maria asks AI: "I need a letter." AI writes a generic letter to nobody in particular. Maria is disappointed. What did she do wrong, and how should she fix it?', options: ['Nothing wrong — AI should have known what she wanted', 'Her prompt lacked context. She should add: who it\'s to, why she\'s writing, the tone, and the key points to include', 'She should try a different AI tool', 'She should type the letter herself and ask AI to check it'], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI only knows what you tell it. A complete first message avoids multiple back-and-forths. Who is the letter for? What is its purpose? What tone? What key information must it include?' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'What is the most important habit for getting great results from AI conversations?', options: ['Always start with "please" and "thank you"', 'Be specific: tell AI exactly what you need, who it\'s for, and what format works best', 'Keep all messages under 10 words', 'Never ask follow-up questions'], answer: 1, explanation: 'Specificity is the single most valuable habit. Vague prompts get vague outputs. Specific prompts — with context, format, audience, and tone — get outputs you can actually use.' } ], 'u2l2': [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'David wants AI to explain his car insurance policy "step by step". What prompting technique is he using?', options: ['Role prompting', 'Chain-of-thought prompting — asking AI to break down its reasoning step by step', 'Format prompting', 'Temperature prompting'], answer: 1, explanation: 'Asking AI to explain "step by step" or "walk me through it" is chain-of-thought prompting. It produces more thorough, accurate responses because AI is forced to reason through the problem sequentially.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Linda starts a prompt with: "You are an experienced HR manager." What technique is she using, and why does it help?', options: ['It\'s called hallucination prompting and it\'s risky', 'Role prompting — it primes AI to respond with domain-specific knowledge and vocabulary appropriate to that role', 'Format prompting — it changes the layout of the output', 'It doesn\'t help — AI ignores instructions like this'], answer: 1, explanation: 'Role prompting tells AI to respond as an expert in a specific field. It produces noticeably more relevant, professional responses because AI focuses on the knowledge and vocabulary of that domain.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'Role prompting starts with: "You are a ___". This primes AI to respond with ___ knowledge from that field.', blanks: ['[role]', 'specialist'], wordBank: ['[role]', 'specialist', 'random', 'general', 'specific'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'Asking AI to think ___ through a problem produces more ___ and thorough answers.', blanks: ['step by step', 'accurate'], wordBank: ['step by step', 'accurate', 'quickly', 'briefly', 'carefully'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap all the techniques that improve AI answer quality:', items: [ { text: 'Role prompting ("You are a...")' , correct: true }, { text: 'Chain-of-thought ("Think step by step...")', correct: true }, { text: 'Giving an example of the output you want', correct: true }, { text: 'Typing in all capitals', correct: false }, { text: 'Specifying the format ("Give me a numbered list")', correct: true }, { text: 'Making the prompt as vague as possible', correct: false } ]}, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Which of these are examples of effective role prompting?', items: [ { text: '"You are an experienced primary school teacher. Explain fractions to a 7-year-old."', correct: true }, { text: '"You are smart. Help me."', correct: false }, { text: '"You are a solicitor. Review this contract clause for potential risks."', correct: true }, { text: '"You are an AI."', correct: false }, { text: '"You are a nutritionist. Build me a 7-day meal plan for someone with type 2 diabetes."', correct: true } ]}, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'What is the prompting technique where you start with "You are a [role]..." called?', placeholder: 'Type the technique name...', answers: ['role prompting', 'role prompt', 'persona prompting', 'role-play prompting'], hint: 'You assign AI a specific job or identity — two words...' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'Ben needs better answers', prompt: 'Ben asks AI: "Explain this contract clause." He gets a vague response. He rewrites: "You are a commercial solicitor. Explain this clause in plain English, noting any risks for a small business owner." Which approach gets better results?', options: ['The first — shorter is better', 'The second — role prompting + context + format instruction produces expert-level, useful output', 'Both produce identical results', 'Neither — AI can\'t help with legal matters'], answer: 1, explanation: 'Role + context + format is the power combination. The second prompt tells AI to think like an expert (role), understand the audience (small business owner), and deliver in a specific way (plain English, noting risks).' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'What is the purpose of including an example in your prompt?', options: ['To confuse AI with unnecessary information', 'To show AI the exact style, format, or quality level you want', 'To make the prompt longer so AI tries harder', 'Examples don\'t affect AI output'], answer: 1, explanation: 'Including an example (called "few-shot prompting") is one of the most effective techniques. AI uses it to calibrate exactly what you\'re looking for in terms of tone, length, and format.' } ], 'u2l3': [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'Rachel wants AI to write a complaint letter that sounds like her — not corporate. What should she include in her prompt?', options: ['Just "write a complaint letter"', 'Examples of her own writing, plus instructions on tone: "casual but firm, like I\'d write to a friend but still serious"', 'Ask AI to make it as formal as possible', 'Write it herself and not use AI'], answer: 1, explanation: 'To match your voice, give AI examples or describe your style. "Casual but direct", "warm and chatty", "professional but not stuffy" all help AI write something that sounds like you.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Ahmed needs to simplify a 6-page legal document into a 1-page summary for his client. What is the best AI prompt?', options: ['"Summarise this"', '"You are a plain-English writer. Simplify this document to a 1-page summary for a client who has no legal background. Use short paragraphs and plain language."', '"Make this shorter"', '"Read this legal document"'], answer: 1, explanation: 'Role + audience + format = much better simplification. AI now knows to think like a plain-English writer, write for a non-legal reader, and aim for one page of short paragraphs.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'To get AI to write in your ___, give it examples of how you normally write or describe your ___ in detail.', blanks: ['voice', 'style'], wordBank: ['voice', 'style', 'tone', 'mood', 'personality'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'AI can ___, edit, rewrite, simplify, expand, and ___. You stay in control by reviewing and personalising the final result.', blanks: ['draft', 'translate'], wordBank: ['draft', 'translate', 'print', 'format', 'publish'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap all the writing tasks where AI can provide genuine help:', items: [ { text: 'Drafting a first version of an email', correct: true }, { text: 'Automatically sending emails on your behalf', correct: false }, { text: 'Simplifying technical jargon for a non-expert reader', correct: true }, { text: 'Generating ideas for a presentation structure', correct: true }, { text: 'Knowing confidential details about your company', correct: false }, { text: 'Rewriting something in a different tone', correct: true } ]}, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Which of these writing tasks is AI well-suited to?', items: [ { text: 'Turning rough bullet points into a polished paragraph', correct: true }, { text: 'Deciding the actual content of your business strategy', correct: false }, { text: 'Expanding a short note into a full email', correct: true }, { text: 'Writing a legally binding contract', correct: false }, { text: 'Adapting the same message for different audiences', correct: true } ]}, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'What is it called when you ask AI to shorten a piece of writing to its most important points?', placeholder: 'Type the word...', answers: ['summarise', 'summarize', 'condense', 'shorten', 'summarising'], hint: 'It means reducing something long to its key points...' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'Claire\'s difficult email', prompt: 'Claire needs to tell a long-term client they\'ve missed a deadline and there will be a fee. She\'s worried about the relationship. She asks AI: "Write an email explaining a client missed a delivery deadline and will now be charged a late fee. Tone: firm but understanding — preserve the relationship."', options: ['AI will refuse to write difficult emails like this', 'AI will produce a well-phrased email that handles the tension between firmness and relationship management', 'AI will make the tone too aggressive', 'This prompt doesn\'t give AI enough information'], answer: 1, explanation: 'Difficult conversations are exactly where AI writing help shines. You control the resolution and the relationship context; AI provides professional, balanced language that you might struggle to write when you\'re stressed.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'AI wrote a great draft email but it doesn\'t sound quite like you. What is the best next step?', options: ['Send it anyway — close enough is fine', 'Ask AI: "Rewrite in a more [casual/warmer/direct] tone" or edit the key phrases yourself to add your personal touch', 'Scrap it and start again', 'Ask AI to write 10 more versions'], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI draft + your edit = the fastest path to writing that is both polished and authentic. Use AI for the heavy lifting; use yourself for the personal touches that no AI can replicate.' } ], 'u2l4': [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'Tom asks AI to cite the source for a statistic it just gave. AI provides a journal name, author, and year. What should Tom do?', options: ['Use the citation in his report — AI gave a specific reference', 'Search for the paper independently to verify it exists — AI frequently invents sources', 'Ask AI the same question in a different way', 'The source doesn\'t matter if the statistic sounds right'], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI citation hallucinations are a serious risk. The journal, author, and title AI provides may be completely invented but sound perfectly plausible. Always verify citations before using them.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Maria uses AI to get background information on a new topic she\'s researching. After reading the AI overview, what should she do?', options: ['Stop researching — the AI covered everything', 'Use the AI overview as a starting point, then find primary sources to verify the key claims', 'Share the AI output directly without verification', 'Ask AI to write her research paper now'], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI is excellent for building initial understanding of a topic quickly. But AI output should always be the beginning of research, not the end. Primary sources, official statistics, and expert publications give you reliable, verifiable information.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'AI is a great ___ point for research. Never use it as the ___ word — always verify key claims from trusted sources.', blanks: ['starting', 'final'], wordBank: ['starting', 'final', 'reference', 'ending', 'last'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'Before using an AI-generated ___, always search to confirm it ___. Fake citations look completely convincing.', blanks: ['citation', 'exists'], wordBank: ['citation', 'exists', 'statistic', 'fact', 'appears'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'When should you ALWAYS verify AI output independently?', items: [ { text: 'When AI provides specific statistics or numbers', correct: true }, { text: 'When AI lists academic citations or sources', correct: true }, { text: 'When AI is helping you brainstorm ideas', correct: false }, { text: 'When AI provides medical or legal information', correct: true }, { text: 'When you\'re writing a casual email to a friend', correct: false }, { text: 'When AI\'s answer will influence an important decision', correct: true } ]}, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Which types of AI output are safest to use as-is (without independent verification)?', items: [ { text: 'Brainstormed ideas for a birthday party theme', correct: true }, { text: 'A list of academic sources for an essay', correct: false }, { text: 'A draft email to say thank you', correct: true }, { text: 'Medical dosage information', correct: false }, { text: 'A recipe for chocolate cake', correct: true }, { text: 'A specific historical date or statistic', correct: false } ]}, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'What is the term for when AI invents a convincing but completely fabricated fact, source, or citation?', placeholder: 'Type the term...', answers: ['hallucination', 'hallucinating'], hint: 'It\'s imagining something that doesn\'t exist...' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'Grace\'s research', prompt: 'Grace is writing a report for her manager about the benefits of AI in the workplace. She asks AI for three studies and statistics. AI provides names, dates, and percentages. She\'s about to include them. What should she do?', options: ['Include them — AI gave specific, believable-sounding references', 'Search for every study and statistic independently before including them in a professional report', 'Ask AI a second time to confirm the sources', 'Remove all statistics from the report to be safe'], answer: 1, explanation: 'Professional reports require verifiable sources. AI-generated citations that turn out to be fake are embarrassing and unprofessional. Even 5 minutes of verification protects your credibility.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'What is the best workflow when using AI for important research?', options: ['"AI said it, so I\'ll use it"', '"AI gives me a fast overview and suggests angles to explore — I verify the key facts and find real sources before including anything important"', '"Ignore AI for research — it\'s too risky"', '"Ask AI to search the web to verify its own answers"'], answer: 1, explanation: 'This is the professional researcher\'s approach: AI accelerates the discovery and understanding phase; independent verification ensures the accuracy phase. Used this way, AI saves hours while maintaining your standards.' } ], 'u2l5': [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'David\'s phone automatically groups similar photos into albums. What type of AI is doing this?', options: ['Voice recognition AI', 'Image recognition AI — it identifies faces, scenes, and objects to sort photos', 'Language model AI', 'Predictive text AI'], answer: 1, explanation: 'Photo grouping uses image recognition AI, which analyses visual features — faces, locations, objects — to sort and label images automatically. This is AI you use every day without thinking about it.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Linda\'s banking app flags a suspicious transaction she didn\'t make within minutes of it happening. What makes this possible?', options: ['A human reviewed the transaction', 'AI fraud detection — it recognises patterns in transaction data that indicate unusual behaviour', 'The app guessed randomly', 'Linda\'s card was blocked by mistake'], answer: 1, explanation: 'Fraud detection AI monitors transaction patterns in real time, comparing each transaction to millions of previous ones. When something looks unusual, it flags or blocks it automatically — protecting users faster than any human could.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'Autocorrect uses AI to predict the ___ word based on what you type. It learns from ___ patterns over time.', blanks: ['correct', 'usage'], wordBank: ['correct', 'usage', 'next', 'better', 'spelling'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'Phone AI features like ___ detection and suggested replies learn from your ___ to become more personalised.', blanks: ['face', 'habits'], wordBank: ['face', 'habits', 'photo', 'usage', 'voice'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap all the phone features that use AI:', items: [ { text: 'Face unlock / Face ID', correct: true }, { text: 'The on/off button', correct: false }, { text: 'Spam email filtering', correct: true }, { text: 'Charging the battery', correct: false }, { text: 'Voice-to-text transcription', correct: true }, { text: 'App icons on the home screen', correct: false } ]}, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Which of these mobile AI features work even when you\'re not actively using an AI app?', items: [ { text: 'Autocorrect and predictive text', correct: true }, { text: 'ChatGPT generating a response', correct: false }, { text: 'Spam call detection', correct: true }, { text: 'Asking Siri a question', correct: false }, { text: 'Battery usage optimisation', correct: true }, { text: 'Typing a message to Claude', correct: false } ]}, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'What is it called when you give instructions to a phone AI assistant using your voice?', placeholder: 'Type your answer...', answers: ['voice command', 'voice prompt', 'voice query', 'voice instruction'], hint: 'Two words — you speak instead of type...' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'Ahmed and his new phone', prompt: 'Ahmed just got a smartphone. He notices it corrects his spelling, suggests replies to texts, sorts his photos, and blocks spam calls — all without him doing anything. He\'s surprised. What should he understand?', options: ['His phone is broken — this shouldn\'t happen', 'All these features use AI that runs in the background — he was already using AI before he knew it', 'Someone is remotely controlling his phone', 'This only works on expensive phones'], answer: 1, explanation: 'The most common AI on earth isn\'t ChatGPT — it\'s the invisible AI built into every smartphone. Ahmed is already an AI user. Understanding what it\'s doing helps him make better use of it and stay informed about privacy.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Which mobile AI assistant is built into most iPhone models?', options: ['Alexa', 'Siri', 'Cortana', 'Bixby'], answer: 1, explanation: 'Siri is Apple\'s AI assistant, built into every iPhone and iPad. Google Assistant is the equivalent on most Android phones. Both use voice recognition and natural language AI to respond to spoken or typed queries.' } ], u3l1: [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'Tom is a real estate agent. Which task would AI help him with most?', options: [ 'Physically staging a home for showing', 'Drafting a property listing description from his notes', 'Driving clients to view properties', 'Signing contracts on behalf of clients' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI excels at turning rough notes into polished written content, like property listing descriptions. It cannot do physical or legal tasks.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Maria asks an AI to help her prepare for a difficult client meeting. What is the most useful thing the AI can do?', options: [ 'Attend the meeting and speak on her behalf', 'Help her anticipate questions and plan her responses', 'Guarantee the meeting will go well', 'Contact the client directly to reschedule' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI can help you think through scenarios and prepare responses, but it cannot take actions in the real world on your behalf.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Which of these is the best way to use AI as a professional tool?', options: [ 'Let AI make all final decisions for you', 'Use AI output without reviewing it', 'Treat AI as a knowledgeable assistant that still needs your oversight', 'Only use AI for tasks unrelated to your work' ], answer: 2, explanation: 'AI works best as an assistant. Your experience and judgment are still essential — always review AI output before using it professionally.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'When using AI at work, you should always ___ the output before sharing it, because AI can sometimes make ___ mistakes.', blanks: ['review', 'factual'], wordBank: ['review', 'factual', 'ignore', 'creative', 'publish', 'small'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'AI can save professionals time by handling ___ tasks, freeing them up for work that requires human ___ and judgment.', blanks: ['repetitive', 'expertise'], wordBank: ['repetitive', 'expertise', 'physical', 'guessing', 'dangerous', 'emotion'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap all the tasks where AI can genuinely help a professional at work.', items: [ { text: 'Summarizing a long report', correct: true }, { text: 'Drafting a first version of a proposal', correct: true }, { text: 'Physically delivering documents', correct: false }, { text: 'Generating ideas for a marketing campaign', correct: true }, { text: 'Legally signing a contract', correct: false }, { text: 'Proofreading written work', correct: true } ] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap all the statements that are TRUE about using AI in your job.', items: [ { text: 'AI can help you draft content faster', correct: true }, { text: 'AI always produces 100% accurate information', correct: false }, { text: 'You should verify important facts AI provides', correct: true }, { text: 'AI can replace the need for your professional experience', correct: false }, { text: 'AI can help you brainstorm solutions to work problems', correct: true }, { text: 'AI can read your mind and know exactly what you need', correct: false } ] }, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'In one word: what should you always do to AI-generated work content before using it professionally?', placeholder: 'Type your answer...', answers: ['review', 'check', 'proofread', 'verify', 'edit'], hint: 'Think about the step you take before handing in any important document.' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'The Busy Accountant', prompt: 'James is an accountant and has to send the same type of update email to 12 different clients every month. He spends about two hours writing them all. How could AI best help him?', options: [ 'Have AI send the emails automatically without James seeing them', 'Ask AI to create a template he can quickly customise for each client', 'Stop sending monthly updates altogether', 'Hire someone else to write the emails' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Creating a reusable template is a great AI use case. James still personalises and sends each email himself, keeping full control.' } ], u3l2: [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'Rachel needs to write a formal email declining a vendor proposal. Which prompt would give her the best result from an AI?', options: [ '"Write an email"', '"Write a polite, professional email declining a vendor proposal, keeping the relationship friendly"', '"Say no to the vendor"', '"Email about proposal"' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Detailed prompts that include tone, purpose, and context produce much better business writing from AI than vague requests.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'David asks AI to write a report for him. When he reads it, the facts look unfamiliar. What should he do?', options: [ 'Submit the report immediately — AI is always right', 'Delete the report and write it himself from scratch', 'Check the facts himself and correct anything inaccurate', 'Ask AI to check its own facts and trust the result' ], answer: 2, explanation: 'AI can generate plausible-sounding but incorrect facts. Always verify key information in professional documents before submitting them.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Which of the following is NOT something AI can reliably help with in business writing?', options: [ 'Improving the flow and clarity of a draft', 'Adjusting the tone from casual to formal', 'Guaranteeing all statistics in a report are accurate', 'Suggesting a clearer structure for a document' ], answer: 2, explanation: 'AI cannot guarantee factual accuracy. It can improve writing quality, tone, and structure, but you must verify all statistics and data yourself.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'To get the best business email from AI, you should tell it the ___ of the email and the ___ you want to use.', blanks: ['purpose', 'tone'], wordBank: ['purpose', 'tone', 'colour', 'length', 'font', 'date'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'AI can help you turn ___ notes into a polished report, saving you time on the ___ process.', blanks: ['rough', 'writing'], wordBank: ['rough', 'writing', 'final', 'printing', 'sending', 'blank'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap all the things AI can helpfully do with a business document.', items: [ { text: 'Rewrite a paragraph to sound more professional', correct: true }, { text: 'Shorten a lengthy report into a summary', correct: true }, { text: 'Confirm that all legal information is correct', correct: false }, { text: 'Fix grammatical errors', correct: true }, { text: 'Physically print and mail the document', correct: false }, { text: 'Suggest a better subject line for an email', correct: true } ] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap all the details that help AI write a better business email.', items: [ { text: 'Who the email is going to', correct: true }, { text: 'The purpose of the email', correct: true }, { text: 'Your favourite colour', correct: false }, { text: 'The tone you want (friendly, formal, firm)', correct: true }, { text: 'Any key points to include', correct: true }, { text: 'The brand of your computer', correct: false } ] }, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'What is the word for adjusting how formal or casual your writing sounds? (It describes the feel or attitude of writing)', placeholder: 'Type your answer...', answers: ['tone', 'voice', 'style'], hint: 'It is the same word used to describe how someone speaks — whether they sound friendly, serious, or professional.' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'The Difficult Email', prompt: 'Linda needs to tell a long-time customer that their order will be delayed by two weeks. She wants to be honest but also keep the customer happy. She asks AI to write the email for her. What should she do after reading the AI draft?', options: [ 'Send it straight away without reading it closely', 'Read it carefully, personalise it with specific details about the customer, and verify the accuracy of anything she plans to promise', 'Throw it away and write from scratch because AI cannot handle sensitive messages', 'Forward the AI draft directly to her manager to send' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI gives you a strong starting point, but personalising the message and checking that any commitments are accurate keeps you in control of the customer relationship.' } ], u3l3: [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'Carlos is researching a new market for his small business. How should he treat information that AI gives him?', options: [ 'Accept it as fact and use it immediately in his business plan', 'Use it as a starting point and verify key figures from reliable sources', 'Ignore it because AI research is never useful', 'Only use it if the AI cites a website he recognises' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI can quickly surface useful research directions and summaries, but always verify important data from authoritative sources before making business decisions.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Sue wants to use AI to help plan a large work project. Which approach works best?', options: [ 'Ask AI to run the project for her', 'Ask AI to generate a full project plan, then adjust it based on her team\'s actual situation', 'Ask AI one very vague question and use whatever it produces', 'Only use AI after the project is already finished' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI is great for generating a draft plan or structure quickly. You then refine it using your real-world knowledge of the team, budget, and timeline.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Patrick asks AI "What are the main challenges small businesses face entering the Canadian market?" What kind of output should he expect?', options: [ 'A guaranteed accurate, up-to-date market report', 'A general overview that covers common issues, which he should then verify', 'A personalised plan tailored specifically to his business', 'Nothing useful — AI cannot help with business research' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI can provide a helpful general overview, but it may not have the latest data and it does not know the specifics of your business. Treat it as a research starting point.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'When using AI for research, think of it as a knowledgeable ___ that helps you explore ideas, but always ___ the key facts yourself.', blanks: ['assistant', 'verify'], wordBank: ['assistant', 'verify', 'enemy', 'ignore', 'boss', 'invent'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'AI can help you create a project ___ by breaking a big goal into smaller ___ and deadlines.', blanks: ['plan', 'steps'], wordBank: ['plan', 'steps', 'logo', 'meetings', 'invoice', 'photos'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap all the ways AI can help with work research and planning.', items: [ { text: 'Summarising background information on a topic', correct: true }, { text: 'Generating a list of questions to investigate', correct: true }, { text: 'Guaranteeing the accuracy of every statistic', correct: false }, { text: 'Suggesting a structure for a project plan', correct: true }, { text: 'Making final business decisions for you', correct: false }, { text: 'Identifying pros and cons of different approaches', correct: true } ] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap all the statements that describe GOOD research habits when using AI.', items: [ { text: 'Cross-check important data with trusted sources', correct: true }, { text: 'Ask follow-up questions to go deeper on a topic', correct: true }, { text: 'Copy AI research directly into a business report without reading it', correct: false }, { text: 'Use AI to brainstorm what to research next', correct: true }, { text: 'Trust AI to know what is best for your specific business', correct: false }, { text: 'Ask AI to explain a concept you do not understand', correct: true } ] }, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'What is the word for confirming that information is accurate by checking it against a reliable source?', placeholder: 'Type your answer...', answers: ['verify', 'verification', 'check', 'validate', 'confirm'], hint: 'You do this when you double-check a fact before including it in an important document.' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'The Market Research Shortcut', prompt: 'Yuki runs a catering business and wants to expand into corporate lunch services. She asks AI to give her an overview of the corporate catering market in her city. The AI gives her a detailed response with trends, typical pricing, and customer preferences. What is the smartest next step?', options: [ 'Launch the new service immediately based on the AI overview', 'Ignore the AI response because it cannot know anything about her local market', 'Use the AI overview to guide her own research — call a few local businesses and check industry sources to verify the specifics', 'Ask AI to write her full business plan based on this one response' ], answer: 2, explanation: 'AI gives you a great head start.
