Which tool would be the most appropriate recommendation and why?', options: [ 'Midjourney — because it is the most popular', 'Adobe Firefly — because it is designed for commercial use and trained on licensed content', 'Any tool — AI images have no copyright issues', 'She should avoid all AI image tools' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Adobe Firefly explicitly targets commercial use cases and states it is trained on licensed content, making it a safer choice for business advertising than tools with less clear licensing terms.' } ], u8l5: [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'Who currently holds the copyright to an AI-generated image in most jurisdictions?', options: [ 'The AI system that created it', 'The person who wrote the prompt', 'Copyright law for purely AI-generated work is unsettled — in many countries it may not be protected at all', 'The company that trained the AI model always owns all outputs' ], answer: 2, explanation: 'Copyright law was written for human creators. In most jurisdictions, works with no human authorship cannot be copyrighted, though this area of law is still evolving.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'What ethical concern arises when an AI image model is trained on photos of real people without their knowledge?', options: [ 'The photos might slow down the AI', 'People\'s likenesses can be used without their consent, potentially creating misleading or harmful images', 'It makes the AI too realistic', 'Real people\'s photos are always low resolution' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Training on images of identifiable people raises serious consent issues. AI can then produce realistic images of those individuals in scenarios they never agreed to.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'What is "deepfake" content?', options: [ 'AI-generated landscape photography', 'Synthetic media — often video or images — that realistically depicts real people doing or saying things they did not do', 'A type of noise filter for photographs', 'A technique for compressing image files' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Deepfakes use AI to create convincing but false depictions of real people. They raise serious concerns about misinformation, consent, and reputational harm.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'Many AI image models were trained on images ___ from the internet without the original creators\' ___, raising copyright concerns.', blanks: ['scraped', 'permission'], wordBank: ['scraped', 'permission', 'purchased', 'donated', 'approval'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'Using AI to generate a realistic image of a real person in a ___ situation without their consent is both unethical and potentially ___.', blanks: ['false', 'illegal'], wordBank: ['false', 'illegal', 'helpful', 'artistic', 'licensed'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap all the ethical concerns associated with AI image generation.', items: [ { text: 'Training data scraped from artists without consent', correct: true }, { text: 'Creating realistic fake images of real people', correct: true }, { text: 'Generating images of beautiful landscapes', correct: false }, { text: 'Producing misleading news images', correct: true }, { text: 'Replacing professional photographers\' livelihoods without compensation', correct: true }, { text: 'Using an AI tool to generate a personal birthday card', correct: false } ] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap all the responsible practices when using AI-generated images.', items: [ { text: 'Checking the tool\'s terms of service for commercial use rights', correct: true }, { text: 'Not using AI to generate fake images of real, named individuals', correct: true }, { text: 'Sharing an AI image as a real photograph without disclosure', correct: false }, { text: 'Crediting AI-generated content as AI-generated when sharing publicly', correct: true }, { text: 'Using AI images to spread false information about public figures', correct: false }, { text: 'Choosing tools trained on licensed or consented content for commercial work', correct: true } ] }, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'What term describes AI-generated media that realistically shows real people saying or doing things they never did?', placeholder: 'Type the term...', answers: ['deepfake', 'deepfakes'], hint: 'It combines the words for depth of realism and the fact that it is fake.' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'Colin\'s Prank Idea', prompt: 'Colin wants to generate a realistic AI image of his local politician looking embarrassed at a fictional event and share it on social media as a joke. What are the main concerns with this plan?', options: [ 'None — it is clearly a joke and everyone will know', 'It could spread as misinformation, damage the person\'s reputation unfairly, and may be illegal in some places', 'The only concern is that the image quality might not be good enough', 'It is fine as long as Colin captions it "AI generated"' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Even with a caption, realistic fake images of real people can spread out of context, cause reputational damage, and may violate laws around defamation or synthetic media in some jurisdictions.' } ], // ── UNIT 9 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── u9l1: [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'Which of the following is the most appropriate use of AI during tax preparation?', options: [ 'Letting AI file your tax return directly with the government', 'Asking AI to explain what a specific tax term or form means', 'Having AI access your bank account to calculate your income', 'Trusting AI to know all current tax laws in your jurisdiction' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI is excellent at explaining concepts and terms in plain language. However, it should not file taxes, access your accounts, or be trusted as a definitive source of current tax law.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Why should you be cautious about sharing personal financial details with a general AI chatbot?', options: [ 'AI chatbots charge extra for financial questions', 'General AI chatbots are not secure financial tools and your data could be stored or used in unintended ways', 'AI cannot process numbers', 'You must be a certified accountant to use AI for tax questions' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'General-purpose chatbots are not designed for the security and privacy standards required for sensitive financial data. Keep specific personal details — like your tax file number — off general AI tools.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'What is the most important thing to remember about AI tax advice compared to advice from a registered tax professional?', options: [ 'AI is always more accurate than a human professional', 'AI can be outdated, may not know your local rules, and has no legal accountability — a professional does', 'A professional costs less than using AI tools', 'AI can only help with income tax, not other types of tax' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'A registered tax professional is legally accountable, knows your jurisdiction\'s current rules, and can give personalised advice. AI can make errors and is not a substitute for qualified professional advice.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'AI can help you ___ what a tax form is asking, but you should always ___ the information with an official source or professional.', blanks: ['understand', 'verify'], wordBank: ['understand', 'verify', 'ignore', 'delete', 'translate'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'You should never share your ___ number or banking ___ with a general-purpose AI chatbot for security reasons.', blanks: ['tax file', 'details'], wordBank: ['tax file', 'details', 'first', 'old email', 'birthday'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap all the tasks where AI can genuinely help with tax preparation.', items: [ { text: 'Explaining what "taxable income" means', correct: true }, { text: 'Filing your return directly with the tax office', correct: false }, { text: 'Helping you understand which documents to gather', correct: true }, { text: 'Describing common deduction categories in plain English', correct: true }, { text: 'Guaranteeing you will get a refund', correct: false }, { text: 'Answering general questions about how tax brackets work', correct: true } ] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap all the situations where you should consult a qualified tax professional instead of relying on AI.', items: [ { text: 'You have a complex business structure', correct: true }, { text: 'You want to know what the word "deduction" means', correct: false }, { text: 'You have had a significant life event like selling a property', correct: true }, { text: 'You have income from multiple countries', correct: true }, { text: 'You want to know the general tax deadline for your country', correct: false }, { text: 'You are being audited by the tax authority', correct: true } ] }, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'What is the term for the amount of income that is subject to tax after deductions and exemptions are applied?', placeholder: 'Type the term...', answers: ['taxable income'], hint: 'It is the income figure your tax rate is actually applied to.' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'Norma\'s Tax Question', prompt: 'Norma is retired and confused by the term "franking credits" on her dividend statement. She asks a general AI chatbot to explain it. The AI gives a clear plain-English explanation. She then asks the AI to calculate exactly how much she owes. What is the right approach for that second request?', options: [ 'Trust the AI calculation completely and file based on it', 'Use the AI explanation as a starting point, but verify the calculation with the ATO website or a tax professional', 'Ignore the AI entirely from this point on', 'Ask the AI to contact the tax office on her behalf' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI is helpful for explanations but should not be your final calculator for what you owe. Calculations should be verified with official tools or a professional to avoid errors or penalties.' } ], u9l2: [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'What is one effective way AI can help you organise a large collection of documents?', options: [ 'Shredding documents it identifies as old', 'Summarising the contents of each document so you can decide how to file it', 'Automatically emailing documents to your accountant', 'Converting all your documents into a single large spreadsheet' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI can read and summarise documents quickly, helping you understand what each file contains so you can label, file, or discard it efficiently.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'If you use an AI tool to extract key figures from a scanned receipt, what should you always do before using those figures?', options: [ 'Print the receipt again', 'Double-check the AI\'s extraction against the original document', 'Delete the original receipt', 'Share the receipt on social media as proof' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'OCR and AI extraction can misread digits, especially on faded or handwritten receipts. Always verify extracted figures against the original.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'What does "OCR" stand for, a technology AI often uses to read scanned documents?', options: [ 'Online Content Reader', 'Optical Character Recognition', 'Official Copy and Record', 'Output Control Registry' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Optical Character Recognition converts images of text (like scanned pages or photos of receipts) into machine-readable text that AI and other software can then process.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'AI can help you create a consistent ___ system for your documents, making them easier to search and ___ later.', blanks: ['naming', 'retrieve'], wordBank: ['naming', 'retrieve', 'deleting', 'printing', 'encrypt'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'Uploading sensitive documents to an AI tool requires you to check the tool\'s ___ policy to understand how your ___ is stored.', blanks: ['privacy', 'data'], wordBank: ['privacy', 'data', 'colour', 'font', 'version'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap all the document management tasks where AI can add genuine value.', items: [ { text: 'Summarising a long contract into key points', correct: true }, { text: 'Suggesting a logical folder structure for your files', correct: true }, { text: 'Legally signing contracts on your behalf', correct: false }, { text: 'Identifying which receipts might be tax-relevant', correct: true }, { text: 'Automatically shredding documents it deems unnecessary', correct: false }, { text: 'Extracting dates and amounts from scanned invoices', correct: true } ] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap all the precautions to take before uploading personal documents to an AI tool.', items: [ { text: 'Read the tool\'s privacy and data retention policy', correct: true }, { text: 'Consider whether the tool is designed for sensitive documents', correct: true }, { text: 'Upload as many documents as possible to save time', correct: false }, { text: 'Remove personally identifying information where possible', correct: true }, { text: 'Verify extracted information against the original', correct: true }, { text: 'Share your login credentials with the AI for faster access', correct: false } ] }, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'What technology converts a scanned or photographed page of text into editable, machine-readable characters?', placeholder: 'Type the acronym...', answers: ['ocr', 'optical character recognition'], hint: 'It is a three-letter acronym starting with O.' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'Alan\'s Receipt Mountain', prompt: 'Alan has three years of paper receipts in a box. He photographs them all and uploads them to an AI tool that extracts the date, vendor, and amount from each. The AI produces a spreadsheet. Before he uses this for his taxes, what is the single most important step?', options: [ 'Print the spreadsheet in colour', 'Go through the spreadsheet and verify each entry against the original receipt', 'Delete the original receipts since the AI has processed them', 'Share the spreadsheet with all his family members' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI extraction can make errors — misreading a digit or skipping a receipt. Verifying the spreadsheet against the originals before using it for tax purposes is essential.' } ], u9l3: [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'What is a tax deduction?', options: [ 'A penalty for paying your taxes late', 'An amount subtracted from your income before tax is calculated, reducing the tax you owe', 'Extra tax you must pay if you earn above a threshold', 'A government payment sent to low-income earners' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'A deduction reduces your taxable income, which in turn reduces the amount of tax you owe. Common examples include work-related expenses and charitable donations.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'How can asking an AI to explain a deduction in "plain English" be useful?', options: [ 'It automatically claims the deduction for you', 'It helps you understand whether the deduction might apply to your situation, so you can investigate further', 'It provides a legally binding ruling on your eligibility', 'It sends the deduction claim directly to your tax authority' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Tax language can be intimidating. AI can translate jargon into everyday language, helping you understand enough to ask a professional the right questions or explore official guidance.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Which of the following is typically a deductible expense for someone who works from home?', options: [ 'The cost of personal holidays', 'A portion of home internet and phone costs used for work', 'Grocery shopping for family meals', 'Clothing worn outside the workplace' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Work-from-home deductions typically include a proportion of expenses like internet, phone, electricity, and office supplies used for work — though the exact rules vary by country.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'A tax ___ reduces your taxable income, while a tax ___ directly reduces the amount of tax you owe, dollar for dollar.', blanks: ['deduction', 'credit'], wordBank: ['deduction', 'credit', 'penalty', 'bracket', 'refund'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'AI can explain what a ___ means in plain language, but you should confirm your eligibility with the official tax authority or a ___ professional.', blanks: ['deduction', 'qualified'], wordBank: ['deduction', 'qualified', 'colour', 'random', 'retired'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap all items that are commonly tax-deductible for employees (rules vary by country — select items generally accepted in most jurisdictions).', items: [ { text: 'Work-related training and education costs', correct: true }, { text: 'Tools or equipment purchased for work', correct: true }, { text: 'Personal entertainment like cinema tickets', correct: false }, { text: 'Union or professional association fees', correct: true }, { text: 'Groceries for home meals', correct: false }, { text: 'Charitable donations to registered charities', correct: true } ] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap all the ways AI can help you understand tax deductions.', items: [ { text: 'Explaining what "work-related expense" means in plain terms', correct: true }, { text: 'Listing common deduction categories for your occupation', correct: true }, { text: 'Guaranteeing which deductions you are legally entitled to', correct: false }, { text: 'Helping you form the right questions to ask your accountant', correct: true }, { text: 'Filing the deductions on your behalf without your review', correct: false }, { text: 'Describing how depreciation works in everyday language', correct: true } ] }, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'What is the term for the portion of your income that remains after all eligible deductions, and on which tax is actually calculated?', placeholder: 'Type the term...', answers: ['taxable income'], hint: 'It is the income figure after all deductions have been subtracted.' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'Lorraine\'s Home Office', prompt: 'Lorraine works from home two days a week and wonders whether she can deduct home office costs. She asks an AI chatbot, which explains the general concept of home office deductions clearly. What should Lorraine do next?', options: [ 'Immediately claim the maximum possible deduction based on the AI explanation', 'Check her country\'s official tax authority website or speak to an accountant to confirm the rules that apply to her', 'Assume the AI is wrong and do not claim anything', 'Ask a different AI tool and go with whichever gives the highest figure' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI provides a useful starting point for understanding. Lorraine should confirm the specific rules for her country and circumstances through official channels or a professional before making any claims.' } ], u9l4: [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'What is one way AI features in modern tax software can help users?', options: [ 'By bypassing the need to enter any financial information', 'By asking plain-language questions and translating answers into the correct tax form fields', 'By guaranteeing you will not be audited', 'By automatically negotiating your tax bill with the government' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Many tax platforms use AI-style conversational interfaces that ask simple questions in plain English and then populate the correct form fields, making the process accessible for non-experts.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'What should you do before connecting any AI tool or third-party app to your official tax software account?', options: [ 'Share your password in a public forum to get help', 'Check that the integration is officially supported and review the app\'s privacy policy', 'Disable all security settings for easier access', 'Nothing — all integrations are automatically safe' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Only use integrations that are officially supported and reviewed. Unauthorised third-party apps that access your tax account could compromise your personal data.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Which of the following is a realistic benefit of AI-powered tax software for everyday users?', options: [ 'Completely eliminating the need to keep any records', 'Flagging potential errors or missed deductions before you submit', 'Predicting the outcome of future tax audits with certainty', 'Filing taxes in seconds with no user input required' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI within tax software can cross-check your entries against common patterns, flag unusual items, and suggest deductions you may have overlooked — all before you submit.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'Many tax software platforms now use AI to automatically ___ receipts and ___ them to the correct expense categories.', blanks: ['scan', 'assign'], wordBank: ['scan', 'assign', 'delete', 'print', 'mail'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'Even with AI assistance in tax software, you remain ___ for the accuracy of your return and should always ___ before submitting.', blanks: ['responsible', 'review'], wordBank: ['responsible', 'review', 'exempt', 'ignore', 'estimate'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap all the genuine AI features found in modern tax software.', items: [ { text: 'Automatically categorising imported bank transactions', correct: true }, { text: 'Asking conversational questions to simplify data entry', correct: true }, { text: 'Filing your return without showing you what was submitted', correct: false }, { text: 'Flagging entries that look unusual or inconsistent', correct: true }, { text: 'Guaranteeing a specific refund amount', correct: false }, { text: 'Suggesting deductions based on your occupation', correct: true } ] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap all the safe practices when using AI-enhanced tax software.', items: [ { text: 'Reviewing your return before submitting', correct: true }, { text: 'Keeping your own copies of all supporting documents', correct: true }, { text: 'Allowing unknown apps to access your tax account without checking', correct: false }, { text: 'Verifying that any integration is officially supported', correct: true }, { text: 'Accepting the software\'s suggestions blindly without reading them', correct: false }, { text: 'Using strong, unique passwords for your tax account', correct: true } ] }, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'What term describes software that automatically reads and categorises your expenses from bank or credit card data, often using AI?', placeholder: 'Type the term...', answers: ['automatic categorisation', 'auto-categorisation', 'automated categorisation', 'transaction categorisation'], hint: 'It saves you manually sorting each transaction into a category.' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'Stuart\'s Software', prompt: 'Stuart uses an online tax platform that offers to connect to his bank account and automatically import transactions. The software is from a reputable, nationally recognised tax provider. He is nervous about linking his bank. What is a reasonable way to proceed?', options: [ 'Never connect any bank account to any software — it is always dangerous', 'Read the platform\'s privacy policy, confirm the connection is secure and officially supported, then decide', 'Share his bank login details with the AI chatbot instead', 'Connect immediately without reading anything — reputable companies are always safe' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Even reputable software deserves a quick check of the privacy policy and security practices before connecting a bank account. Informed consent is always the right approach.' } ], u9l5: [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'What is one of the most common and serious errors AI makes in financial and tax contexts?', options: [ 'Using too many decimal places', 'Presenting outdated or jurisdiction-specific information as if it were universally current and correct', 'Formatting numbers in the wrong font', 'Refusing to answer any financial questions at all' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Tax laws change frequently and vary by country, state, and individual circumstances. AI trained on older data may confidently give you rules that no longer apply or do not apply where you live.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'An AI chatbot confidently tells you a specific tax deduction applies to you. What is the safest next step?', options: [ 'Claim the deduction immediately — if the AI said so, it must be right', 'Verify the information against your country\'s official tax authority website or with a professional', 'Ask the same AI question again for confirmation', 'Post the AI response online to ask others if they agree' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI confidence does not equal correctness. The official tax authority website and qualified professionals are the authoritative sources for what deductions actually apply to you.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Why might an AI give different answers to the same tax question on different days?', options: [ 'AI is programmed to randomly change its answers to keep users engaged', 'AI responses involve some randomness, and the model may draw on different parts of its training each time', 'Tax laws automatically update inside the AI daily', 'The AI is testing to see which answer you prefer' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI language models are probabilistic and can produce variation in their outputs. This inconsistency is one reason financial decisions should never rely solely on AI responses.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'AI can ___ about tax rules — presenting information confidently that is outdated, incorrect, or not applicable to your ___.', blanks: ['hallucinate', 'jurisdiction'], wordBank: ['hallucinate', 'jurisdiction', 'calculate', 'file', 'estimate'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'Any AI-generated financial figure or claim should be treated as a ___ starting point, not a ___ answer.', blanks: ['useful', 'definitive'], wordBank: ['useful', 'definitive', 'final', 'useless', 'certified'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap all the known limitations of AI when used for tax or financial advice.', items: [ { text: 'It may have an outdated knowledge cut-off date', correct: true }, { text: 'It may not know your specific country\'s or state\'s current rules', correct: true }, { text: 'It always has access to the latest legislation', correct: false }, { text: 'It cannot provide legally accountable advice', correct: true }, { text: 'It can confidently state incorrect information', correct: true }, { text: 'It charges certified fees that guarantee accuracy', correct: false } ] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap all the good verification habits when AI gives you financial or tax information.', items: [ { text: 'Cross-check with the official tax authority website', correct: true }, { text: 'Ask a qualified accountant or tax professional', correct: true }, { text: 'Ask the same AI the question ten times for a majority vote', correct: false }, { text: 'Look at the date the AI model was last trained', correct: true }, { text: 'Assume that if it sounds official, it must be right', correct: false }, { text: 'Compare with information from a reputable financial publication', correct: true } ] }, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'What is the term for the date beyond which an AI model has no knowledge of new events or updated information?', placeholder: 'Type the term...', answers: ['knowledge cutoff', 'knowledge cut-off', 'training cutoff', 'training cut-off', 'cutoff date', 'cut-off date'], hint: 'It describes where the model\'s learning stopped.' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'Vivienne\'s Mistake', prompt: 'Vivienne asks an AI chatbot whether she can deduct her home phone as a business expense. The AI says yes, with no qualifications. She claims the full cost. Her accountant later tells her only the work-related portion is deductible. What went wrong?', options: [ 'The accountant was wrong — AI is more reliable than a human', 'The AI gave an oversimplified answer and Vivienne did not verify it with a professional or official source before acting', 'Vivienne asked the question incorrectly', 'AI tools are not allowed to discuss phone deductions' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI often gives generalised answers that omit important nuances — like the need to apportion mixed-use expenses. Vivienne should have verified the AI\'s answer before claiming. This illustrates why AI is a starting point, not a final authority.' } ], u10l1: [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'Tom wants to send the same "thank you for your inquiry" reply to 20 different customers. What is the best AI approach?', options: [ 'Write each email individually to make them feel personal', 'Create one AI-generated template then lightly personalise each copy', 'Send a mass email with no personalisation at all', 'Ask a colleague to write all 20 emails' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'A strong template does the heavy lifting. You then swap in the customer name and one personal detail — fast, professional, and still human.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Maria asks AI to write an auto-reply for when she is out of the office. Which detail is MOST important to include?', options: [ 'Her home address', 'A return date and an alternative contact for urgent matters', 'A list of all her job duties', 'The name of her manager\'s manager' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'An effective out-of-office reply tells the sender when you are back and who to contact if they cannot wait. Everything else is optional.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'James uses AI to draft a batch of follow-up emails after a trade show. He should review them before sending because:', options: [ 'AI emails are always too short', 'AI cannot spell correctly', 'Details like names and company references need human verification', 'Batch emails are illegal without manual review' ], answer: 2, explanation: 'AI can mix up details or use a wrong name. A quick human check catches errors before they reach a client.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'A well-written email ___ saves time every week and keeps your replies ___ and professional.', blanks: ['template', 'consistent'], wordBank: ['template', 'consistent', 'random', 'folder', 'long'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'When asking AI to write an auto-reply, tell it your ___ date and the name of your ___ contact.', blanks: ['return', 'backup'], wordBank: ['return', 'backup', 'birthday', 'favourite', 'printer'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap every item that belongs in a good out-of-office email template.', items: [ { text: 'Your expected return date', correct: true }, { text: 'An alternative contact name and email', correct: true }, { text: 'A brief acknowledgement that the message was received', correct: true }, { text: 'Your personal mobile number for non-urgent calls', correct: false }, { text: 'A polite, professional tone', correct: true }, { text: 'A list of your holiday destinations', correct: false } ] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Which of these are smart prompts to give AI when creating an email template?', items: [ { text: '"Write a friendly reply confirming a booking"', correct: true }, { text: '"Keep it under 100 words and end with a call to action"', correct: true }, { text: '"Make it sound exactly like a legal document"', correct: false }, { text: '"Use a warm but professional tone"', correct: true }, { text: '"Write it in a foreign language I don\'t speak"', correct: false }, { text: '"Include a placeholder for the customer\'s first name"', correct: true } ] }, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'What single word describes sending the same core email to many recipients at once, usually with small personalised changes?', placeholder: 'Type the term...', answers: ['batch', 'bulk', 'mass'], hint: 'Think of posting many letters in one go.' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'Rachel\'s Inbox Problem', prompt: 'Rachel receives 15 identical questions every Monday asking about delivery times. She spends 30 minutes answering each one separately. She has heard AI can help but is not sure where to start.', options: [ 'Hire an assistant to answer the emails instead', 'Ignore the repetitive questions and hope they stop', 'Ask AI to write one strong template reply she can paste and lightly edit each time', 'Reply only to customers who email twice' ], answer: 2, explanation: 'One AI-generated template covers 90% of the answer. Rachel just pastes it, changes the name, and sends. Those 30 minutes become 5.' } ], u10l2: [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'David wants to use AI to prepare for a Monday morning team meeting. Which prompt gives the BEST result?', options: [ '"Write something for my meeting"', '"Create a 30-minute agenda for a team meeting covering last week\'s sales, upcoming deadlines, and open issues"', '"What is a meeting?"', '"List every topic that exists in business"' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Specific prompts get specific results. Telling AI the time limit and topics produces a ready-to-use agenda.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Linda pastes her rough meeting notes into AI and asks it to "tidy these up." The output is a clean summary. What should she do next?', options: [ 'Send it immediately without reading it', 'Delete her original notes so the AI version is the only record', 'Read through the summary to check nothing important was missed or misunderstood', 'Ask AI to tidy them up a second time, then send' ], answer: 2, explanation: 'AI summaries can drop nuance or merge separate points. A quick read-through before distribution keeps the record accurate.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Carlos is writing action items after a meeting. Which AI prompt produces the most useful output?', options: [ '"What happened in my meeting?"', '"From these notes, list every action item with the owner\'s name and due date"', '"Summarise everything in one sentence"', '"Tell me who was at the meeting"' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Asking AI to extract owners and due dates means the action list is ready to share straight away, with accountability built in.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'A meeting ___ sent the night before helps attendees arrive ___ and ready to contribute.', blanks: ['agenda', 'prepared'], wordBank: ['agenda', 'prepared', 'invoice', 'confused', 'late'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'After a meeting, AI can turn rough ___ into a clean ___ that is easy to share with the whole team.', blanks: ['notes', 'summary'], wordBank: ['notes', 'summary', 'budget', 'invoice', 'complaint'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap every item that should appear in a standard meeting agenda.', items: [ { text: 'Meeting purpose or goal', correct: true }, { text: 'List of agenda topics with time allocations', correct: true }, { text: 'Names of attendees', correct: true }, { text: 'Each attendee\'s salary information', correct: false }, { text: 'Date, time, and location or call link', correct: true }, { text: 'Personal opinions about each colleague', correct: false } ] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Which of these are good things to ask AI to do with raw meeting notes?', items: [ { text: 'Summarise the key decisions made', correct: true }, { text: 'List action items and who owns them', correct: true }, { text: 'Invent outcomes that were not discussed', correct: false }, { text: 'Write a follow-up email to attendees', correct: true }, { text: 'Translate vague notes into clear bullet points', correct: true }, { text: 'Delete any decisions the manager might not like', correct: false } ] }, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'What is the short term for a list of topics to be discussed at a meeting, usually sent to attendees beforehand?', placeholder: 'Type the word...', answers: ['agenda'], hint: 'Starts with the letter A.' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'Sue\'s Note-Taking Struggle', prompt: 'Sue is the office administrator. After every team meeting she spends an hour trying to turn her scrawled notes into professional minutes. Her manager has asked her to have them ready within 15 minutes of the meeting ending.', options: [ 'Tell her manager the 15-minute deadline is impossible', 'Type her notes straight into AI and ask it to format them as professional minutes', 'Record the meeting secretly and transcribe it herself', 'Stop taking notes and rely on memory' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Pasting raw notes into AI and asking for formatted minutes is exactly what this tool excels at. Sue gets a clean draft in under a minute, leaving time for a quick review.' } ], u10l3: [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'Patrick needs to write a monthly sales report but stares at a blank page. The best way to use AI is to:', options: [ 'Ask AI to invent sales figures he does not have', 'Give AI the real figures and ask it to write an executive summary explaining the trends', 'Submit a blank report and blame the AI', 'Copy last month\'s report and change the date' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI turns raw numbers into readable narrative. You supply the facts; AI supplies the clear, professional language around them.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Yuki asks AI to summarise a 20-page supplier report into one page for her director. What should she tell AI to focus on?', options: [ 'The page numbers', 'The font styles used in the original', 'Key findings, risks, and recommended next steps', 'The table of contents' ], answer: 2, explanation: 'Executives want decisions, not details. Asking AI to highlight findings, risks, and recommendations gives the director exactly what is needed.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Marcus wants AI to help write a formal report. Which prompt element is LEAST useful?', options: [ 'Specifying the audience (e.g. "for senior management")', 'Telling AI the desired length', 'Asking AI to use a professional tone', 'Telling AI the colour of his office chair' ], answer: 3, explanation: 'Audience, length, and tone all directly shape the output. The chair colour is irrelevant and wastes prompt space.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'AI can turn bullet-point ___ into flowing paragraphs, saving hours of ___ writing time.', blanks: ['notes', 'report'], wordBank: ['notes', 'report', 'phone', 'printing', 'calendar'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'A good executive ___ is usually one page and highlights only the most ___ information.', blanks: ['summary', 'important'], wordBank: ['summary', 'important', 'invoice', 'random', 'lengthy'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap every element that typically belongs in a formal business report.', items: [ { text: 'An introduction or background section', correct: true }, { text: 'Key findings or results', correct: true }, { text: 'Conclusions and recommendations', correct: true }, { text: 'Personal gossip about colleagues', correct: false }, { text: 'References or data sources', correct: true }, { text: 'Doodles from the writer\'s notebook', correct: false } ] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Which of these tasks can AI genuinely help with when writing reports and documents?', items: [ { text: 'Turning messy bullet points into professional paragraphs', correct: true }, { text: 'Suggesting headings and a logical structure', correct: true }, { text: 'Verifying that all your data figures are accurate', correct: false }, { text: 'Writing an executive summary from your notes', correct: true }, { text: 'Adjusting the tone from casual to formal', correct: true }, { text: 'Filing the document in your company\'s system automatically', correct: false } ] }, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'What is the term for a short overview at the start of a long report, written for busy senior readers who need the key points fast?', placeholder: 'Two words...', answers: ['executive summary', 'exec summary'], hint: 'Think of what a busy executive reads instead of the whole document.' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'Grace\'s Quarterly Report', prompt: 'Grace has collected all the data for the quarterly performance report. She has numbers, customer feedback quotes, and a few observations. Writing it up always takes her two full days. Her director wants it on Monday.', options: [ 'Stay in the office all weekend and write it manually', 'Submit raw data with no narrative and hope the director works it out', 'Feed her data and notes to AI, ask for a structured report draft, then review and refine it', 'Delegate the whole task to a junior colleague who has not seen the data' ], answer: 2, explanation: 'AI can produce a well-structured first draft from data and bullet notes in minutes. Grace then spends her time refining rather than creating from scratch — the report is ready by Friday afternoon.' } ], u10l4: [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'Ahmed does the same data entry task every morning: copying customer names from a form into a spreadsheet. AI can help most by:', options: [ 'Physically pressing the keyboard keys for him', 'Helping him draft a script or suggest an automation tool to handle the transfer', 'Reordering the data in a different language', 'Printing the forms automatically' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI can help you build simple automations or suggest tools that eliminate repetitive copy-paste work entirely.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Claire wants to use AI to manage her schedule. Which of the following is the most practical use?', options: [ 'Asking AI to physically drive her to meetings', 'Asking AI to draft a prioritised daily task list based on her deadlines and appointments', 'Asking AI to change the time zones on her computer', 'Asking AI to cancel all her meetings automatically' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI excels at organising information. Give it your deadlines and meetings and ask for a prioritised plan — it will draft a logical daily schedule in seconds.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Ben needs to process 50 paper forms into a digital record. He wants to use AI to speed this up. The first step is to:', options: [ 'Buy new office furniture', 'Shred all the paper forms', 'Understand what data fields need capturing so he can give AI a clear extraction task', 'Wait until all 50 forms arrive before deciding' ], answer: 2, explanation: 'Knowing what data you need before you involve AI means your prompt is precise, and the output is clean and consistent.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'AI is especially useful for ___ tasks that follow the same pattern every day, freeing you up for more ___ work.', blanks: ['repetitive', 'complex'], wordBank: ['repetitive', 'complex', 'boring', 'expensive', 'creative'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'When scheduling meetings, giving AI your ___ and available ___ slots helps it suggest the best plan.', blanks: ['priorities', 'time'], wordBank: ['priorities', 'time', 'lunch', 'password', 'furniture'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap the admin tasks where AI can save you significant time.', items: [ { text: 'Drafting standard reply emails', correct: true }, { text: 'Summarising long documents into key points', correct: true }, { text: 'Physically filing paper documents in a cabinet', correct: false }, { text: 'Building a prioritised to-do list from your notes', correct: true }, { text: 'Making a cup of tea', correct: false }, { text: 'Formatting data consistently across a spreadsheet', correct: true } ] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Which of these are good habits when using AI for daily admin?', items: [ { text: 'Always review AI output before sending or filing it', correct: true }, { text: 'Give AI clear, specific prompts rather than vague requests', correct: true }, { text: 'Trust AI to update your company records without checking', correct: false }, { text: 'Use AI for first drafts and refine them yourself', correct: true }, { text: 'Share confidential client data with public AI tools without thinking', correct: false }, { text: 'Re-use successful prompts as templates for future tasks', correct: true } ] }, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'What is the word for a set of repeated steps carried out automatically without human input each time?', placeholder: 'Type the word...', answers: ['automation', 'automated'], hint: 'The opposite of doing it manually every time.' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'Helen\'s Monday Morning', prompt: 'Helen starts every Monday by going through 30 emails, copying client names and enquiry types into a tracking spreadsheet, then writing a brief status report for her manager. This takes until lunchtime. Her manager has asked her to have the report ready by 9:30am.', options: [ 'Tell her manager it is not possible and ask for a different deadline', 'Come in on Sunday to prepare', 'Use AI to draft standard reply emails and the status report summary, then build a simple template to speed up the data entry step', 'Stop doing the spreadsheet and see if anyone notices' ], answer: 2, explanation: 'AI handles the narrative parts (replies, report summary) instantly. Even a simple copy-paste template speeds up the data entry. Combined, Helen\'s Monday morning task shrinks from four hours to about one.' } ], u11l1: [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'Gary is a bookkeeper. He has a client who finds numbers confusing. What is the best way to present a profit-and-loss summary?', options: [ 'Send the raw spreadsheet with no explanation', 'Ask AI to rewrite the figures as a plain-English narrative with key highlights', 'Use only accounting jargon so the client feels you are an expert', 'Send a 20-page report with every line item' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Clients who are not accountants need plain language. AI can translate your numbers into a clear, confident narrative in seconds.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Donna wants AI to write a client financial summary. She should tell AI the client\'s name, the period covered, and:', options: [ 'The client\'s star sign', 'Whether the client is technical or non-technical so the tone can be matched', 'The bookkeeper\'s home address', 'The client\'s favourite colour' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Tone should match the reader. A non-finance client needs simpler language than a CFO. This single detail dramatically improves the output.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Phil has used AI to write a client summary showing "strong revenue growth." Before sending it, he must:', options: [ 'Send it immediately — AI is always accurate with numbers', 'Check that the figures in the summary match his actual accounting records', 'Ask the client to verify the numbers themselves', 'Delete the figures and keep only the words' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI writes convincingly but does not audit figures. Phil must verify every number against the source data before a client summary goes out.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'AI can turn a column of ___ into a clear, readable ___ that any client can understand.', blanks: ['numbers', 'summary'], wordBank: ['numbers', 'summary', 'receipts', 'invoice', 'template'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'A good client summary highlights the most ___ trends and explains what they ___ for the business.', blanks: ['important', 'mean'], wordBank: ['important', 'mean', 'hidden', 'confusing', 'technical'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap every element that makes a client financial summary effective.', items: [ { text: 'Plain English instead of accounting jargon', correct: true }, { text: 'A brief highlight of the key result (profit, loss, cash position)', correct: true }, { text: 'Every journal entry from the period', correct: false }, { text: 'A short explanation of what the numbers mean for the business', correct: true }, { text: 'The bookkeeper\'s personal opinions about the client\'s spending habits', correct: false }, { text: 'Actionable observations or questions for the client to consider', correct: true } ] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Which prompts would help AI write a better client financial summary?', items: [ { text: '"The client is a small café owner with no finance background"', correct: true }, { text: '"Summarise Q3 results: revenue up 12%, expenses up 4%, net profit £8,200"', correct: true }, { text: '"Use as much technical jargon as possible"', correct: false }, { text: '"Keep the summary under 200 words"', correct: true }, { text: '"Invent positive figures to make the client feel good"', correct: false }, { text: '"End with one practical observation or suggestion"', correct: true } ] }, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'What term describes writing about financial results in everyday language that a non-accountant can understand?', placeholder: 'Two words...', answers: ['plain english', 'plain language', 'simple language'], hint: 'No jargon, no abbreviations — just everyday words.' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'Sandra\'s Nervous Client', prompt: 'Sandra prepares accounts for a small bakery owner named Jo. Jo always panics when she sees financial reports and calls Sandra asking for explanations that take 30 minutes each time. Sandra wants to reduce these calls.', options: [ 'Stop sending Jo any financial information', 'Send Jo a glossary of accounting terms and ask her to study it', 'Use AI to write a short, plain-English cover note with each report explaining what the numbers mean in simple terms', 'Charge Jo extra for explanation calls to discourage her from ringing' ], answer: 2, explanation: 'A one-page AI-written plain-English summary attached to each report answers Jo\'s questions before she even picks up the phone. Sandra\'s time is protected and Jo feels confident.' } ], u11l2: [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'Raj needs to send a payment reminder for an invoice 14 days overdue. Which tone is most effective?', options: [ 'Aggressive and threatening legal action immediately', 'Apologetic and uncertain, asking if the invoice was perhaps wrong', 'Firm, professional, and polite — assuming an oversight and requesting prompt payment', 'Casual and jokey, making light of the late payment' ], answer: 2, explanation: 'The best chasers are confident but not hostile. They assume the client forgot rather than refusing to pay, which preserves the relationship while still prompting action.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Fiona wants AI to write a payment reminder. The most important information to include in her prompt is:', options: [ 'Her favourite food and the client\'s birthday', 'The invoice number, amount owed, original due date, and days overdue', 'The client\'s company registration number and postcode', 'The full text of their original contract' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'A payment chaser must reference the specific invoice and how overdue it is. Without these details, the client cannot identify the debt or act quickly.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Tom\'s first gentle reminder was ignored. He is now sending a second chaser. How should this email differ from the first?', options: [ 'It should be shorter and friendlier than the first', 'It should be slightly firmer in tone and mention next steps if payment is not received', 'It should be identical to the first email', 'It should threaten the client with public naming on social media' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Escalating chasers follow a natural progression: friendly reminder → firm reminder with next steps. AI can write each stage when prompted with the context.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'A payment reminder should always quote the ___ number and the exact ___ that is owed.', blanks: ['invoice', 'amount'], wordBank: ['invoice', 'amount', 'phone', 'meeting', 'summary'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'The tone of a payment chaser should be ___ and professional, never ___ or aggressive.', blanks: ['firm', 'rude'], wordBank: ['firm', 'rude', 'silent', 'confused', 'apologetic'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap every element a good first payment reminder email should include.', items: [ { text: 'Invoice number and amount due', correct: true }, { text: 'Original due date and how many days overdue', correct: true }, { text: 'Payment instructions or a link to pay', correct: true }, { text: 'Threats of immediate court action', correct: false }, { text: 'A polite assumption that the oversight was unintentional', correct: true }, { text: 'The bookkeeper\'s personal bank account details', correct: false } ] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Which of these are signs of a well-written AI payment chaser email?', items: [ { text: 'It references the correct invoice number', correct: true }, { text: 'It matches the right tone for the stage of the chase', correct: true }, { text: 'It contains threats that could damage the client relationship unnecessarily', correct: false }, { text: 'It gives the client a clear and easy way to pay', correct: true }, { text: 'It has a professional sign-off', correct: true }, { text: 'It copies in unrelated third parties without permission', correct: false } ] }, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'What informal term is used in bookkeeping for a follow-up email asking a client to pay an overdue invoice?', placeholder: 'Type the word...', answers: ['chaser', 'reminder', 'chase'], hint: 'You are chasing the payment.' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'Maria\'s Overdue Account', prompt: 'Maria is a bookkeeper. Her client David has an invoice that is 30 days overdue. She has already sent one polite reminder that was ignored. She wants to send a second, firmer message but does not want to lose the client relationship.', options: [ 'Write a very apologetic email saying maybe the invoice was wrong', 'Send a legal letter without any further correspondence', 'Ask AI to write a firm second reminder that references the first email, states the overdue period clearly, and outlines what happens next if payment is not received', 'Do nothing and write off the debt' ], answer: 2, explanation: 'A firm second chaser is entirely appropriate at 30 days. Referencing the first reminder shows it is not a first contact, and stating next steps (without threats) prompts the client to act before consequences kick in.' } ], u11l3: [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'A client asks Linda: "What does gross profit actually mean?" AI can help Linda by:', options: [ 'Refusing to define accounting terms', 'Providing a simple analogy — like a market stall keeping money after paying for stock but before paying the stallholder', 'Sending the client a link to a 200-page accounting textbook', 'Telling the client to hire their own accountant' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Analogies make abstract financial concepts concrete. AI is excellent at generating relatable, everyday comparisons that non-finance clients immediately understand.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Carlos wants to explain "cash flow" to a small business owner who is not financially trained. What prompt works best?', options: [ '"Define cash flow in technical accounting terms"', '"Explain cash flow to someone who runs a small hardware shop with no finance background, using a simple everyday example"', '"List every cash flow formula ever used in accountancy"', '"Write a cash flow explanation suitable for a university lecture"' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Specifying the audience and asking for an everyday example produces language the shop owner will actually understand and remember.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Sue is explaining why a business made a profit but has very little cash. The concept she needs to explain clearly is:', options: [ 'Depreciation schedules', 'The difference between profit (what you earned) and cash flow (what is actually in your account)', 'Double-entry bookkeeping', 'Tax band thresholds' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Many small business owners are confused when they are profitable but cash-poor. Explaining this distinction — profit vs cash — resolves most of that anxiety.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'When explaining finance to a non-finance client, replace ___ with everyday words and use a real-life ___ to make it stick.', blanks: ['jargon', 'example'], wordBank: ['jargon', 'example', 'formula', 'spreadsheet', 'report'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'AI is useful for finding the right ___ to explain a complex idea in a way that feels simple and ___.', blanks: ['words', 'clear'], wordBank: ['words', 'clear', 'technical', 'confusing', 'long'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap the financial terms that most often need explaining in plain English to non-finance clients.', items: [ { text: 'Cash flow', correct: true }, { text: 'Gross profit vs net profit', correct: true }, { text: 'Accounts payable vs accounts receivable', correct: true }, { text: 'Staple remover', correct: false }, { text: 'Depreciation', correct: true }, { text: 'The bookkeeper\'s favourite spreadsheet software', correct: false } ] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Which techniques make a plain-English financial explanation more effective?', items: [ { text: 'Using an analogy from everyday life (e.g. a household budget)', correct: true }, { text: 'Breaking the explanation into short, numbered steps', correct: true }, { text: 'Using as many acronyms as possible', correct: false }, { text: 'Starting with the "so what" — why it matters to them', correct: true }, { text: 'Including the full regulatory definition', correct: false }, { text: 'Keeping sentences short and direct', correct: true } ] }, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'What is the common two-word phrase for writing about money and finance in everyday language that anyone can understand?', placeholder: 'Two words...', answers: ['plain english', 'plain language', 'simple language'], hint: 'No acronyms, no jargon — just clear, everyday words.' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'Patrick\'s Confused Client', prompt: 'Patrick\'s client Ahmed runs a small plumbing business. Ahmed can see his bank balance is low even though his last quarterly accounts showed a profit. He phones Patrick in a panic asking "How can I be making money but have nothing in the bank?"', options: [ 'Tell Ahmed to read a book on accounting', 'Send Ahmed the full accounts with no explanation', 'Use AI to draft a short, plain-English explanation of how profit and cash flow differ — perhaps using an analogy like sending an invoice but waiting 60 days to be paid', 'Ignore the question and move on to the next client' ], answer: 2, explanation: 'Profit is earned when a sale is made; cash arrives when the invoice is paid. AI can write this explanation using a simple timing analogy that clicks instantly for a non-finance business owner.' } ], u11l4: [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'Yuki is preparing a month-end report for a client. She wants AI to help draft the narrative section. What should she provide to AI first?', options: [ 'The client\'s personal social media profiles', 'The key figures: revenue, expenses, net result, and any notable changes from last month', 'A photo of the client\'s office', 'The client\'s wish list for next year' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI needs the actual numbers and context before it can write a meaningful month-end narrative. Figures first, words second.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Marcus is writing an annual summary for a client. He wants it to show year-on-year comparisons. The best AI prompt includes:', options: [ 'Only this year\'s figures', 'Both this year\'s and last year\'s key figures, so AI can write a comparison', 'The names of every employee at the client\'s company', 'Quarterly weather reports from the same period' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Year-on-year comparisons need both data sets. Providing both lets AI write sentences like "Revenue grew 18% compared to the same period last year."' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Grace finishes the month-end AI draft and notices it says profit improved when her figures actually show a decline. She should:', options: [ 'Send it anyway — the client probably will not notice', 'Correct the figures in her prompt and regenerate, then verify again before sending', 'Tell the client the AI made a mistake and leave it at that', 'Delete the AI output and write the report by hand' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Always verify AI output against source figures. A quick correction to the prompt and a second generation is faster than writing by hand and still requires a final check.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'Month-end reports are stronger when AI writes the ___ narrative around verified ___ supplied by the bookkeeper.', blanks: ['explanatory', 'figures'], wordBank: ['explanatory', 'figures', 'decorative', 'guessed', 'random'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'An annual summary should highlight the biggest ___ and ___ of the year, not every individual transaction.', blanks: ['wins', 'challenges'], wordBank: ['wins', 'challenges', 'receipts', 'invoices', 'meetings'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap every section that typically belongs in a well-structured month-end client report.', items: [ { text: 'Revenue and expense totals for the month', correct: true }, { text: 'Comparison to the previous month or budget', correct: true }, { text: 'Key observations or notable changes', correct: true }, { text: 'A list of the bookkeeper\'s personal expenses', correct: false }, { text: 'Outstanding invoices or cash flow notes', correct: true }, { text: 'The bookkeeper\'s holiday plans', correct: false } ] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Which of these are good practices when using AI for period-end reporting?', items: [ { text: 'Provide AI with verified, accurate figures before asking for the narrative', correct: true }, { text: 'Always review and fact-check the AI draft against your records', correct: true }, { text: 'Let AI decide which figures to include without guidance', correct: false }, { text: 'Use consistent prompt templates for each client to save time month to month', correct: true }, { text: 'Send AI output directly to clients without reading it', correct: false }, { text: 'Ask AI to tailor the language to each client\'s level of financial knowledge', correct: true } ] }, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'What two-word phrase describes the accounting process of closing off records and reconciling accounts at the end of each month?', placeholder: 'Two words...', answers: ['month end', 'month-end'], hint: 'It happens on the last working day of each month.' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'Donna\'s Year-End Rush', prompt: 'Donna is a bookkeeper with six clients all needing annual summaries at the same time. She normally spends a full day per client writing these up. With six clients due in the same week, she is overwhelmed.', options: [ 'Tell half the clients she cannot do their summaries this year', 'Send all clients the same generic report with just the name changed', 'Create a reusable AI prompt template for annual summaries, fill in each client\'s figures, generate and review each draft in turn — completing all six in two days instead of six', 'Hire a temporary bookkeeper to write the summaries' ], answer: 2, explanation: 'A well-crafted, reusable AI prompt template is the answer. Plug in each client\'s figures, generate the draft, verify and refine. Six reports become a two-day job, not a six-day one.' } ], u12l1: [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'Ahmed receives a complaint from a customer who is very upset about a delayed delivery. What is the first thing his reply should do?', options: [ 'Explain in detail why the delay happened and who was responsible', 'Offer an immediate discount without acknowledging the complaint', 'Acknowledge the customer\'s frustration and apologise sincerely', 'Ask the customer to contact the delivery company directly' ], answer: 2, explanation: 'Acknowledgement comes first. Customers need to feel heard before they are ready to hear solutions. Jumping straight to explanations or discounts skips this critical step.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Claire asks AI to help write a complaint response. For the best output, she should tell AI:', options: [ 'Nothing — just ask AI to "write a reply"', 'The nature of the complaint, the customer\'s emotional state, and the resolution she is offering', 'Only the company name and her own job title', 'The customer\'s full personal details' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Context drives quality. The nature of the complaint, the customer\'s mood, and the resolution all shape the tone and content of a good response.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Ben has written an AI complaint response. Before sending it, he notices the tone sounds slightly defensive. He should:', options: [ 'Send it anyway — the customer is wrong', 'Prompt AI to "rewrite this response in a more empathetic and understanding tone"', 'Delete the response and write nothing', 'Forward the complaint to a different department without replying' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Refining AI output is a normal part of the process. A simple follow-up prompt asking for a warmer or more empathetic tone usually fixes defensiveness in one step.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'A good complaint response always ___ the customer\'s feelings before offering a ___ to the problem.', blanks: ['acknowledges', 'solution'], wordBank: ['acknowledges', 'solution', 'ignores', 'blames', 'invoice'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'Using AI to draft complaint responses saves time and helps you stay ___ even when the customer is very ___.', blanks: ['calm', 'angry'], wordBank: ['calm', 'angry', 'confused', 'silent', 'distracted'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap every element a professional complaint response should include.', items: [ { text: 'A sincere apology for the customer\'s experience', correct: true }, { text: 'Acknowledgement of the specific problem they raised', correct: true }, { text: 'A clear statement of what you will do to resolve it', correct: true }, { text: 'Telling the customer they are overreacting', correct: false }, { text: 'A friendly, professional closing', correct: true }, { text: 'A promise you know you cannot keep', correct: false } ] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Which phrases are appropriate in a professional complaint response?', items: [ { text: '"I completely understand how frustrating this must be"', correct: true }, { text: '"Thank you for bringing this to our attention"', correct: true }, { text: '"This is not really our problem"', correct: false }, { text: '"I\'d like to make this right for you"', correct: true }, { text: '"You should have read the terms and conditions more carefully"', correct: false }, { text: '"Here is what we are going to do to resolve this"', correct: true } ] }, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'What is the single most important quality a customer service response must show when handling a complaint?', placeholder: 'One word...', answers: ['empathy', 'understanding', 'compassion'], hint: 'It means showing you understand and care about how the customer feels.' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'Helen\'s Difficult Email', prompt: 'Helen works in customer service. She has just received a very angry email from a long-term customer called Gary who is furious that a product he ordered arrived broken. Helen is flustered and not sure what to say without making things worse.', options: [ 'Ignore the email until Gary calms down and contacts her again', 'Write a short reply defending the packaging process', 'Ask AI to draft a response that opens with a genuine apology, acknowledges the specific issue, offers a replacement or refund, and thanks Gary for his loyalty as a long-term customer', 'Forward the email to the warehouse team without replying to Gary' ], answer: 2, explanation: 'AI handles the emotional labour of finding the right words. Helen gives AI the key facts — broken product, long-term customer, replacement offer — and gets a measured, empathetic draft she can review and send with confidence.' } ], u12l2: [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'Phil wants to build an FAQ template library for his team. The best first step is to:', options: [ 'Immediately ask AI to guess what questions customers might have', 'Collect the actual questions customers ask most often, then use AI to write clear, consistent answers', 'Write all the answers himself and then ignore the real customer questions', 'Buy a book of customer service scripts' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Real customer questions are the foundation. Gather them from emails and call logs first, then use AI to write polished, consistent answers that your whole team can use.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Sandra\'s team uses different wording each time they answer the same question. This causes confusion. An AI-generated response library helps because:', options: [ 'It means only one person needs to answer emails', 'It gives every team member the same approved, consistent language for common questions', 'It automatically sends replies without human involvement', 'It translates replies into multiple languages' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'A response library is a shared set of approved answers. Every team member uses the same clear language, which builds customer trust and reduces errors.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Jo wants her FAQ template for "How do I return a product?" to always feel personal, not robotic. She should ask AI to:', options: [ 'Write the answer in a completely formal legal style', 'Write a warm, conversational answer that still covers every step of the return process clearly', 'Make the answer as short as possible, leaving out the steps', 'Copy the wording directly from the company\'s legal terms' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Templates can be warm and human. Asking AI for a conversational but complete answer gives the customer all the information they need while still feeling like a genuine person replied.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'A response ___ gives your team ready-made answers to common questions so every customer gets a ___ and helpful reply.', blanks: ['library', 'consistent'], wordBank: ['library', 'consistent', 'random', 'folder', 'different'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'Good FAQ templates should be easy to ___ and should cover the most ___ questions customers actually ask.', blanks: ['personalise', 'common'], wordBank: ['personalise', 'common', 'delete', 'technical', 'hidden'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap the types of questions that are good candidates for a customer service FAQ template library.', items: [ { text: '"How do I track my order?"', correct: true }, { text: '"What are your opening hours?"', correct: true }, { text: '"How do I return or exchange a product?"', correct: true }, { text: '"What is the CEO\'s salary?"', correct: false }, { text: '"How do I reset my password?"', correct: true }, { text: '"What is the meaning of life?"', correct: false } ] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Which of these make a template response library more useful for a customer service team?', items: [ { text: 'Organising templates by topic or category', correct: true }, { text: 'Including a placeholder like [Customer Name] for personalisation', correct: true }, { text: 'Reviewing and updating templates regularly as policies change', correct: true }, { text: 'Keeping the library secret so only managers can use it', correct: false }, { text: 'Ensuring every template has a clear, helpful answer', correct: true }, { text: 'Using only one template for every possible question', correct: false } ] }, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'What term describes a collection of pre-written, approved answers that a customer service team can use and adapt for common enquiries?', placeholder: 'Two words...', answers: ['template library', 'response library', 'answer library'], hint: 'A pre-built set of responses ready to use.' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'Raj\'s New Team', prompt: 'Raj has just taken over a customer service team. Every agent gives different answers to the same questions, some answers are wrong, and new starters take weeks to get up to speed. Customers are complaining about inconsistency.', options: [ 'Hire only experienced agents from now on', 'Make the team memorise all possible answers', 'Use AI to build a consistent FAQ template library from the most common customer questions, train the team on it, and update it regularly', 'Tell customers to use the website instead of contacting the team' ], answer: 2, explanation: 'A well-built AI template library solves all three problems: consistency, accuracy, and training speed. New starters follow the approved templates from day one and the whole team speaks with one voice.' } ], u12l3: [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'Fiona resolved a customer\'s problem last week. Sending a follow-up message is good customer service because:', options: [ 'It gives Fiona a chance to upsell more products', 'It shows the customer the company cares about their experience beyond the transaction', 'It is required by law', 'It allows Fiona to ask the customer to delete any negative reviews' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'A genuine follow-up builds loyalty. Customers who feel cared for are far more likely to return and recommend the business. It is one of the highest-value low-effort actions in customer service.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Tom uses AI to write follow-up emails after customer service interactions. For the best result, he should tell AI:', options: [ 'Nothing — ask AI to guess what happened', 'What the original issue was, how it was resolved, and the customer\'s name', 'Only the customer\'s email address', 'The date and time of the original complaint, nothing else' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Follow-up emails that reference the actual issue and its resolution feel personal and genuine. Without that context, AI produces generic messages that feel like a template.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Maria sends a follow-up email to a customer who purchased last month but has not ordered since. What is the most appropriate tone?', options: [ 'Pushy and sales-focused, with a hard sell for a new product', 'Warm and helpful — checking in and offering assistance without pressure', 'Formal and distant, as if writing to a stranger', 'Apologetic, assuming something went wrong' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Re-engagement messages should feel like genuine care, not a sales call. A warm check-in with an offer to help reopens the conversation without pressure.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'A well-timed follow-up message shows customers that your company ___ about them beyond just making the ___.', blanks: ['cares', 'sale'], wordBank: ['cares', 'sale', 'complains', 'ignores', 'invoice'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'Follow-up emails are most effective when they ___ the original issue and confirm the customer is now fully ___.', blanks: ['reference', 'satisfied'], wordBank: ['reference', 'satisfied', 'ignore', 'confused', 'charged'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap the situations where sending a follow-up message adds genuine value.', items: [ { text: 'After resolving a complaint, checking the solution worked', correct: true }, { text: 'After a first purchase, welcoming the customer', correct: true }, { text: 'After a long-standing customer has gone quiet', correct: true }, { text: 'Immediately after every customer service interaction, every day, multiple times', correct: false }, { text: 'After a product recall or service disruption', correct: true }, { text: 'Without any reason, just to fill the customer\'s inbox', correct: false } ] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Which of these make a follow-up email feel genuine rather than automated?', items: [ { text: 'Mentioning the specific issue or purchase the customer experienced', correct: true }, { text: 'Using the customer\'s name', correct: true }, { text: 'Sending at a relevant time (not weeks after the event)', correct: true }, { text: 'Sending an identical email to every customer regardless of their history', correct: false }, { text: 'Offering help or asking if they have any questions', correct: true }, { text: 'Making it obvious it was auto-generated with no personal detail', correct: false } ] }, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'What is the term for a customer who comes back to buy again because they had a great experience the first time?', placeholder: 'Two words...', answers: ['repeat customer', 'returning customer', 'loyal customer'], hint: 'They return because they trust you.' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'James\'s Post-Complaint Follow-Up', prompt: 'James resolved a complaint for a customer called Linda two weeks ago. He replaced her faulty item and apologised. He has not heard from her since and wonders if she is happy or still upset. His manager says happy customers spend more and refer friends.', options: [ 'Do nothing — if Linda was still unhappy she would have complained again', 'Send Linda a bulk promotional email with no reference to her complaint', 'Ask AI to write a short, warm follow-up checking she is happy with the replacement and thanking her for her patience during the issue', 'Phone Linda unexpectedly and ask her to leave a five-star review' ], answer: 2, explanation: 'A personal follow-up referencing the original issue closes the loop and shows Linda she was not just a ticket number. This kind of message turns a complaint into a loyalty moment.' } ], u12l4: [ { type: 'quiz', question: 'David is dealing with a customer who is escalating a complaint and demanding to speak to a manager. The right first step is to:', options: [ 'Immediately agree that everything is the company\'s fault', 'Tell the customer managers are too busy to speak to them', 'Stay calm, acknowledge the customer\'s frustration, and explain the escalation process clearly', 'Put the customer on hold and do nothing for ten minutes' ], answer: 2, explanation: 'Escalating customers need calm, not more friction. Acknowledging their frustration and explaining what happens next keeps the situation from getting worse.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Linda is preparing to call a customer about a difficult escalation. She asks AI to help. What is the most useful thing AI can do?', options: [ 'Make the phone call on her behalf', 'Help her rehearse by generating likely customer objections and suggested responses', 'Tell her to refuse the call', 'Write a script she must read word for word without deviating' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'AI is excellent at playing devil\'s advocate. Generating possible objections and calm responses helps Linda walk into the call prepared and confident.' }, { type: 'quiz', question: 'Carlos receives an angry escalation email that is personally offensive. Before replying, he should:', options: [ 'Reply immediately with equal emotion', 'Step away briefly, then ask AI to draft a professional response that addresses the complaint without engaging with the offensive tone', 'Ignore the email entirely', 'Forward the email to all colleagues to show them what he has to deal with' ], answer: 1, explanation: 'Replying while emotional almost always makes escalations worse. A short pause followed by an AI-assisted professional draft lets Carlos respond to the complaint — not the insults.' }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'When handling an escalation, staying ___ and focusing on the ___ rather than the emotion helps de-escalate the situation.', blanks: ['calm', 'solution'], wordBank: ['calm', 'solution', 'angry', 'argument', 'invoice'] }, { type: 'fill_blank', sentence: 'AI can help you prepare for difficult conversations by suggesting how to ___ objections and keep the tone ___.', blanks: ['handle', 'professional'], wordBank: ['handle', 'professional', 'ignore', 'aggressive', 'silent'] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Tap the approaches that help de-escalate a difficult customer situation.', items: [ { text: 'Acknowledging how frustrating the situation is for them', correct: true }, { text: 'Listening fully before offering a solution', correct: true }, { text: 'Explaining what you can do, rather than what you cannot', correct: true }, { text: 'Telling the customer they are being unreasonable', correct: false }, { text: 'Setting clear next steps and a timeline for resolution', correct: true }, { text: 'Matching the customer\'s angry
