tone to show you are serious', correct: false } ] }, { type: 'tap_correct', question: 'Which of these are good ways to use AI when preparing for a difficult customer escalation?', items: [ { text: 'Drafting a calm, professional opening statement', correct: true }, { text: 'Generating possible objections so you can prepare responses', correct: true }, { text: 'Asking AI to decide the outcome of the complaint for you', correct: false }, { text: 'Practising de-escalation language before a difficult call', correct: true }, { text: 'Writing a holding message while you investigate further', correct: true }, { text: 'Using AI to write a reply that dismisses the customer\'s concerns', correct: false } ] }, { type: 'type_answer', question: 'What is the term for when a customer service issue is passed to a more senior person or team because the frontline agent cannot resolve it?', placeholder: 'One word...', answers: ['escalation', 'escalate'], hint: 'The complaint moves up a level.' }, { type: 'scenario', title: 'Sue\'s Tricky Escalation', prompt: 'Sue works in customer service. A customer called Phil has been complaining for three weeks about a billing error. He has now sent a formal letter threatening to contact the ombudsman and post on social media. Sue\'s manager has asked her to handle the response.', options: [ 'Ignore the letter and hope Phil does not follow through', 'Send a brief email asking Phil to be patient and wait another two weeks', 'Use AI to draft a formal, empathetic response that acknowledges the length of the issue, apologises clearly, explains exactly what is being done to resolve the billing error, and provides a direct contact and resolution timeline', 'Tell Phil the ombudsman process is very slow and not worth pursuing' ], answer: 2, explanation: 'At this stage Phil needs specifics: what went wrong, what is being done, by when, and who he can contact directly. AI helps Sue draft a response that is formal enough to match the seriousness of the letter, empathetic enough to prevent escalation, and specific enough to actually satisfy Phil.' } ] }; // ── Question-pool randomisation ────────────────────────────────────────────── const STRUCTURAL_TYPES = new Set(['info', 'sim_chat', 'clari_react']); function buildSessionSlides(lesson) { const baseSlides = lesson.slides || []; const extraPool = lesson.pool || (typeof LESSON_POOLS !== 'undefined' && LESSON_POOLS[lesson.id]) || []; if (!extraPool.length) return baseSlides; // no pool → original experience // Separate structural (always shown) from question slides const structural = baseSlides.filter(s => STRUCTURAL_TYPES.has(s.type)); const baseQs = baseSlides.filter(s => !STRUCTURAL_TYPES.has(s.type)); // Full question pool = existing questions + extras const allQs = [...baseQs, ...extraPool]; // Fisher-Yates shuffle then take 10 for (let i = allQs.length - 1; i > 0; i--) { const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1)); [allQs[i], allQs[j]] = [allQs[j], allQs[i]]; } const picked = allQs.slice(0, 10); // Rebuild: hook/worked-example structural slides → questions → clari_react wrap-up const hookSlides = structural.filter(s => s.type !== 'clari_react'); const wrapSlides = structural.filter(s => s.type === 'clari_react'); return [...hookSlides, ...picked, ...wrapSlides]; } // Returns the session slides for the active lesson (randomised or original) function getSessionSlides() { return lessonState.sessionSlides || (findLesson(lessonState.lessonId) || {}).slides || []; } // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function startLesson(id) { const lesson = findLesson(id); if (!lesson) return; if (!lesson.free && !S.premium) { openPremiumModal(); return; } matchPendingLeft = null; let startSlideIdx = 0; if (S.resume_lesson && S.resume_lesson.lessonId === id) { startSlideIdx = S.resume_lesson.slideIdx || 0; } lessonState = { lessonId: id, slideIdx: startSlideIdx, sessionSlides: buildSessionSlides(lesson), hearts: S.hearts, wrongThisLesson: 0, xpEarned: 0, gemsEarned: 0, slideAnswered: false, practiceMode: false, practiceType: null, practiceQuestions: [], practiceIdx: 0, practiceScore: 0, timedInterval: null, timedSeconds: 60, matchSelected: null, matchLeftDone: new Set(), matchRightDone: new Set(), matchPairs: [], fillBlanks: [], fillBankUsed: [], tapSelected: new Set(), matchRightOrder: [], orderRail: [], orderAnswered: false, dcPlacements: {}, dcSelected: null, dcAnswered: false, correctStreak: 0, startTime: Date.now() }; if (startSlideIdx > 0) { showToast('Resuming where you left off...', 'info', 2000); } document.querySelectorAll('.view').forEach(v => v.classList.remove('active')); document.getElementById('view-lesson').classList.add('active'); document.getElementById('top-bar').classList.remove('visible'); document.getElementById('bottom-nav').classList.remove('visible'); // Hide unit jump FAB during lesson const fab = document.getElementById('unit-jump-fab'); if (fab) fab.style.display = 'none'; renderLessonSlide(); // Lesson elapsed timer (function() { var _timerEl = document.getElementById('lesson-timer'); if (_timerEl) _timerEl.textContent = '0:00'; if (lessonState.lessonTimerInterval) clearInterval(lessonState.lessonTimerInterval); lessonState.lessonTimerInterval = setInterval(function() { var _el = document.getElementById('lesson-timer'); if (!_el) return; var _elapsed = Math.floor((Date.now() - (lessonState.startTime || Date.now())) / 1000); var _m = Math.floor(_elapsed / 60); var _s = _elapsed % 60; _el.textContent = _m + ':' + (_s < 10 ? '0' : '') + _s; }, 1000); })(); // Clari lesson-start greeting: wave briefly then settle into thinking state if (startSlideIdx === 0) { setTimeout(function() { showClariPopup('waving', 'clari-waving', "Let's do this!", 1000); }, 200); setTimeout(function() { const el = document.querySelector('.slide-mascot-wrap'); if (el) { el.innerHTML = clariSVG('think', parseInt((el.querySelector('svg') || {}).getAttribute && (el.querySelector('svg')).getAttribute('width')) || 70); } }, 1300); } } function findLesson(id) { for (const unit of COURSE) { for (const lesson of unit.lessons) { if (lesson.id === id) return lesson; } } return null; } function closeLesson() { // If we're mid-lesson (not on complete screen) and have progress, confirm const lesson = findLesson(lessonState.lessonId); const midLesson = lesson && lessonState.slideIdx > 0 && lessonState.slideIdx < getSessionSlides().length; if (midLesson) { // Show inline confirm instead of browser confirm (no native dialogs) const footer = document.getElementById('lesson-footer'); if (footer && !document.getElementById('exit-confirm')) { footer.innerHTML = '
' + '
Leave this lesson? You can resume anytime.
' + '
' + '' + '' + '
' + '
'; return; } } doCloseLesson(); } function doCloseLesson() { TTSManager.stop(); if (_certOverlayTimeout) { clearTimeout(_certOverlayTimeout); _certOverlayTimeout = null; } if (lessonState.timedInterval) clearInterval(lessonState.timedInterval); if (lessonState.qfTimerInterval) clearInterval(lessonState.qfTimerInterval); if (lessonState.lessonTimerInterval) clearInterval(lessonState.lessonTimerInterval); showMainUI(); document.querySelectorAll('.view').forEach(v => v.classList.remove('active')); if (lessonState.practiceMode) { document.getElementById('view-practice').classList.add('active'); document.getElementById('nav-practice').classList.add('active'); renderPracticeTab(); setTimeout(() => showClariTip('practice_complete'), 600); } else { document.getElementById('view-learn').classList.add('active'); document.getElementById('nav-learn').classList.add('active'); renderLearnTab(); } } function renderLessonSlide() { const slides = getSessionSlides(); const totalSlides = slides.length; const idx = lessonState.slideIdx; const lesson = findLesson(lessonState.lessonId); // Progress bar const pct = totalSlides > 1 ? (idx / (totalSlides - 1)) * 100 : 0; document.getElementById('lesson-progress-bar').style.width = pct + '%'; // Thin reading progress bar at top of lesson view const _readBar = document.getElementById('lesson-read-progress'); if (_readBar) _readBar.style.width = (totalSlides > 1 ? ((idx + 1) / totalSlides) * 100 : 100) + '%'; document.getElementById('lesson-hearts').innerHTML = renderHearts(lessonState.hearts, 5); // Slide counter with breadcrumb const counterEl = document.getElementById('slide-counter'); if (counterEl) { const _bcUnit = COURSE.find(u => u.lessons.some(l => l.id === lessonState.lessonId)); const _bcLessonNum = _bcUnit ? _bcUnit.lessons.findIndex(l => l.id === lessonState.lessonId) + 1 : null; const _bcLessonTotal = _bcUnit ? _bcUnit.lessons.length : null; if (!lessonState.practiceMode && _bcUnit && _bcLessonNum) { counterEl.innerHTML = `Unit ${_bcUnit.num} • Lesson ${_bcLessonNum} of ${_bcLessonTotal}` + `Slide ${idx + 1}/${totalSlides}`; } else { counterEl.textContent = (idx + 1) + ' of ' + totalSlides; } } if (idx >= totalSlides) { renderLessonComplete(); return; } const slide = slides[idx]; lessonState.slideAnswered = false; lessonState.hintUsed = false; let contentHtml = ''; let footerHtml = ''; switch (slide.type) { case 'info': renderSlideInfo(slide); return; case 'quiz': contentHtml = renderSlideQuiz(slide); footerHtml = ``; break; case 'fill_blank': // Normalise sentence/blanks/wordBank → parts/bank/answers before state init if (slide.sentence && !slide.parts) { const _parts = []; slide.sentence.split('___').forEach((chunk, i, arr) => { _parts.push(chunk); if (i < arr.length - 1) _parts.push(null); }); slide.parts = _parts; slide.bank = slide.wordBank || slide.blanks || []; slide.answers = slide.blanks || []; // Ensure every answer word appears in the bank slide.answers.forEach(a => { if (!slide.bank.includes(a)) slide.bank.push(a); }); } lessonState.fillBlanks = new Array(slide.answers.length).fill(null); lessonState.fillBankUsed = new Array(slide.bank.length).fill(false); contentHtml = renderSlideFillBlank(slide); footerHtml = ``; break; case 'tap_correct': lessonState.tapSelected = new Set(); contentHtml = renderSlideTapCorrect(slide); footerHtml = ``; break; case 'sim_chat': contentHtml = renderSlideSimChat(slide); footerHtml = ``; break; case 'match_pairs': lessonState.matchSelected = null; lessonState.matchLeftDone = new Set(); lessonState.matchRightDone = new Set(); lessonState.matchPairs = slide.pairs.slice(); contentHtml = renderSlideMatchPairs(slide); footerHtml = ``; break; case 'scenario': contentHtml = renderSlideScenario(slide); footerHtml = ``; break; case 'quick_fire': renderSlideQuickFire(slide); return; case 'clari_react': addXP(10); lessonState.xpEarned = (lessonState.xpEarned || 0) + 10; contentHtml = renderSlideClariReact(slide, lesson); footerHtml = ``; break; case 'order_steps': lessonState.orderRail = new Array(slide.items.length).fill(null); lessonState.orderAnswered = false; contentHtml = renderSlideOrderSteps(slide); footerHtml = ``; break; case 'type_answer': contentHtml = renderSlideTypeAnswer(slide); footerHtml = ``; break; case 'drag_category': lessonState.dcPlacements = {}; lessonState.dcSelected = null; lessonState.dcAnswered = false; contentHtml = renderSlideDragCategory(slide); footerHtml = ``; break; } const lc = document.getElementById('lesson-content'); lc.innerHTML = contentHtml; lc.scrollTop = 0; document.getElementById('lesson-footer').innerHTML = footerHtml; } function advanceSlide() { TTSManager.stop(); const lesson = findLesson(lessonState.lessonId); if (!lesson) return; lessonState.slideIdx++; if (lessonState.slideIdx >= getSessionSlides().length) { renderLessonComplete(); } else { // Save resume state if (!lessonState.practiceMode) { save('resume_lesson', { lessonId: lessonState.lessonId, slideIdx: lessonState.slideIdx }); } renderLessonSlide(); } } // ---- SLIDE RENDERERS ---- function renderSlideInfo(slide) { let body = ''; // bullets if (slide.bullets && slide.bullets.length) { body += '
'; slide.bullets.forEach(function(b) { // Check for [iconname] tag at start, e.g. "[book] Some text" const tagMatch = b.match(/^\[(\w+)\]\s+(.+)$/); if (tagMatch) { body += '
' + bulletIcon(tagMatch[1]) + '
' + tagMatch[2] + '
'; } else { // Strip any leading emoji (characters in emoji range) for backwards compat const stripped = b.replace(/^[\u{1F300}-\u{1FAFF}\u{2600}-\u{26FF}\u{2700}-\u{27BF}\u2705\u274C\u26A0\u2139\uFE0F\u20E3]+\s*/u, ''); body += '
' + bulletIcon('check') + '
' + stripped + '
'; } }); body += '
'; } // example if (slide.example) { const _promptEsc = slide.example.prompt.replace(/'/g, "\\'").replace(/\n/g, ' '); body += '
' + '
' + ICONS.chat + ' REAL EXAMPLE
' + '
You type: "' + slide.example.prompt + '"
' + '
' + '
AI replies: "' + slide.example.response + '"
' + '
'; } // tip if (slide.tip) { body += '
' + ICONS.bulb + '
' + slide.tip + '
'; } const mainText = slide.text ? '
' + slide.text + '
' : ''; const infoContent = document.getElementById('lesson-content'); infoContent.innerHTML = '
' + clariSVG('waving', 72) + '
' + '
' + (slide.title || '') + '
' + mainText + (body ? '
' + body + '
' : ''); infoContent.scrollTop = 0; // Reading progress bar infoContent.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', '
'); let infoFooter = ''; if (TTSManager.enabled) { infoFooter += ''; } // Bookmark button for info slides if (slide.title) { const _infoTitle = slide.title; const _infoBullets = (slide.bullets || []).join('; '); const _alreadySaved = (S.glossary || []).some(t => t.term === _infoTitle); const _bookmarkLabel = _alreadySaved ? '\u{1F516} Saved to My Terms' : '\u{1F516} Save key points'; infoFooter += ``; } // Note button for info slides const _noteId = lessonState.lessonId; const _existNote = (S.notes || {})[_noteId] || ''; infoFooter += '
' + '' + '' + '' + '
'; document.getElementById('lesson-footer').innerHTML = infoFooter; // Attach scroll-based reading progress setTimeout(function() { var _lc = document.getElementById('lesson-content'); var _fill = document.getElementById('read-prog-fill'); var _pulsed = false; if (!_lc || !_fill) return; function _updateReadProg() { var scrollTop = _lc.scrollTop; var scrollHeight = _lc.scrollHeight - _lc.clientHeight; if (scrollHeight <= 0) { _fill.style.width = '100%'; _triggerNextPulse(); return; } var pct = Math.min(100, Math.round((scrollTop / scrollHeight) * 100)); _fill.style.width = pct + '%'; if (pct >= 85 && !_pulsed) { _triggerNextPulse(); _pulsed = true; } } function _triggerNextPulse() { var _nxt = document.querySelector('#lesson-footer .btn-green'); if (_nxt && !_nxt.classList.contains('next-btn-pulse')) { _nxt.classList.add('next-btn-pulse'); _nxt.addEventListener('animationend', function() { _nxt.classList.remove('next-btn-pulse'); }, { once: true }); } } _lc.addEventListener('scroll', _updateReadProg, { passive: true }); _updateReadProg(); }, 120); } function renderSlideQuiz(slide) { const _correct = slide.correct != null ? slide.correct : (slide.answer != null ? slide.answer : 0); const opts = slide.options.map((o, i) => `` ).join(''); const kbHint = ('ontouchstart' in window) ? '' : '
▲▼ navigate   Enter confirm   1–4 pick
'; setTimeout(function() { const allOpts = document.querySelectorAll('.quiz-options .quiz-option'); if (allOpts.length) { setupQuizKeyNav(allOpts, function(el, idx) { selectQuizOption(el, idx, _correct); }); } }, 50); return `
${clariSVG('think', 70)}
${slide.question}
${opts}
${slide.hint ? '
' + slide.hint + '
' : ''} ${kbHint}
`; } function selectQuizOption(el, idx, correct) { teardownQuizKeyNav(); if (lessonState.slideAnswered) return; const allOpts = el.closest('.quiz-options').querySelectorAll('.quiz-option'); allOpts.forEach(o => o.classList.remove('selected')); lessonState.slideAnswered = true; const isCorrect = idx === correct; if (isCorrect) { el.classList.add('correct'); addXP(10); SoundManager.playCorrect(); animateClari('happy', 800); showFeedback(true, getCorrectMsg()); lessonState.correctStreak = (lessonState.correctStreak || 0) + 1; if (lessonState.correctStreak === 3) { setTimeout(() => showClariTip('correct_streak_3'), 600); setTimeout(function() { const _s = document.querySelector('.slide-mascot-wrap svg'); if (_s) { _s.classList.add('clari-wiggle'); setTimeout(function(){ _s.classList.remove('clari-wiggle'); }, 800); } animateClari('excited', 800); }, 300); } if (lessonState.correctStreak === 5) { setTimeout(() => showClariTip('correct_streak_5'), 600); setTimeout(function() { const _s = document.querySelector('.slide-mascot-wrap svg'); if (_s) { _s.classList.add('clari-tada'); setTimeout(function(){ _s.classList.remove('clari-tada'); }, 1000); } animateClari('celebrating', 1000); }, 300); } // Streak toast: show "N in a row!" for every streak milestone >= 3 if (lessonState.correctStreak >= 3) { var _streak = lessonState.correctStreak; var _streakEmoji = _streak >= 7 ? '🧨' : _streak >= 5 ? '🔥🔥' : '🔥'; var _streakLabel = _streak === 3 ? '3 in a row!' : _streak === 5 ? '5 in a row!' : _streak + ' in a row!'; setTimeout(function() { showToast(_streakEmoji + ' ' + _streakLabel, 'success', 1500); }, 200); } // First correct answer on desktop — show keyboard shortcut tip if (lessonState.correctStreak === 1 && !('ontouchstart' in window)) { setTimeout(() => showClariTip('keyboard_tip'), 1200); } } else { el.classList.remove('wrong'); void el.offsetWidth; // force reflow to restart shake animation el.classList.add('wrong'); allOpts[correct].classList.remove('show-correct'); void allOpts[correct].offsetWidth; // force reflow to restart pulse animation allOpts[correct].classList.add('show-correct'); loseHeart(); SoundManager.playIncorrect(); animateClari('sad', 1200); setTimeout(function() { const _s = document.querySelector('.slide-mascot-wrap svg'); if (_s) { _s.classList.add('clari-shake'); setTimeout(function(){ _s.classList.remove('clari-shake'); }, 600); } }, 50); recordWrongAnswer(lessonState.lessonId, el.textContent, idx); // Clari reacts to wrong answers — cap at 5 reactions per lesson to avoid spam if ((lessonState.wrongThisLesson || 0) <= 5) { if (lessonState.wrongThisLesson === 1) { setTimeout(function() { showClariPopup('nervous_sweat', 'clari-nervous', 'Almost! Try again.', 1500); }, 600); } else { setTimeout(function() { showClariPopup('encouraging', 'clari-bounce', 'You can do it!', 1500); }, 600); } } showFeedback(false, getWrongMsg(), allOpts[correct].textContent.trim()); lessonState.correctStreak = 0; // Show explanation if present const _qSlide = getSessionSlides()[lessonState.slideIdx]; const expEl = document.getElementById('answer-explanation'); if (expEl && _qSlide && _qSlide.explanation) { expEl.innerHTML = '
\uD83D\uDCA1 ' + _qSlide.explanation + '
'; expEl.style.display = 'block'; } } const btn = document.getElementById('lesson-next-btn'); if (btn) btn.disabled = false; } function showFeedback(correct, msg, correctAnswerText) { const fb = document.getElementById('quiz-feedback') || document.getElementById('tap-feedback') || document.getElementById('fill-feedback'); if (!fb) return; const icon = correct ? `` : ``; const correctLine = (!correct && correctAnswerText) ? `
Correct answer: ${correctAnswerText}
` : ''; fb.innerHTML = `
${icon}
${msg}
${correctLine}
`; } // ---- FILL BLANK ---- function renderSlideFillBlank(slide) { // Normalise sentence/blanks/wordBank format → parts/bank/answers if (slide.sentence && !slide.parts) { const parts = []; slide.sentence.split('___').forEach((chunk, i, arr) => { parts.push(chunk); if (i < arr.length - 1) parts.push(null); }); slide.parts = parts; slide.bank = slide.wordBank || slide.blanks || []; slide.answers = slide.blanks || []; } let partsHtml = ''; let blankCount = 0; slide.parts.forEach(part => { if (part === null) { const bi = blankCount++; partsHtml += `        `; } else { partsHtml += `${part}`; } }); const bankHtml = slide.bank.map((word, i) => `` ).join(''); return `
${clariSVG('think', 70)}
Fill in the blanks:
${partsHtml}
Word bank — tap to place:
${bankHtml}
`; } function selectWordChip(el, chipIdx, word) { if (el.classList.contains('used')) return; // Find first empty blank const blanks = lessonState.fillBlanks; const firstEmpty = blanks.indexOf(null); if (firstEmpty === -1) return; blanks[firstEmpty] = { word, chipIdx }; lessonState.fillBankUsed[chipIdx] = true; el.classList.add('used'); const blankEl = document.getElementById('blank-' + firstEmpty); const blankText = document.getElementById('blank-text-' + firstEmpty); if (blankEl && blankText) { blankText.textContent = word; blankEl.classList.add('filled'); } const allFilled = blanks.every(b => b !== null); const btn = document.getElementById('lesson-next-btn'); if (btn) btn.disabled = !allFilled; } function clearBlank(bi) { const entry = lessonState.fillBlanks[bi]; if (!entry) return; lessonState.fillBlanks[bi] = null; const chip = document.getElementById('chip-' + entry.chipIdx); if (chip) chip.classList.remove('used'); const blankEl = document.getElementById('blank-' + bi); const blankText = document.getElementById('blank-text-' + bi); if (blankEl && blankText) { blankText.innerHTML = '      '; blankEl.classList.remove('filled', 'correct', 'wrong'); } const btn = document.getElementById('lesson-next-btn'); if (btn) btn.disabled = true; } function checkFillBlank() { const slide = getSessionSlides()[lessonState.slideIdx]; if (!slide) return; let allCorrect = true; lessonState.fillBlanks.forEach((entry, i) => { const correct = entry && entry.word.toLowerCase() === slide.answers[i].toLowerCase(); const blankEl = document.getElementById('blank-' + i); if (blankEl) { blankEl.classList.remove('filled'); blankEl.classList.add(correct ? 'correct' : 'wrong'); } if (!correct) allCorrect = false; }); if (allCorrect) { addXP(10); SoundManager.playCorrect(); const fb = document.getElementById('fill-feedback'); if (fb) fb.innerHTML = `
${getCorrectMsg()}
`; const btn = document.getElementById('lesson-next-btn'); if (btn) { btn.textContent = 'Continue'; btn.onclick = advanceSlide; btn.disabled = false; } } else { loseHeart(); SoundManager.playIncorrect(); const fb = document.getElementById('fill-feedback'); if (fb) fb.innerHTML = `
${getWrongMsg()} Check the red blanks and try again.
`; // Reset wrong blanks lessonState.fillBlanks.forEach((entry, i) => { const blankEl = document.getElementById('blank-' + i); if (blankEl && blankEl.classList.contains('wrong')) { const chipIdx = entry ? entry.chipIdx : -1; if (chipIdx >= 0) { const chip = document.getElementById('chip-' + chipIdx); if (chip) chip.classList.remove('used'); } lessonState.fillBlanks[i] = null; const blankText = document.getElementById('blank-text-' + i); if (blankText) blankText.innerHTML = '      '; blankEl.classList.remove('wrong', 'filled'); } }); const btn = document.getElementById('lesson-next-btn'); if (btn) btn.disabled = true; } } // ---- TAP CORRECT ---- function renderSlideTapCorrect(slide) { const itemsHtml = slide.items.map((item, i) => `
${item.text}
` ).join(''); return `
${clariSVG('think', 70)}
${slide.question}
Tap all that apply, then press Check.
${itemsHtml}
`; } function toggleTapItem(el, idx) { if (el.classList.contains('correct')) return; // locked — correctly selected // Clear error-state highlighting when user taps to fix their answer el.classList.remove('wrong', 'missed'); const tapChk = document.getElementById('tap-check-' + idx); if (lessonState.tapSelected.has(idx)) { lessonState.tapSelected.delete(idx); el.classList.remove('tapped'); if (tapChk) tapChk.innerHTML = ``; } else { lessonState.tapSelected.add(idx); el.classList.add('tapped'); if (tapChk) tapChk.innerHTML = ``; } const btn = document.getElementById('lesson-next-btn'); if (btn) btn.disabled = lessonState.tapSelected.size === 0; } function checkTapCorrect() { const slide = getSessionSlides()[lessonState.slideIdx]; if (!slide) return; const correctIdxs = new Set(slide.items.map((item, i) => item.correct ? i : -1).filter(i => i >= 0)); let allGood = true; slide.items.forEach((item, i) => { const el = document.querySelector(`.tap-item[data-idx="${i}"]`); if (!el) return; el.classList.remove('tapped'); if (item.correct && lessonState.tapSelected.has(i)) { el.classList.add('correct'); const chk = document.getElementById('tap-check-' + i); if (chk) chk.innerHTML = ``; } else if (!item.correct && lessonState.tapSelected.has(i)) { el.classList.add('wrong'); allGood = false; } else if (item.correct && !lessonState.tapSelected.has(i)) { el.classList.add('missed'); allGood = false; } }); if (allGood) { addXP(10); SoundManager.playCorrect(); animateClari('happy', 800); const fb = document.getElementById('tap-feedback'); if (fb) fb.innerHTML = `
${getCorrectMsg()}
`; const btn = document.getElementById('lesson-next-btn'); if (btn) { btn.textContent = 'Keep going!'; btn.onclick = advanceSlide; btn.disabled = false; } } else { loseHeart(); SoundManager.playIncorrect(); animateClari('sad', 1200); setTimeout(function() { const _s = document.querySelector('.slide-mascot-wrap svg'); if (_s) { _s.classList.add('clari-shake'); setTimeout(function(){ _s.classList.remove('clari-shake'); }, 600); } }, 50); const fb = document.getElementById('tap-feedback'); if (fb) fb.innerHTML = `
${getWrongMsg()} Yellow = missed, red = wrong — tap items to fix your answer!
`; // Keep red/yellow highlighting visible so user can see what to fix. // tapSelected stays as-is (wrong items remain selected; missed items remain deselected). // toggleTapItem now allows tapping wrong/missed items to fix them. const btn = document.getElementById('lesson-next-btn'); if (btn) btn.disabled = true; // re-enable once user taps something } } // ---- SIM CHAT ---- function renderSlideSimChat(slide) { const chatHtml = slide.messages.map(m => { if (m.role === 'user') { return `
${m.text.replace(/\n/g,'
')}
`; } else { return `
${clariSVG('happy', 30)}
${m.text.replace(/\n/g,'
')}
`; } }).join(''); const optsHtml = (slide.options || []).map((o, i) => `` ).join(''); return `
${chatHtml}
${slide.prompt}
${optsHtml}
`; } function selectSimOption(el, idx, correct) { if (lessonState.slideAnswered) return; const allOpts = el.closest('.quiz-options').querySelectorAll('.quiz-option'); allOpts.forEach(o => o.classList.remove('selected')); lessonState.slideAnswered = true; if (idx === correct) { el.classList.add('correct'); addXP(10); SoundManager.playCorrect(); showFeedback(true, getCorrectMsg()); } else { el.classList.add('wrong'); allOpts[correct].classList.add('show-correct'); loseHeart(); SoundManager.playIncorrect(); showFeedback(false, getWrongMsg(), allOpts[correct].textContent.trim()); } const btn = document.getElementById('lesson-next-btn'); if (btn) btn.disabled = false; } // ---- MATCH PAIRS ---- function renderSlideMatchPairs(slide) { // Normalise array-of-arrays format → array of {left, right} objects if (Array.isArray(slide.pairs) && Array.isArray(slide.pairs[0])) { slide.pairs = slide.pairs.map(p => ({ left: p[0], right: p[1] })); } // Fisher-Yates shuffle of right column const rightOrder = slide.pairs.map((p, i) => ({ right: p.right, pairIdx: i })); for (let i = rightOrder.length - 1; i > 0; i--) { const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1)); [rightOrder[i], rightOrder[j]] = [rightOrder[j], rightOrder[i]]; } lessonState.matchRightOrder = rightOrder; const leftHtml = slide.pairs.map((p, i) => `
${p.left}
` ).join(''); const rightHtml = rightOrder.map((p, i) => `
${p.right}
` ).join(''); return `
${clariSVG('think', 70)}
${slide.title || slide.question || 'Match each item with its pair.'}
Term
Definition
${leftHtml}
${rightHtml}
`; } let matchPendingLeft = null; function matchSelect(side, idx) { const slide = getSessionSlides()[lessonState.slideIdx]; if (!slide) return; const el = document.getElementById((side === 'left' ? 'ml-' : 'mr-') + idx); if (!el || el.classList.contains('matched')) return; if (side === 'left') { // Deselect any previously selected left document.querySelectorAll('#match-left .match-item.selected').forEach(e => e.classList.remove('selected')); matchPendingLeft = idx; el.classList.add('selected'); } else { // right side selected — try to match if (matchPendingLeft === null) return; const leftEl = document.getElementById('ml-' + matchPendingLeft); const rightOrder = lessonState.matchRightOrder || slide.pairs.map((p, i) => ({ right: p.right, pairIdx: i })); const isCorrect = rightOrder[idx].pairIdx === matchPendingLeft; if (isCorrect) { leftEl.classList.remove('selected'); leftEl.classList.add('matched'); el.classList.add('matched'); matchPendingLeft = null; addXP(5); // Check if all matched const total = slide.pairs.length; const matched = document.querySelectorAll('#match-left .matched').length; if (matched === total) { const fb = document.getElementById('match-feedback'); if (fb) fb.innerHTML = `
All matched correctly!
`; const btn = document.getElementById('lesson-next-btn'); if (btn) btn.disabled = false; } } else { // Wrong match leftEl.classList.add('wrong'); el.classList.add('wrong'); loseHeart(); setTimeout(() => { leftEl.classList.remove('wrong', 'selected'); el.classList.remove('wrong'); matchPendingLeft = null; }, 800); } } } // ---- CLARI REACT ---- function renderSlideClariReact(slide, lesson) { const moodMap = { celebrating: 'celebrating', happy: 'happy', excited: 'excited', encouraging: 'encouraging', warning: 'think', thinking: 'think', waving: 'waving' }; const clariState = moodMap[slide.mood] || 'excited'; const emojiHtml = slide.emoji ? `
${slide.emoji}
` : ''; return `
${clariSVG(clariState, 110)}
${emojiHtml}
${slide.msg || slide.message || ''}
`; } // ---- ORDER STEPS ---- function renderSlideOrderSteps(slide) { // Shuffle items for the pool const shuffled = slide.items.map((item, i) => ({ item, origIdx: i })).sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5); lessonState.orderRail = new Array(slide.items.length).fill(null); const poolHtml = shuffled.map(({ item, origIdx }) => { return ``; }).join(''); const railHtml = slide.items.map((_, ri) => `
${ri + 1}
` ).join(''); return `
${clariSVG('think', 70)}
${slide.question}
Tap to add in order:
${poolHtml}
Your sequence:
${railHtml}
`; } function orderChipClick(origIdx) { if (lessonState.orderAnswered) return; // Find first empty slot const rail = lessonState.orderRail; const firstEmpty = rail.indexOf(null); if (firstEmpty === -1) return; rail[firstEmpty] = origIdx; // Hide chip in pool const chip = document.getElementById('oc-' + origIdx); if (chip) chip.classList.add('placed'); // Fill slot const slot = document.getElementById('os-' + firstEmpty); const slotText = document.getElementById('os-text-' + firstEmpty); if (slot && slotText) { const slide = getSessionSlides()[lessonState.slideIdx]; slotText.textContent = slide ? slide.items[origIdx] : ''; slot.classList.add('has-chip'); slot.dataset.origIdx = origIdx; } // Enable check button once all slots filled const allFilled = rail.every(v => v !== null); const btn = document.getElementById('lesson-next-btn'); if (btn) btn.disabled = !allFilled; } function orderSlotClick(ri) { if (lessonState.orderAnswered) return; const origIdx = lessonState.orderRail[ri]; if (origIdx === null || origIdx === undefined) return; // Return chip to pool const chip = document.getElementById('oc-' + origIdx); if (chip) chip.classList.remove('placed'); // Clear slot lessonState.orderRail[ri] = null; const slot = document.getElementById('os-' + ri); const slotText = document.getElementById('os-text-' + ri); if (slot && slotText) { slotText.textContent = ''; slot.classList.remove('has-chip', 'correct', 'wrong'); } const btn = document.getElementById('lesson-next-btn'); if (btn) btn.disabled = true; } function checkOrderSteps() { if (lessonState.orderAnswered) return; const slide = getSessionSlides()[lessonState.slideIdx]; if (!slide) return; const rail = lessonState.orderRail; let allCorrect = true; rail.forEach((origIdx, ri) => { const slot = document.getElementById('os-' + ri); if (!slot) return; slot.classList.remove('has-chip'); if (origIdx === ri) { slot.classList.add('correct'); } else { slot.classList.add('wrong'); allCorrect = false; } }); lessonState.orderAnswered = true; const fb = document.getElementById('order-feedback'); if (allCorrect) { addXP(10); SoundManager.playCorrect(); animateClari('happy', 800); if (fb) fb.innerHTML = `
${getCorrectMsg()}
`; const btn = document.getElementById('lesson-next-btn'); if (btn) { btn.textContent = 'Continue'; btn.onclick = advanceSlide; btn.disabled = false; } } else { loseHeart(); SoundManager.playIncorrect(); animateClari('sad', 1200); setTimeout(function() { const _s = document.querySelector('.slide-mascot-wrap svg'); if (_s) { _s.classList.add('clari-shake'); setTimeout(function(){ _s.classList.remove('clari-shake'); }, 600); } }, 50); if (fb) { const expText = slide.explanation ? `
${slide.explanation}
` : ''; fb.innerHTML = `
${getWrongMsg()} Red slots are in the wrong position.${expText}
`; } // Reset for retry setTimeout(() => { lessonState.orderAnswered = false; lessonState.orderRail = new Array(slide.items.length).fill(null); // Re-show all pool chips slide.items.forEach((_, i) => { const chip = document.getElementById('oc-' + i); if (chip) chip.classList.remove('placed'); }); // Clear all slots slide.items.forEach((_, ri) => { const slot = document.getElementById('os-' + ri); const slotText = document.getElementById('os-text-' + ri); if (slot) slot.classList.remove('has-chip', 'correct', 'wrong'); if (slotText) slotText.textContent = ''; }); const btn = document.getElementById('lesson-next-btn'); if (btn) { btn.textContent = 'Check Order'; btn.onclick = checkOrderSteps; btn.disabled = true; } if (fb) fb.innerHTML = ''; }, 1800); } } // ---- TYPE ANSWER ---- function renderSlideTypeAnswer(slide) { const hintBtn = slide.hint ? `` : ''; const hintDiv = slide.hint ? `
${slide.hint}
` : ''; return `
${clariSVG('think', 70)}
${slide.question}
${hintBtn}
${hintDiv}
`; } function onTypeAnswerInput() { const inp = document.getElementById('type-answer-input'); const btn = document.getElementById('lesson-next-btn'); if (btn) btn.disabled = !inp || inp.value.trim().length === 0; } function toggleTypeHint() { const el = document.getElementById('type-hint-text'); if (el) el.classList.toggle('visible'); } function checkTypeAnswer() { const slide = getSessionSlides()[lessonState.slideIdx]; if (!slide) return; const inp = document.getElementById('type-answer-input'); if (!inp || lessonState.slideAnswered) return; const userVal = inp.value.trim().toLowerCase(); const isCorrect = slide.answers.some(a => userVal.includes(a.toLowerCase()) || a.toLowerCase().includes(userVal)); lessonState.slideAnswered = true; inp.disabled = true; const fb = document.getElementById('type-feedback'); if (isCorrect) { inp.classList.add('correct'); addXP(10); SoundManager.playCorrect(); animateClari('happy', 800); if (fb) fb.innerHTML = `
${getCorrectMsg()}
`; const btn = document.getElementById('lesson-next-btn'); if (btn) { btn.textContent = 'Continue'; btn.onclick = advanceSlide; btn.disabled = false; } // Auto-save to glossary const _cSlide = getSessionSlides()[lessonState.slideIdx]; if (_cSlide && _cSlide.answers && _cSlide.answers[0]) { saveToGlossary( _cSlide.answers[0], _cSlide.question || _cSlide.placeholder || '', lessonState.lessonTitle || 'Lesson' ); } } else { inp.classList.add('wrong'); loseHeart(); SoundManager.playIncorrect(); animateClari('sad', 1200); setTimeout(function() { const _s = document.querySelector('.slide-mascot-wrap svg'); if (_s) { _s.classList.add('clari-shake'); setTimeout(function(){ _s.classList.remove('clari-shake'); }, 600); } }, 50); const accepted = slide.answers.join(', '); if (fb) fb.innerHTML = `
${getWrongMsg()}
Accepted answers: ${accepted}
`; const btn = document.getElementById('lesson-next-btn'); if (btn) { btn.textContent = 'Continue'; btn.onclick = advanceSlide; btn.disabled = false; } } } // ---- DRAG CATEGORY ---- function renderSlideDragCategory(slide) { lessonState.dcPlacements = {}; lessonState.dcSelected = null; const chipsHtml = slide.items.map((item, i) => `
${item.text}
` ).join(''); const bucketsHtml = slide.categories.map((cat, ci) => `
${cat}
` ).join(''); return `
${clariSVG('think', 70)}
${slide.question}
Tap a chip then tap a bucket:
${chipsHtml}
${bucketsHtml}
`; } function dcChipClick(idx) { if (lessonState.dcAnswered) return; const slide = getSessionSlides()[lessonState.slideIdx]; if (!slide) return; // If chip is already placed, return it to pool const placedCat = lessonState.dcPlacements[idx]; if (placedCat !== undefined) { // Find zone for this category and remove the placed chip element const catIdx = slide.categories.indexOf(placedCat); if (catIdx >= 0) { const zone = document.getElementById('dc-zone-' + catIdx); if (zone) { const placed = zone.querySelector(`[data-chip-idx="${idx}"]`); if (placed) placed.remove(); } } delete lessonState.dcPlacements[idx]; const chip = document.getElementById('dc-chip-' + idx); if (chip) { chip.classList.remove('placed', 'selected'); } lessonState.dcSelected = null; dcUpdateCheckBtn(slide); return; } // Select/deselect chip document.querySelectorAll('.dc-chip.selected').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('selected')); if (lessonState.dcSelected === idx) { lessonState.dcSelected = null; return; } lessonState.dcSelected = idx; const chip = document.getElementById('dc-chip-' + idx); if (chip) chip.classList.add('selected'); } function dcBucketClick(catIdx) { if (lessonState.dcAnswered) return; if (lessonState.dcSelected === null || lessonState.dcSelected === undefined) return; const slide = getSessionSlides()[lessonState.slideIdx]; if (!slide) return; const itemIdx = lessonState.dcSelected; const catName = slide.categories[catIdx]; // Place chip into zone const chip = document.getElementById('dc-chip-' + itemIdx); if (chip) { chip.classList.remove('selected'); chip.classList.add('placed'); } lessonState.dcPlacements[itemIdx] = catName; lessonState.dcSelected = null; const zone = document.getElementById('dc-zone-' + catIdx); if (zone) { const placedEl = document.createElement('div'); placedEl.className = 'dc-placed-chip'; placedEl.dataset.chipIdx = itemIdx; placedEl.textContent = slide.items[itemIdx].text; placedEl.onclick = function() { dcChipClick(itemIdx); }; zone.appendChild(placedEl); } dcUpdateCheckBtn(slide); } function dcUpdateCheckBtn(slide) { const allPlaced = slide.items.every((_, i) => lessonState.dcPlacements[i] !== undefined); const btn = document.getElementById('lesson-next-btn'); if (btn) btn.disabled = !allPlaced; } function checkDragCategory() { const slide = getSessionSlides()[lessonState.slideIdx]; if (!slide) return; lessonState.dcAnswered = true; let anyWrong = false; let xpGained = 0; slide.items.forEach((item, i) => { const userCat = lessonState.dcPlacements[i]; const isCorrect = userCat === item.cat; // Find the placed chip element in the zone const catIdx = slide.categories.indexOf(userCat); if (catIdx >= 0) { const zone = document.getElementById('dc-zone-' + catIdx); if (zone) { const placedEl = zone.querySelector(`[data-chip-idx="${i}"]`); if (placedEl) { placedEl.classList.add(isCorrect ? 'correct-item' : 'wrong-item'); } if (!isCorrect) zone.classList.add('wrong-zone'); } } if (isCorrect) { xpGained += 5; } else { anyWrong = true; } }); // Colour zones slide.categories.forEach((cat, ci) => { const zone = document.getElementById('dc-zone-' + ci); if (!zone) return; const hasWrong = Array.from(zone.querySelectorAll('.wrong-item')).length > 0; const hasPlaced = Array.from(zone.querySelectorAll('.dc-placed-chip')).length > 0; if (hasPlaced && !hasWrong) zone.classList.add('correct-zone'); }); const fb = document.getElementById('dc-feedback'); if (!anyWrong) { addXP(xpGained); SoundManager.playCorrect(); animateClari('happy', 800); if (fb) fb.innerHTML = `
${getCorrectMsg()} +${xpGained} XP!
`; const btn = document.getElementById('lesson-next-btn'); if (btn) { btn.textContent = 'Continue'; btn.onclick = advanceSlide; btn.disabled = false; } } else { loseHeart(); SoundManager.playIncorrect(); animateClari('sad', 1200); setTimeout(function() { const _s = document.querySelector('.slide-mascot-wrap svg'); if (_s) { _s.classList.add('clari-shake'); setTimeout(function(){ _s.classList.remove('clari-shake'); }, 600); } }, 50); if (xpGained > 0) addXP(xpGained); // partial credit for correct placements if (fb) { const expText = slide.explanation ? `
${slide.explanation}
` : ''; fb.innerHTML = `
${getWrongMsg()} Red items are in the wrong bucket.${expText}
`; } const btn = document.getElementById('lesson-next-btn'); if (btn) { btn.textContent = 'Continue'; btn.onclick = advanceSlide; btn.disabled = false; } } } function renderSlideScenario(slide) { window.scenarioSlideRef = slide; // New format: { situation, question, options:[], correct, explanation } if (slide.options) { let choicesHtml = slide.options.map((opt, i) => `` ).join(''); const setupText = slide.situation || slide.prompt || ''; const questionText = slide.question || slide.title || ''; return `
${setupText}
${questionText ? `
${questionText}
` : ''}
${choicesHtml}
`; } // Old format: { character, setup, choices:[{text,outcome,result}], correct, lesson } let choicesHtml = (slide.choices || []).map((c, i) => `` ).join(''); return `
${slide.character || ''}
${slide.setup || ''}
${choicesHtml}
`; } function selectScenarioNew(el, idx) { const slide = window.scenarioSlideRef; const wrap = document.getElementById('scenario-choices'); wrap.querySelectorAll('.scenario-choice').forEach(b => b.disabled = true); el.classList.add('selected'); const _correctIdx = slide.correct != null ? slide.correct : (slide.answer != null ? slide.answer : 0); const isCorrect = idx === _correctIdx; const outcomeEl = document.getElementById('scenario-outcome'); const lessonEl = document.getElementById('scenario-lesson'); if (isCorrect) { addXP(10); lessonState.xpEarned = (lessonState.xpEarned || 0) + 10; animateClari('happy', 900); outcomeEl.classList.add('scenario-correct'); outcomeEl.classList.remove('scenario-wrong'); outcomeEl.innerHTML = ` Correct!`; save('scenario_correct', (S.scenario_correct || 0) + 1); } else { loseHeart(); animateClari('sad', 1200); setTimeout(function() { const _s = document.querySelector('.slide-mascot-wrap svg'); if (_s) { _s.classList.add('clari-shake'); setTimeout(function(){ _s.classList.remove('clari-shake'); }, 600); } }, 50); outcomeEl.classList.add('scenario-wrong'); outcomeEl.classList.remove('scenario-correct'); outcomeEl.innerHTML = ` Not quite.`; } if (slide.explanation) { outcomeEl.innerHTML += `
${slide.explanation}
`; } outcomeEl.classList.remove('hidden'); lessonEl.innerHTML = `
${clariSVG('thinking', 36)} ${slide.lesson || slide.explanation || (isCorrect ? 'Well done!' : `Best answer: ${slide.options[_correctIdx]}`)}
`; lessonEl.classList.remove('hidden'); const btn = document.getElementById('lesson-next-btn'); if (btn) btn.disabled = false; } function selectScenarioChoice(el, idx, slide) { // Disable all buttons const wrap = document.getElementById('scenario-choices'); wrap.querySelectorAll('.scenario-choice').forEach(b => b.disabled = true); el.classList.add('selected'); const choice = slide.choices[idx]; const outcomeEl = document.getElementById('scenario-outcome'); const lessonEl = document.getElementById('scenario-lesson'); // Colour by outcome const colours = { good: '#22c55e', risky: '#ef4444', neutral: '#f59e0b' }; const colour = colours[choice.outcome] || '#6b7280'; outcomeEl.style.borderLeftColor = colour; outcomeEl.innerHTML = `${choice.outcome === 'good' ? " Good choice" : choice.outcome === 'risky' ? " Risky choice" : '◌ Neutral choice'}
${choice.result}`; outcomeEl.classList.remove('hidden'); // Show Clari lesson text lessonEl.innerHTML = `
${clariSVG('thinking', 36)} ${slide.lesson || slide.explanation || ''}
`; lessonEl.classList.remove('hidden'); // Track correct scenario choices if (idx === slide.correct) { save('scenario_correct', (S.scenario_correct || 0) + 1); checkAchievements(); } // Enable continue const btn = document.getElementById('lesson-next-btn'); if (btn) btn.disabled = false; } function renderSlideQuickFire(slide) { // Normalise data: Units 10-12 use 'items', earlier units use 'questions' if (!slide.questions && slide.items) slide.questions = slide.items; // Normalise timer key: Units 10-12 use 'timer', earlier units use 'timeLimit' const _qfTimeLimit = slide.timeLimit || slide.timer || 30; let qfState = { idx: 0, correct: 0, combo: 0, maxCombo: 0, bonusXp: 0, timerVal: _qfTimeLimit, timerInterval: null, answered: false }; function renderQF() { const q = slide.questions[qfState.idx]; const progress = `${qfState.idx + 1} / ${slide.questions.length}`; const qfContent = document.getElementById('lesson-content'); qfContent.innerHTML = `
${progress}
${qfState.combo}x Combo!
${qfState.timerVal}s
${q.text}
`; qfContent.scrollTop = 0; document.getElementById('lesson-footer').innerHTML = ''; qfState.answered = false; } window.qfAnswer = function(userAnswer) { if (qfState.answered) return; qfState.answered = true; const q = slide.questions[qfState.idx]; const correct = userAnswer === (q.answer !== undefined ? q.answer : q.correct); // Flash feedback const btn = document.querySelector(userAnswer ? '.qf-true' : '.qf-false'); if (btn) { btn.style.background = correct ? '#22c55e' : '#ef4444'; btn.style.color = 'white'; } document.querySelectorAll('.qf-btn').forEach(b => b.disabled = true); if (correct) { qfState.correct++; qfState.combo++; if (qfState.combo > qfState.maxCombo) qfState.maxCombo = qfState.combo; if (qfState.combo >= 3) { qfState.bonusXp += 20; // Show combo animation const comboEl = document.getElementById('qf-combo'); if (comboEl) { comboEl.style.display = 'block'; comboEl.innerHTML = " " + qfState.combo + 'x Combo! +20 XP'; } } } else { qfState.combo = 0; } setTimeout(() => { qfState.idx++; if (qfState.idx < slide.questions.length) { renderQF(); } else { // End screen clearInterval(qfState.timerInterval); const perfect = qfState.correct === slide.questions.length; if (perfect) { save('quickfire_perfect', (S.quickfire_perfect || 0) + 1); checkAchievements(); } // Award bonus XP if (qfState.bonusXp > 0) { save('xp', S.xp + qfState.bonusXp); } document.getElementById('lesson-content').innerHTML = `
${clariSVG(perfect ? 'celebrating' : 'default', 80)}
${qfState.correct} / ${slide.questions.length}
${perfect ? " Perfect!" : qfState.correct >= Math.ceil(slide.questions.length * 0.6) ? 'Great job!' : 'Keep practising!'}
${qfState.bonusXp > 0 ? '
+' + qfState.bonusXp + ' Bonus XP from combos!
' : ''}
`; const totalSlides = getSessionSlides().length || 1; const isLast = lessonState.slideIdx >= totalSlides - 1; document.getElementById('lesson-footer').innerHTML = ``; } }, 600); }; // Start timer qfState.timerInterval = setInterval(() => { qfState.timerVal--; const fill = document.getElementById('qf-timer-fill'); const num = document.getElementById('qf-timer-num'); if (fill) { fill.style.width = Math.max(0, (qfState.timerVal / _qfTimeLimit) * 100) + '%'; fill.style.background = qfState.timerVal <= 5 ? 'var(--red)' : qfState.timerVal <= 10 ? 'var(--yellow)' : 'var(--clari-blue)'; } if (num) num.textContent = qfState.timerVal + 's'; if (qfState.timerVal <= 0) { clearInterval(qfState.timerInterval); if (!qfState.answered) { // Auto-advance on timeout qfState.idx++; if (qfState.idx < slide.questions.length) renderQF(); else { document.getElementById('lesson-content').innerHTML = `
${qfState.correct} / ${slide.questions.length}
Time's up!
`; document.getElementById('lesson-footer').innerHTML = ``; } } } }, 1000); // Store interval in lessonState so closeLesson can clear it lessonState.qfTimerInterval = qfState.timerInterval; renderQF(); } // ---- LESSON COMPLETE ---- function toggleXpBreakdown() { var btn = document.getElementById('xp-breakdown-toggle'); var list = document.getElementById('xp-breakdown-list'); if (!btn || !list) return; var open = list.classList.toggle('visible'); btn.classList.toggle('open', open); } function buildXpBreakdownHtml(lessonXP, xpEarned, noErrors, elapsed) { // Compute each component var baseXP = lessonXP; // 50 or 100 (boosted) var slideXP = Math.max(0, xpEarned - lessonXP); // XP from clari_react / scenario correct slides // Bonuses are additive on top of lessonXP but were NOT added to lessonState.xpEarned separately // (they are baked into xpEarned via addXP calls during slides). // So we compute the bonus amounts independently for display. var perfectBonus = noErrors ? 10 : 0; var speedBonus = (elapsed > 0 && elapsed < 120) ? 5 : 0; var rows = []; rows.push({ label: 'Base lesson XP', val: '+' + baseXP, bonus: false }); if (slideXP > 0) { rows.push({ label: 'Slide bonuses', val: '+' + slideXP, bonus: false }); } if (perfectBonus > 0) { rows.push({ label: 'Perfect score bonus', val: '+' + perfectBonus, bonus: true }); } if (speedBonus > 0) { rows.push({ label: 'Speed bonus (under 2 min)', val: '+' + speedBonus, bonus: true }); } var rowsHtml = rows.map(function(r) { return '
' + '' + r.label + '' + '' + r.val + '' + '
'; }).join(''); return '
' + '' + '
' + rowsHtml + '
' + '
'; } function renderLessonComplete() { if (lessonState.lessonTimerInterval) { clearInterval(lessonState.lessonTimerInterval); lessonState.lessonTimerInterval = null; } SoundManager.playLessonComplete(); const lesson = findLesson(lessonState.lessonId); const lessonXP = S.xp_boost_active ? 100 : 50; const lessonGems = 10; const _levelBefore = xpToLevel(S.xp || 0); // capture before addXP calls if (S.xp_boost_active) save('xp_boost_active', false); addXP(lessonXP); addGems(lessonGems); lessonState.xpEarned += lessonXP; lessonState.gemsEarned += lessonGems; // Clear resume save('resume_lesson', null); // Capture first-lesson flag before marking complete var _wasFirstLesson = S.completed.length === 0; // Mark complete if (!S.completed.includes(lessonState.lessonId)) { const newCompleted = [...S.completed, lessonState.lessonId]; save('completed', newCompleted); } // Schedule first spaced repetition review (due tomorrow) const _sr_reviews = S.lesson_reviews || {}; if (!_sr_reviews[lessonState.lessonId]) { _sr_reviews[lessonState.lessonId] = { stage: 0, nextDue: dateAddDays(todayStr(), REVIEW_INTERVALS[0]), completedAt: todayStr() }; save('lesson_reviews', _sr_reviews); } updateNavBadges(); // Daily goal const today = todayStr(); if (S.goal_date !== today) save('goal_date', today), save('goal_today', 0); save('goal_today', (S.goal_today || 0) + 1); // Streak updateStreak(); // Active days const activeArr = S.active_days || []; if (!activeArr.includes(today)) { activeArr.push(today); save('active_days', activeArr); } // Track lessons per day for heatmap const _hd = todayStr(); const _hlog = Object.assign({}, S.lesson_log || {}); _hlog[_hd] = (_hlog[_hd] || 0) + 1; save('lesson_log', _hlog); // learn-08: record completion timestamp for confetti trigger save('last_completed_at', Date.now()); // learn-14: record per-lesson completion timestamp var _lld = Object.assign({}, S.lesson_log_dates || {}); _lld[lessonState.lessonId] = Date.now(); save('lesson_log_dates', _lld); // Session lesson streak var _sesStreak = (S.session_lesson_streak || 0) + 1; save('session_lesson_streak', _sesStreak); if (_sesStreak === 3 || _sesStreak === 5 || _sesStreak === 10) { setTimeout(function() { showLessonStreakOverlay(_sesStreak); }, 1800); } else if (_sesStreak > 10 && (_sesStreak % 5 === 0)) { setTimeout(function() { showToast('🔥 ' + _sesStreak + ' lessons this session!', 'success', 3000); }, 2200); } // Achievements checkAchievements(); // Log XP for progress dashboard logXpToday(lessonXP); // Clari tip triggers if (S.completed.length === 1) setTimeout(() => showClariTip('first_lesson_done'), 1200); // First-lesson achievement toast + Clari popup if (_wasFirstLesson) { setTimeout(function() { showToast('🏆 First lesson complete! You’re on your way!', 'success', 4000); }, 500); setTimeout(function() { showClariPopup('star', 'clari-tada', 'First lesson done!', 2500); }, 1400); } if (S.completed.length === 5) setTimeout(() => showClariTip('five_lessons_done'), 1200); if (lessonState.wrongThisLesson === 0) setTimeout(() => showClariTip('perfect_lesson'), 1200); const _cuTips = COURSE.find(u => u.lessons.some(l => l.id === lessonState.lessonId)); if (_cuTips && !(_cuTips && _cuTips.lessons.every(l => S.completed.includes(l.id)))) { const _remaining = _cuTips.lessons.filter(l => !S.completed.includes(l.id)).length; if (_remaining === 1) setTimeout(() => showClariTip('unit_almost_done'), 1000); } // Weekly challenge progress const _isPerfect = lessonState.wrongThisLesson === 0; updateWeeklyProgress(lessonState.lessonId, _isPerfect); // Check milestone share const shareBar = checkMilestoneShare(); // Progress bar to 100 document.getElementById('lesson-progress-bar').style.width = '100%'; const noErrors = lessonState.wrongThisLesson === 0; const starCount = noErrors ? 3 : lessonState.wrongThisLesson <= 2 ? 2 : 1; const starsHtml = [1,2,3].map(i => `
` ).join(''); var _wrong = lessonState.wrongThisLesson; var difficultyHtml; if (_wrong === 0) { difficultyHtml = '
✔ Easy
'; } else if (_wrong <= 2) { difficultyHtml = '
⚠️ Moderate
'; } else { difficultyHtml = '
🔥 Challenging! Keep it up
'; } // Personal best tracker var pbHtml = ''; var _pbElapsed = lessonState.startTime ? Math.round((Date.now() - lessonState.startTime) / 1000) : 0; if (_pbElapsed > 0) { var _pbMins = Math.floor(_pbElapsed / 60); var _pbSecs = _pbElapsed % 60; var _pbTimeStr = _pbMins > 0 ? _pbMins + 'm ' + _pbSecs + 's' : _pbSecs + 's'; var _pbs = Object.assign({}, S.personal_bests || {}); var _prevBest = _pbs[lessonState.lessonId] || null; var _isNewPb = !_prevBest || _pbElapsed < _prevBest; if (_isNewPb) { _pbs[lessonState.lessonId] = _pbElapsed; save('personal_bests', _pbs); pbHtml = '
🏆 New Personal Best! ' + _pbTimeStr + '
'; } else { var _bestMins = Math.floor(_prevBest / 60); var _bestSecs = _prevBest % 60; var _bestStr = _bestMins > 0 ? _bestMins + 'm ' + _bestSecs + 's' : _bestSecs + 's'; pbHtml = '
⏱ ' + _pbTimeStr + '  —  Best: ' + _bestStr + '
'; } } const certBtn = showCertificateButton(); // Check if this completed the entire unit const currentUnit = COURSE.find(u => u.lessons.some(l => l.id === lessonState.lessonId)); const isUnitComplete = currentUnit && currentUnit.lessons.every(l => S.completed.includes(l.id)); let titleText = 'Lesson Complete!'; let unitBadgeHtml = ''; if (isUnitComplete) { titleText = `Unit ${currentUnit.num} Complete! `; unitBadgeHtml = `
${currentUnit.num}
Unit Complete!
`; SoundManager.playAchievement && SoundManager.playAchievement(); checkAndShowUnitCertificate(currentUnit.id); setTimeout(function() { showUnitCompleteModal('Unit ' + currentUnit.num + ': ' + currentUnit.title, currentUnit.color); }, 800); } // Performance message var performanceHtml; if (_wrong === 0) { performanceHtml = '
You nailed it! Flawless! 🌟
'; } else if (_wrong <= 2) { performanceHtml = '
Good work — you got through it! 💪
'; } else { performanceHtml = '
Tough one — but you finished! That takes grit. 🔥
'; } // Motivational quote var _quote = MOTIVATIONAL_QUOTES[Math.floor(Math.random() * MOTIVATIONAL_QUOTES.length)]; var quoteHtml = '
“' + _quote.replace(/^[“"]/, '').replace(/[”"]$/, '') + '”
'; // Notes textarea var _existingNote = ((S.lesson_notes || {})[lessonState.lessonId]) || ''; var _existingRating = ((S.lesson_ratings || {})[lessonState.lessonId]) || 0; var ratingHtml = '
' + '
Rate this lesson
' + '
' + [1,2,3,4,5].map(function(i) { return ''; }).join('') + '
'; var notesHtml = `
✓ Saved
`; // Vocabulary glossary var vocabHtml = ''; if (lesson && lesson.vocab && lesson.vocab.length > 0) { var _vItems = lesson.vocab.map(function(v) { return '
' + v.term + '' + v.def + '
'; }).join(''); vocabHtml = '
' + '' + '
' + _vItems + '
' + '
'; } // Unit progress ring var progressRingHtml = ''; var _ringUnit = COURSE.find(function(u) { return u.lessons.some(function(l) { return l.id === lessonState.lessonId; }); }); if (_ringUnit && _ringUnit.lessons.length > 0) { var _ringTotal = _ringUnit.lessons.length; var _ringDone = _ringUnit.lessons.filter(function(l) { return S.completed.includes(l.id); }).length; var _ringPct = Math.round((_ringDone / _ringTotal) * 100); var _ringR = 24; var _ringCx = 32; var _ringCy = 32; var _ringCirc = 2 * Math.PI * _ringR; var _ringDash = (_ringPct / 100) * _ringCirc; var _ringGap = _ringCirc - _ringDash; progressRingHtml = '
' + '' + '
Unit Progress
' + '
'; } // XP breakdown bonuses var _xpPerfectBonus = noErrors ? 10 : 0; var _xpSpeedBonus = (_pbElapsed > 0 && _pbElapsed < 120) ? 5 : 0; var _xpBonusTotal = _xpPerfectBonus + _xpSpeedBonus; if (_xpBonusTotal > 0) { addXP(_xpBonusTotal); lessonState.xpEarned += _xpBonusTotal; logXpToday(_xpBonusTotal); } var _xpBreakdownHtml = buildXpBreakdownHtml(lessonXP, lessonState.xpEarned, noErrors, _pbElapsed); // Detect if this lesson caused a level-up var _levelAfter = xpToLevel(S.xp || 0); var _levelUpBadgeHtml = ''; if (_levelAfter > _levelBefore) { _levelUpBadgeHtml = '
' + '' + 'Level Up! \u2192 Level ' + _levelAfter + '
'; } document.getElementById('lesson-content').innerHTML = `
${clariSVG(noErrors ? 'star' : _wrong <= 2 ? 'celebrating' : 'encouraging', 110)}
${performanceHtml} ${unitBadgeHtml}
${titleText}
${starsHtml}
${difficultyHtml} ${pbHtml} ${progressRingHtml} ${getClariCompleteMessage(noErrors, lessonState.wrongThisLesson, S.completed.length === 1)} ${_levelUpBadgeHtml}
+0 XP earned${S.xp_boost_active ? '' : lessonXP > 50 ? ' (2x boost!)' : ''}
${_xpBreakdownHtml}
+${lessonGems} gems
${shareBar} ${certBtn} ${quoteHtml} ${vocabHtml} ${notesHtml} ${ratingHtml}
`; fireLessonConfetti(); // ── Animate XP counter from 0 to xpEarned over 600ms ───────────────────── (function() { var _counterEl = document.getElementById('xp-counter-num'); if (!_counterEl) return; var _target = lessonState.xpEarned || 0; var _start = null; var _duration = 600; function _step(ts) { if (!_start) _start = ts; var _elapsed = ts - _start; var _prog = Math.min(_elapsed / _duration, 1); // ease-out cubic var _ease = 1 - Math.pow(1 - _prog, 3); _counterEl.textContent = Math.round(_ease * _target); if (_prog < 1) requestAnimationFrame(_step); } requestAnimationFrame(_step); })(); // ── Auto-save notes: attach debounced input handler ────────────────────── (function() { var _noteTA = document.getElementById('lesson-note-input'); if (!_noteTA) return; var _autoTimer = null; _noteTA.addEventListener('input', function() { clearTimeout(_autoTimer); _autoTimer = setTimeout(function() { var ta = document.getElementById('lesson-note-input'); if (!ta) return; var notes = Object.assign({}, S.lesson_notes || {}); var trimmed = ta.value.trim(); if (trimmed) { notes[lessonState.lessonId] = trimmed; } else { delete notes[lessonState.lessonId]; } save('lesson_notes', notes); var ind = document.getElementById('note-autosave-ind'); if (ind) { ind.classList.add('visible'); setTimeout(function() { ind.classList.remove('visible'); }, 1800); } }, 1000); }); })(); if (noErrors) { setTimeout(fireLessonConfetti, 800); setTimeout(fireLessonConfetti, 1600); setTimeout(function() { showToast('🤩 Perfect lesson! No mistakes!', 'success', 3500); }, 400); } // Clari reaction based on score (function() { var _clariState = noErrors ? 'star' : _wrong <= 2 ? 'celebrating' : 'encouraging'; var _clariMsg = noErrors ? 'Perfect score! 🌟' : _wrong <= 2 ? 'Great job!' : 'Keep going — practice makes perfect!'; setTimeout(function() { showClariPopup(_clariState, 'clari-tada', _clariMsg, 2500); }, 600); })(); // Find next accessible lesson to offer a one-tap chain let _nextLesson = null; if (!lessonState.practiceMode) { outer: for (const _u of COURSE) { for (const _l of _u.lessons) { if (!S.completed.includes(_l.id) && (_l.free || S.premium)) { _nextLesson = _l; break outer; } } } // Don't suggest the lesson we just finished if (_nextLesson && _nextLesson.id === lessonState.lessonId) _nextLesson = null; } document.getElementById('lesson-footer').innerHTML = ` ${_nextLesson ? `` : ''} `; // Streak freeze reminder if ((S.streak || 0) >= 3 && !S.streak_freeze) { var _sfr = document.createElement('div'); _sfr.className = 'streak-freeze-reminder'; _sfr.innerHTML = '🧊 Protect your streak with a freeze 🧊'; _sfr.onclick = function() { openGemShop(); }; var _footer = document.getElementById('lesson-footer'); if (_footer) _footer.appendChild(_sfr); } } // ============================================================ // GAMIFICATION // ============================================================ function fireLearnTabConfetti() { // learn-08: 20-particle mini confetti burst anchored to the learn tab area if (window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches) return; var _isDark = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark'; var _colors = _isDark ? ['#00ff41', '#1cb0f6', '#ffd700', '#ff69b4', '#b366ff'] : ['#58cc02', '#ffc800', '#1cb0f6', '#ff4b4b', '#a560f8', '#ff7eb3']; for (var _ci = 0; _ci < 20; _ci++) { var _p = document.createElement('div'); _p.style.cssText = [ 'position:fixed', 'pointer-events:none', 'z-index:9999', 'left:' + (20 + Math.random() * 60) + '%', 'top:' + (10 + Math.random() * 30) + '%', 'width:' + (6 + Math.random() * 7) + 'px', 'height:' + (6 + Math.random() * 7) + 'px', 'background:' + _colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * _colors.length)], 'border-radius:' + (Math.random() > 0.5 ? '50%' : '3px'), 'animation:confetti-fall ' + (1.0 + Math.random() * 1.0) + 's ease-in ' + (Math.random() * 0.5) + 's forwards', 'opacity:1' ].join(';'); document.body.appendChild(_p); (function(el) { setTimeout(function() { if (el.parentNode) el.parentNode.removeChild(el); }, 2200); })(_p); } } function fireLessonConfetti() { const wrap = document.getElementById('lesson-confetti-wrap'); if (!wrap) return; wrap.innerHTML = ''; const _isDark = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark'; const colors = _isDark ? ['#00ff41', '#1cb0f6', '#ff6b6b', '#ffd700', '#ff69b4', '#b366ff', '#00e5ff'] : ['#58cc02','#ffc800','#1cb0f6','#ff4b4b','#a560f8','#ff7eb3','#5BC0F8','#ff9f43','#26de81','#fd79a8','#fdcb6e']; const count = window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches ? 0 : 70; for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) { const piece = document.createElement('div'); piece.className = 'confetti-piece'; piece.style.cssText = [ 'left:' + (Math.random() * 100) + '%', 'top:' + (Math.random() * -30) + '%', 'background:' + colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)], 'animation-delay:' + (Math.random() * 0.8) + 's', 'animation-duration:' + (1.2 + Math.random() * 1.2) + 's', 'border-radius:' + (Math.random() > 0.5 ? '50%' : '3px'), 'width:' + (5 + Math.random() * 9) + 'px', 'height:' + (5 + Math.random() * 9) + 'px' ].join(';'); wrap.appendChild(piece); } // ============================================================ // UNIT COMPLETE CELEBRATION MODAL // ============================================================ function toggleKbShortcuts() { var _old = document.getElementById('kb-shortcuts-overlay'); if (_old) { _old.remove(); return; } var overlay = document.createElement('div'); overlay.id = 'kb-shortcuts-overlay'; overlay.className = 'kb-overlay'; overlay.setAttribute('role', 'dialog'); overlay.setAttribute('aria-modal', 'true'); overlay.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Keyboard Shortcuts'); overlay.onclick = function(e) { if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove(); }; overlay.innerHTML = '
