'; document.body.appendChild(overlay); } function showQuickRef() { var _old = document.getElementById('quick-ref-overlay'); if (_old) { _old.remove(); return; } var overlay = document.createElement('div'); overlay.id = 'quick-ref-overlay'; overlay.className = 'quick-ref-overlay'; overlay.onclick = function(e) { if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove(); }; overlay.innerHTML = '
' + '
' + 'AI Quick Reference' + '' + '
' + '
' + '
' + '
Key Terms
' + '
PromptThe text you send to an AI to get a response
' + '
TokenA word chunk the AI reads (roughly ¾ of a word)
' + '
LLMLarge Language Model — the tech behind AI chatbots
' + '
HallucinationWhen AI confidently states something false
' + '
Context windowHow much text the AI can “remember” in one chat
' + '
TemperatureControls creativity — higher = more surprising answers
' + '
Fine-tuningTraining AI further on specific data to specialise it
' + '
RAGRetrieval-Augmented Generation — AI + your own documents
' + '
' + '
' + '
Prompting Tips
' + '
🎯 Be specific — add context, audience, and desired length
' + '
📝 Use role prompts: “Act as a nurse explaining...”
' + '
🔄 Refine — follow up with “make it shorter” or “simplify”
' + '
✅ Always verify facts — AI can be confidently wrong
' + '
🔒 Never share passwords, bank details, or private data
' + '
' + '
' + '
'; document.body.appendChild(overlay); } function showUnitCompleteModal(unitName, unitColor) { var _old = document.getElementById('unit-complete-overlay'); if (_old) _old.remove(); var overlay = document.createElement('div'); overlay.className = 'unit-complete-overlay'; overlay.id = 'unit-complete-overlay'; overlay.setAttribute('role', 'dialog'); overlay.setAttribute('aria-modal', 'true'); overlay.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Unit Complete'); var badgeColor = unitColor || 'var(--green)'; overlay.innerHTML = '
🏆 Unit Complete!
<'+ clariSVG('celebrating', 110) +'
Complete
' + escHtml(unitName) + '
Incredible work! You finished every lesson in this unit. Keep the momentum going!
'; document.body.appendChild(overlay); overlay.addEventListener('click', function(e) { if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove(); }); setTimeout(function() { var el = document.getElementById('unit-complete-overlay'); if (el) { el.style.opacity = '0'; el.style.transition = 'opacity 0.4s'; setTimeout(function() { if (el.parentNode) el.remove(); }, 400); } }, 6000); } // ============================================================ // LESSON BOOKMARK / FAVOURITE // ============================================================ function toggleBookmark(lessonId, event) { if (event) event.stopPropagation(); var bookmarks = S.bookmarks || []; var newBookmarks; if (bookmarks.indexOf(lessonId) !== -1) { newBookmarks = bookmarks.filter(function(id) { return id !== lessonId; }); showToast('Bookmark removed', 'info', 1800); } else { newBookmarks = bookmarks.concat([lessonId]); showToast('Lesson bookmarked! ⭐', 'success', 1800); } save('bookmarks', newBookmarks); renderLearnTab(); } setTimeout(function() { wrap.innerHTML = ''; }, 3000); } function showXPFloat(amount) { const el = document.createElement('div'); el.className = 'xp-float'; el.textContent = '+' + amount + ' XP'; // Position near top-center el.style.left = '50%'; el.style.top = '80px'; el.style.transform = 'translateX(-50%)'; document.body.appendChild(el); setTimeout(function() { el.remove(); }, 1200); } function addXP(amount) { const oldLevel = xpToLevel(S.xp); const newXp = S.xp + amount; if ((S.xp || 0) < 100 && newXp >= 100) { setTimeout(() => showClariTip('xp_milestone_100'), 800); setTimeout(function() { showClariPopup('star', 'clari-tada', '100 XP!', 1500); }, 1000); } if ((S.xp || 0) < 250 && newXp >= 250) { setTimeout(function() { showClariPopup('star', 'clari-tada', '250 XP!', 1500); }, 1000); } if ((S.xp || 0) < 500 && newXp >= 500) { setTimeout(() => showClariTip('xp_milestone_500'), 800); setTimeout(function() { showClariPopup('star', 'clari-tada', '500 XP!', 1500); }, 1000); } if ((S.xp || 0) < 1000 && newXp >= 1000) { setTimeout(function() { showClariPopup('star', 'clari-tada', '1000 XP!', 1500); }, 1000); } save('xp', newXp); showXPFloat(amount); const newLevel = xpToLevel(newXp); save('level', newLevel); if (newLevel > oldLevel) { showLevelUp(newLevel); if (newLevel === 5) { setTimeout(function() { showClariPopup('celebrating', 'clari-tada', 'Level 5! You’re on your way!', 2000); }, 800); } else if (newLevel === 10) { setTimeout(function() { showClariPopup('excited', 'clari-tada', 'Level 10! You’re a rising star!', 2000); }, 800); } else if (newLevel === 20) { setTimeout(function() { showClariPopup('love', 'clari-tada', 'Level 20! You’re an AI expert!', 2000); }, 800); } } updateTopBar(); // Track XP earned during the current lesson for the completion screen if (typeof lessonState !== 'undefined' && lessonState.lessonId) { lessonState.xpEarned = (lessonState.xpEarned || 0) + amount; } } function addGems(amount) { save('gems', (S.gems || 0) + amount); } function loseHeart() { lessonState.wrongThisLesson++; lessonState.hearts = Math.max(0, lessonState.hearts - 1); save('hearts', lessonState.hearts); SoundManager.playHeartLost(); document.getElementById('lesson-hearts').innerHTML = renderHearts(lessonState.hearts, 5); updateTopBar(); if (lessonState.hearts === 1) setTimeout(() => showClariTip('hearts_low'), 400); } function animateClari(state, durationMs) { const wrap = document.querySelector('.slide-mascot-wrap'); if (!wrap) return; const original = wrap.innerHTML; const currentSVG = wrap.querySelector('svg'); const size = currentSVG ? (parseInt(currentSVG.getAttribute('width')) || 70) : 70; wrap.innerHTML = clariSVG(state, size); setTimeout(function() { wrap.innerHTML = original; }, durationMs || 700); } function showClariPopup(state, animClass, message, durationMs) { durationMs = durationMs || 2500; // Remove any existing popup const existing = document.getElementById('clari-float-popup'); if (existing) existing.remove(); const popup = document.createElement('div'); popup.id = 'clari-float-popup'; popup.style.cssText = [ 'position:fixed', 'bottom:80px', 'right:20px', 'z-index:9999', 'display:flex', 'flex-direction:column', 'align-items:center', 'gap:6px', 'background:var(--card,#fff)', 'border:2px solid var(--green,#58cc02)', 'border-radius:16px', 'padding:12px 14px', 'box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)', 'transform:translateY(40px)', 'opacity:0', 'transition:transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1),opacity 0.3s ease', 'pointer-events:none', 'max-width:160px', 'text-align:center' ].join(';'); const svgWrap = document.createElement('div'); svgWrap.className = 'slide-mascot-wrap'; svgWrap.innerHTML = clariSVG(state || 'happy', 64); popup.appendChild(svgWrap); if (animClass) { const svgEl = svgWrap.querySelector('svg'); if (svgEl) svgEl.classList.add(animClass); } if (message) { const msgEl = document.createElement('div'); msgEl.style.cssText = 'font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text,#3c3c3c);line-height:1.3;margin-top:2px;'; msgEl.textContent = message; popup.appendChild(msgEl); } document.body.appendChild(popup); // Trigger slide-up animation on next frame requestAnimationFrame(function() { requestAnimationFrame(function() { popup.style.transform = 'translateY(0)'; popup.style.opacity = '1'; }); }); setTimeout(function() { popup.style.transform = 'translateY(40px)'; popup.style.opacity = '0'; setTimeout(function() { if (popup.parentNode) popup.remove(); }, 350); }, durationMs); } function recordWrongAnswer(lessonId, question, idx) { const arr = S.wrong_answers || []; arr.push({ lessonId, question, idx, date: todayStr() }); // Keep last 50 if (arr.length > 50) arr.shift(); save('wrong_answers', arr); } function updateStreak() { const today = todayStr(); const lastDate = S.streak_date; if (lastDate === today) return; const yesterday = new Date(); yesterday.setDate(yesterday.getDate() - 1); const yStr = yesterday.toISOString().split('T')[0]; if (lastDate === yStr) { save('streak', (S.streak || 0) + 1); } else if (S.streak_freeze && lastDate) { // Streak freeze protects one missed day save('streak_freeze', false); save('streak', (S.streak || 0) + 1); showToast("Streak Freeze used — your streak is protected! ️", 'info', 3000); } else { save('streak', 1); } save('streak_date', today); updateTopBar(); // Streak milestone celebrations const majorMilestones = [7, 14, 30, 100]; if (majorMilestones.includes(S.streak)) setTimeout(() => showStreakMilestone(S.streak), 1200); if (S.streak === 3) setTimeout(() => showClariTip('streak_milestone_3'), 1500); if (S.streak === 7) setTimeout(() => showClariTip('streak_milestone_7'), 1500); } // ============================================================ // ACHIEVEMENTS // ============================================================ function getAchievementProgress(achId) { const completedCount = (S.completed || []).length; const streak = S.streak || 0; const level = S.level || 1; const scenarioCorrect = S.scenario_correct || 0; const qfPerfect = S.quickfire_perfect_count || 0; const unit1Lessons = (COURSE.find(u => u.id === 'unit1') || {}).lessons || []; const unit1Done = unit1Lessons.filter(l => (S.completed || []).includes(l.id)).length; const unit6Lessons = (COURSE.find(u => u.id === 'unit6') || {}).lessons || []; const unit6Done = unit6Lessons.filter(l => (S.completed || []).includes(l.id)).length; const unit7Lessons = (COURSE.find(u => u.id === 'unit7') || {}).lessons || []; const unit7Done = unit7Lessons.filter(l => (S.completed || []).includes(l.id)).length; const unit8Lessons = (COURSE.find(u => u.id === 'unit8') || {}).lessons || []; const unit8Done = unit8Lessons.filter(l => (S.completed || []).includes(l.id)).length; const unit9Lessons = (COURSE.find(u => u.id === 'unit9') || {}).lessons || []; const unit9Done = unit9Lessons.filter(l => (S.completed || []).includes(l.id)).length; const safetyLessons = (COURSE.find(u => u.id === 'unit5') || {}).lessons || []; const safetyDone = safetyLessons.filter(l => (S.completed || []).includes(l.id)).length; const map = { first_lesson: { current: Math.min(completedCount, 1), total: 1 }, five_lessons: { current: Math.min(completedCount, 5), total: 5 }, all_unit1: { current: Math.min(unit1Done, unit1Lessons.length || 1), total: unit1Lessons.length || 1 }, streak_3: { current: Math.min(streak, 3), total: 3 }, streak_7: { current: Math.min(streak, 7), total: 7 }, level_5: { current: Math.min(level, 5), total: 5 }, perfect: { current: 0, total: 1 }, practice_1: { current: Math.min((S.practice_sessions || []).length, 1), total: 1 }, plan_done: { current: S.survey_done ? 1 : 0, total: 1 }, all_safe: { current: Math.min(safetyDone, safetyLessons.length || 1), total: safetyLessons.length || 1 }, all_unit6: { current: Math.min(unit6Done, unit6Lessons.length || 1), total: unit6Lessons.length || 1 }, all_unit7: { current: Math.min(unit7Done, unit7Lessons.length || 1), total: unit7Lessons.length || 1 }, all_unit8: { current: Math.min(unit8Done, unit8Lessons.length || 1), total: unit8Lessons.length || 1 }, all_unit9: { current: Math.min(unit9Done, unit9Lessons.length || 1), total: unit9Lessons.length || 1 }, quickfire_perfect: { current: Math.min(qfPerfect, 5), total: 5 }, scenario_master: { current: Math.min(scenarioCorrect, 5), total: 5 }, }; return map[achId] || { current: 0, total: 1 }; } function checkAchievements() { const earned = new Set(S.achievements || []); const newOnes = []; if (S.completed.length >= 1 && !earned.has('first_lesson')) newOnes.push('first_lesson'); if (S.completed.length >= 5 && !earned.has('five_lessons')) newOnes.push('five_lessons'); const unit1Ids = COURSE[0].lessons.map(l => l.id); if (unit1Ids.every(id => S.completed.includes(id)) && !earned.has('all_unit1')) newOnes.push('all_unit1'); const unit5Ids = COURSE[4].lessons.map(l => l.id); if (unit5Ids.every(id => S.completed.includes(id)) && !earned.has('all_safe')) newOnes.push('all_safe'); const unit6 = COURSE[5]; if (unit6) { const unit6Ids = unit6.lessons.map(l => l.id); if (unit6Ids.every(id => S.completed.includes(id)) && !earned.has('all_unit6')) newOnes.push('all_unit6'); } if ((S.streak || 0) >= 3 && !earned.has('streak_3')) newOnes.push('streak_3'); if ((S.streak || 0) >= 7 && !earned.has('streak_7')) newOnes.push('streak_7'); if (xpToLevel(S.xp) >= 5 && !earned.has('level_5')) newOnes.push('level_5'); if (lessonState.wrongThisLesson === 0 && S.completed.length >= 1 && !earned.has('perfect')) newOnes.push('perfect'); if (!earned.has('plan_done') && S.onboarded) newOnes.push('plan_done'); const unit7 = COURSE.find(u => u.id === 'unit7'); if (unit7) { const unit7Ids = unit7.lessons.map(l => l.id); if (unit7Ids.every(id => S.completed.includes(id)) && !earned.has('all_unit7')) newOnes.push('all_unit7'); } const unit8 = COURSE.find(u => u.id === 'unit8'); if (unit8) { const unit8Ids = unit8.lessons.map(l => l.id); if (unit8Ids.every(id => S.completed.includes(id)) && !earned.has('all_unit8')) newOnes.push('all_unit8'); } const unit9 = COURSE.find(u => u.id === 'unit9'); if (unit9) { const unit9Ids = unit9.lessons.map(l => l.id); if (unit9Ids.every(id => S.completed.includes(id)) && !earned.has('all_unit9')) newOnes.push('all_unit9'); } if ((S.quickfire_perfect || 0) >= 1 && !earned.has('quickfire_perfect')) newOnes.push('quickfire_perfect'); if ((S.scenario_correct || 0) >= 5 && !earned.has('scenario_master')) newOnes.push('scenario_master'); if (newOnes.length > 0) { const allEarned = [...earned, ...newOnes]; save('achievements', allEarned); // Show toast (playAchievement is called inside showAchievementToast) newOnes.forEach((id, i) => setTimeout(() => showAchievementToast(id), i * 2800)); } } function showAchievementToast(achId) { const ach = ACHIEVEMENTS.find(a => a.id === achId); if (!ach) return; const toast = document.getElementById('achievement-toast'); const iconEl = document.getElementById('ach-toast-icon'); const nameEl = document.getElementById('ach-toast-name'); SoundManager.playAchievement(); if (iconEl) iconEl.innerHTML = achievementIconHTML(achId, true, 32); if (nameEl) nameEl.textContent = ach.label + ' — ' + ach.desc; toast.classList.remove('show'); void toast.offsetWidth; // reflow toast.classList.add('show'); setTimeout(() => toast.classList.remove('show'), 2600); // Clari popup for achievement unlock setTimeout(function() { showClariPopup('proud', 'clari-spin', 'Achievement unlocked!', 2500); }, 400); } function showAchievementDetail(id, earned) { const ach = ACHIEVEMENTS.find(a => a.id === id); if (!ach) return; const status = earned ? " Earned!" : " Not yet earned"; showToast(`${ach.label}: ${ach.desc} — ${status}`, earned ? 'success' : 'info', 3500); } function achievementIconHTML(achId, earned, size) { size = size || 36; const color = earned ? '#ffc800' : '#ddd'; const icons = { first_lesson: ``, five_lessons: ``, all_unit1: ``, streak_3: ``, streak_7: ``, level_5: `5`, perfect: ``, practice_1: ``, plan_done: ``, all_safe: ``, all_unit6: ``, all_unit7: ``, all_unit8: ``, all_unit9: ``, quickfire_perfect: ``, scenario_master: `` }; const shape = icons[achId] || icons.first_lesson; return ``; } // ============================================================ // LEVEL UP MODAL // ============================================================ function showLevelUp(level) { SoundManager.playLevelUp(); const overlay = document.getElementById('level-up-overlay'); document.getElementById('levelup-num').textContent = level; document.getElementById('levelup-clari').innerHTML = clariSVG('celebrating', 80); // Generate confetti const wrap = document.getElementById('confetti-wrap'); wrap.innerHTML = ''; const colors = ['#58cc02','#ffc800','#1cb0f6','#ff4b4b','#a560f8']; for (let i = 0; i < 30; i++) { const piece = document.createElement('div'); piece.className = 'confetti-piece'; piece.style.cssText = ` left:${Math.random()*100}%; top:${Math.random()*-20}%; background:${colors[Math.floor(Math.random()*colors.length)]}; animation-delay:${Math.random()*1.5}s; animation-duration:${1.5+Math.random()}s; border-radius:${Math.random()>0.5?'50%':'2px'}; width:${6+Math.random()*8}px; height:${6+Math.random()*8}px; `; wrap.appendChild(piece); } overlay.classList.add('open'); const timer = setTimeout(() => overlay.classList.remove('open'), 3000); overlay.onclick = () => { clearTimeout(timer); overlay.classList.remove('open'); }; } // ============================================================ // PREMIUM MODAL // ============================================================ let _premiumPlan = 'monthly'; function selectPlan(plan) { _premiumPlan = plan; document.getElementById('plan-monthly').classList.toggle('selected', plan === 'monthly'); document.getElementById('plan-annual').classList.toggle('selected', plan === 'annual'); } function openPremiumModal() { const modal = document.getElementById('premium-modal'); document.getElementById('premium-clari').innerHTML = clariSVG('excited', 80); _premiumPlan = 'monthly'; document.getElementById('plan-monthly').classList.add('selected'); document.getElementById('plan-annual').classList.remove('selected'); // Dynamic value stack const freeLessons = COURSE.reduce((a, u) => a + u.lessons.filter(l => l.free).length, 0); const totalLessons = COURSE.reduce((a, u) => a + u.lessons.length, 0); const premiumLessons = totalLessons - freeLessons; const checkSVG = ``; document.getElementById('premium-features').innerHTML = `
${checkSVG}${premiumLessons} more lessons unlocked (${totalLessons} total)
${checkSVG}${ACHIEVEMENTS.length} achievements to earn
${checkSVG} Gem Shop access + Clari themes
${checkSVG}Unlimited practice sessions
${checkSVG}Cancel anytime — no contract
`; modal.classList.add('open'); } function closeModal(id) { document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('open'); } // Stripe Payment Links — replace these URLs after creating them in your Stripe Dashboard const STRIPE_MONTHLY_URL = 'https://buy.stripe.com/REPLACE_WITH_MONTHLY_LINK?success_url=' + encodeURIComponent(window.location.origin + window.location.pathname + '?payment=success'); const STRIPE_ANNUAL_URL = 'https://buy.stripe.com/REPLACE_WITH_ANNUAL_LINK?success_url=' + encodeURIComponent(window.location.origin + window.location.pathname + '?payment=success'); function activatePremium() { save('premium_pending', true); closeModal('premium-modal'); const url = _premiumPlan === 'annual' ? STRIPE_ANNUAL_URL : STRIPE_MONTHLY_URL; // If Stripe URLs are not yet configured, fall back to local activation for testing if (url.includes('REPLACE_WITH')) { save('premium', true); renderLearnTab(); showToast('Premium activated! (test mode — add your Stripe URL)', 'success', 3000); } else { window.location.href = url; } } // ============================================================ // PRACTICE TAB // ============================================================ function renderPracticeTab() { // Weekly sessions pill const _pillEl = document.getElementById('practice-week-pill'); if (_pillEl) { const _cw = (typeof getISOWeek === 'function') ? getISOWeek() : ''; const _psw = S.practice_sessions_week || { week: '', count: 0 }; const _cnt = (_psw.week === _cw) ? (_psw.count || 0) : 0; if (_cnt > 0) { _pillEl.innerHTML = '' + '' + _cnt + ' session' + (_cnt === 1 ? '' : 's') + ' this week'; } else { _pillEl.innerHTML = ''; } } // Reviews-due banner const _dueBanner = document.getElementById('reviews-due-banner'); if (_dueBanner) { const _dueIds = getReviewsDue(); if (_dueIds.length > 0) { _dueBanner.innerHTML = `
${_dueIds.length}
Review${_dueIds.length > 1 ? 's' : ''} due today
Reinforce what you've learned before you forget it — takes ~2 min
`; } else { _dueBanner.innerHTML = ''; } } renderPracticeStreakPill(); renderWrongCountBadge(); renderPracticeRecords(); renderPracticeRecentSessions(); // Daily goal bar (function() { var _goalEl = document.getElementById('practice-daily-goal-bar'); if (!_goalEl) return; var _today = (typeof todayStr === 'function') ? todayStr() : new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]; var _todayData = S.practice_today || { date: '', count: 0 }; var _todayCount = (_todayData.date === _today) ? (_todayData.count || 0) : 0; var _goal = 10; var _pct = Math.min(100, Math.round((_todayCount / _goal) * 100)); var _done = _todayCount >= _goal; _goalEl.innerHTML = '
' + '
' + ('Daily Goal' + (_done ? ' ✓' : '')) + '' + _todayCount + ' / ' + _goal + ' questions today' + '
' + '

' + '
All
'; COURSE.forEach(function(unit) { var _active = practiceUnitFilter === unit.id ? ' active' : ''; _pills += '
' + 'Unit ' + unit.num + '
'; }); _pills += '
'; _filterRow.innerHTML = _pills; })(); // Pool-size subtitles (function() { // Count total quiz questions from completed lessons var _poolTotal = 0; (S.completed || []).forEach(function(id) { var _l = findLesson(id); if (!_l) return; var _slides = (_l.slides || []).concat(_l.pool || []); _slides.forEach(function(s) { if (s.type === 'quiz') _poolTotal++; }); }); // Fallback: count from unit 1 if completed is empty if (_poolTotal === 0 && typeof COURSE !== 'undefined' && COURSE[0]) { COURSE[0].lessons.forEach(function(ln) { var _slides = (ln.slides || []).concat(ln.pool || []); _slides.forEach(function(s) { if (s.type === 'quiz') _poolTotal++; }); }); } var _quickEl = document.getElementById('practice-pool-size-quick'); if (_quickEl) _quickEl.textContent = _poolTotal > 0 ? _poolTotal + ' questions available' : ''; var _timedEl = document.getElementById('practice-pool-size-timed'); if (_timedEl) _timedEl.textContent = _poolTotal > 0 ? _poolTotal + ' questions available' : ''; // Weak areas: count unique wrong-answer questions var _weakCount = 0; var _wrongSeen = new Set(); (S.wrong_answers || []).forEach(function(wa) { var _wl = findLesson(wa.lessonId); if (!_wl) return; var _ws = (_wl.slides || []).concat(_wl.pool || []); _ws.forEach(function(s) { if (s.type === 'quiz' && !_wrongSeen.has(s.question)) { _wrongSeen.add(s.question); _weakCount++; } }); }); var _weakEl = document.getElementById('practice-pool-size-weak'); if (_weakEl) _weakEl.textContent = _weakCount > 0 ? _weakCount + ' to review' : 'None to review yet'; })(); const history = S.practice_history || []; const el = document.getElementById('practice-history-list'); if (!el) return; const msgEl = document.getElementById('practice-clari-msg'); if (msgEl) msgEl.style.display = 'none'; if (!history.length) { el.innerHTML = `
${clariSVG('waving', 60)}
No sessions yet — and that's fine! When you complete your first lesson, I'll have practice questions ready here. It's how we make things stick.
`; return; } const _showAll = el.dataset.showAll === 'true'; const _visible = _showAll ? history.slice().reverse() : history.slice(-10).reverse(); el.innerHTML = _visible.map(h => `
${h.type === 'quick' ? 'Quick Practice' : h.type === 'weak' ? 'Weak Areas' : 'Timed Challenge'} • ${h.date} ${h.score}/${h.total}
` ).join('') + (history.length > 10 ? `` : ''); } function _buildSparklineSVG(values, w, h) { // values: array of numbers 0-100; w/h: pixel dimensions if (!values || values.length < 2) return ''; var _n = values.length; var _min = Math.min.apply(null, values); var _max = Math.max.apply(null, values); var _range = _max - _min; // Avoid flat line: if all values identical, give 10-unit range if (_range === 0) { _min = Math.max(0, _min - 5); _max = Math.min(100, _max + 5); _range = _max - _min; } if (_range === 0) _range = 1; var _pad = 3; var _innerW = w - _pad * 2; var _innerH = h - _pad * 2; var _pts = values.map(function(v, i) { var _x = _pad + (_innerW * i / (_n - 1)); // Invert Y: high value = top of SVG var _y = _pad + _innerH * (1 - (v - _min) / _range); return _x.toFixed(1) + ',' + _y.toFixed(1); }); var _polyline = _pts.join(' '); // Determine colour by trend: last vs first var _trendColor = values[values.length - 1] >= values[0] ? '#22c55e' : '#ef4444'; // Last dot var _lastPt = _pts[_pts.length - 1].split(','); var _dotX = _lastPt[0]; var _dotY = _lastPt[1]; return ''; } function renderPracticeRecords() { var el = document.getElementById('practice-records-row'); if (!el) return; var best = S.practice_best || {}; var hist = S.practice_history || []; // Total questions answered all-time var totalQ = hist.reduce(function(acc, h) { return acc + (h.total || 0); }, 0); // Best accuracy per mode var bestQuick = best['quick'] != null ? best['quick'] + '%' : '--'; var bestTimed = best['timed'] != null ? best['timed'] + '%' : '--'; var sessions = hist.length; if (totalQ === 0 && sessions === 0) { el.innerHTML = ''; return; } el.innerHTML = '

Math.round((h.score / h.total) * 100) : 0; }); var _svgHtml = _buildSparklineSVG(_pcts, 60, 24); var _divider = document.createElement('div'); _divider.className = 'pr-stat-divider'; _sparkEl.appendChild(_divider); var _statDiv = document.createElement('div'); _statDiv.className = 'pr-stat-sparkline'; _statDiv.innerHTML = _svgHtml + '

'Timed' : t === 'review' ? 'Review' : t === 'weak' ? 'Weak Areas' : 'Quick'; } // Retrieve current open/closed state from DOM var _isOpen = false; var _existing = _wrap.querySelector('.practice-recent-body'); if (_existing) _isOpen = _existing.classList.contains('open'); var _rows = _hist.map(function(h) { var _pct = h.total > 0 ? ' + '' + '

'; } function renderWrongCountBadge() { var _card = document.getElementById('weak-areas-card'); var _badge = document.getElementById('wrong-count-badge'); if (!_card || !_badge) return; // wrong_bank is the persistent store; practiceWrong is session-only var _bank = S.wrong_bank || []; var _count = _bank.length; if (_count > 0) { _badge.textContent = _count > 99 ? '99+' : String(_count); _badge.style.display = 'inline-flex'; _card.style.opacity = ''; _card.removeAttribute('title'); } else { _badge.style.display = 'none'; _card.style.opacity = '0.5'; _card.setAttribute('title', 'No missed questions yet'); } } function renderPracticeStreakPill() { var _el = document.getElementById('practice-streak-pill-wrap'); if (!_el) return; // Compute streak from S.lesson_log (keys are YYYY-MM-DD, truthy values mean active) var _log = S.lesson_log || {}; var _streak = 0; var _d = new Date(); // Start from today and walk backwards for (var _i = 0; _i < 365; _i++) { var _ds = _d.toISOString().split('T')[0]; if (_log[_ds]) { _streak++; _d.setDate(_d.getDate() - 1); } else { break; } } if (_streak === 0) { _el.innerHTML = 'Start your streak today!'; } else { _el.innerHTML = '' + '🔥 ' + _streak + ' day streak'; } } function startWrongReview() { const wrongs = (lessonState.practiceWrong || []).slice(); if (!wrongs.length) return; lessonState.wrongReviewQuestions = wrongs; lessonState.wrongReviewIdx = 0; renderWrongReviewQuestion(); } function renderWrongReviewQuestion() { const wq = lessonState.wrongReviewQuestions; if (!wq || !wq.length) return; const q = wq[lessonState.wrongReviewIdx]; const total = wq.length; const idx = lessonState.wrongReviewIdx; const correctIdx = q.correctIdx != null ? q.correctIdx : (q.correct != null ? q.correct : (q.answer != null ? q.answer : 0)); document.getElementById('lesson-progress-bar').style.width = (((idx + 1) / total) * 100) + '%'; const opts = (q.options || []).map((o, i) => { const isCorrect = i === correctIdx; const bg = isCorrect ? 'background:#dcfce7;border-color:#22c55e;color:#15803d;font-weight:900;' : 'opacity:0.5;'; const label = isCorrect ? ' Correct answer' : ''; return '
' + o + label + '
'; }).join(''); document.getElementById('lesson-content').innerHTML = '

' + '
' + q.question + '
' + '
' + opts + '
'; const isLast = idx >= total - 1; document.getElementById('lesson-footer').innerHTML = isLast ? '' : ''; } function nextWrongReviewQuestion() { lessonState.wrongReviewIdx++; if (lessonState.wrongReviewIdx >= (lessonState.wrongReviewQuestions || []).length) { document.getElementById('lesson-footer').innerHTML = ''; } else { renderWrongReviewQuestion(); } } function showPracticeMsg(clariState, text) { const el = document.getElementById('practice-clari-msg'); if (!el) return; el.style.display = 'block'; el.innerHTML = `
${clariSVG(clariState, 48)}
${text}
`; setTimeout(() => { el.style.display = 'none'; }, 4000); } var practiceUnitFilter = 'all'; function setPracticeUnitFilter(val) { practiceUnitFilter = val || 'all'; // Re-render filter pills to reflect active state (function() { var _row = document.getElementById('practice-unit-filter-row'); if (!_row) return; var _chips = _row.querySelectorAll('.practice-unit-chip'); _chips.forEach(function(c) { c.classList.toggle('active', c.dataset.unit === practiceUnitFilter); }); })(); } let _diffSelectorPracticeType = null; function showDifficultySelector(type) { _diffSelectorPracticeType = type; const el = document.getElementById('practice-diff-selector'); const sub = document.getElementById('diff-card-sub-text'); if (sub) sub.textContent = type === 'timed' ? 'Timed challenge — choose question level' : 'Quick practice — choose question level'; if (el) el.classList.add('open'); } function closeDiffSelector() { const el = document.getElementById('practice-diff-selector'); if (el) el.classList.remove('open'); } function confirmDifficulty(diff) { closeDiffSelector(); if (_diffSelectorPracticeType) startPractice(_diffSelectorPracticeType, diff); } function startPractice(type, difficulty) { let questions = []; const _practiceDiff = difficulty || 'mixed'; if (typeof lessonState !== 'undefined') lessonState.practiceDifficulty = _practiceDiff; // Apply unit filter: restrict completed lessons to selected unit var _completedFiltered = S.completed || []; if (typeof practiceUnitFilter !== 'undefined' && practiceUnitFilter !== 'all' && typeof COURSE !== 'undefined') { var _filterUnit = COURSE.find(function(u) { return u.id === practiceUnitFilter; }); if (_filterUnit) { var _filterIds = new Set(_filterUnit.lessons.map(function(l) { return l.id; })); var _filtered = _completedFiltered.filter(function(id) { return _filterIds.has(id); }); if (_filtered.length > 0) _completedFiltered = _filtered; } } if (type === 'timed' || type === 'quick') { // Gather quiz + tap_correct questions from completed lessons const pool = []; _completedFiltered.forEach(id => { const lesson = findLesson(id); if (!lesson) return; const allSlides = [...(lesson.slides || []), ...(lesson.pool || [])]; allSlides.forEach(slide => { if (slide.type === 'quiz') pool.push({ ...slide, lessonId: id, practiceType: 'quiz' }); }); }); // If not enough completed, use unit1 lessons if (pool.length < 3) { COURSE[0].lessons.forEach(lesson => { const allSlides = [...(lesson.slides || []), ...(lesson.pool || [])]; allSlides.forEach(slide => { if (slide.type === 'quiz' && !pool.find(p => p.question === slide.question)) { pool.push({ ...slide, lessonId: lesson.id, practiceType: 'quiz' }); } }); }); } // Difficulty filter let _filteredPool = pool; if (_practiceDiff === 'easy') { const _easy = pool.filter(q => { const _l = findLesson(q.lessonId); return _l && (_l.tags||[]).includes('beginner'); }); if (_easy.length >= 2) _filteredPool = _easy; } else if (_practiceDiff === 'hard') { const _hard = pool.filter(q => { const _l = findLesson(q.lessonId); return _l && (_l.tags||[]).includes('advanced'); }); if (_hard.length >= 2) _filteredPool = _hard; } // Shuffle for (let i = _filteredPool.length - 1; i > 0; i--) { const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1)); [_filteredPool[i], _filteredPool[j]] = [_filteredPool[j], _filteredPool[i]]; } questions = _filteredPool.slice(0, type === 'timed' ? 10 : 5); } else if (type === 'review') { // Spaced repetition: pick quiz questions from due lessons const dueIds = getReviewsDue(); const reviewLessonIds = dueIds.length > 0 ? dueIds : S.completed.slice(-3); reviewLessonIds.forEach(id => { const lesson = findLesson(id); if (!lesson) return; const allSlides = [...(lesson.slides || []), ...(lesson.pool || [])]; allSlides.forEach(slide => { if (slide.type === 'quiz') questions.push({ ...slide, lessonId: id, practiceType: 'review' }); }); }); // Shuffle and pick up to 5 for (let i = questions.length - 1; i > 0; i--) { const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1)); [questions[i], questions[j]] = [questions[j], questions[i]]; } questions = questions.slice(0, 5); if (!questions.length) { showPracticeMsg('happy', "No reviews due right now — you're all caught up! Come back tomorrow."); return; } } else if (type === 'weak') { const wrong = S.wrong_answers || []; // Get unique questions from wrong answers const seen = new Set(); wrong.forEach(wa => { const lesson = findLesson(wa.lessonId); if (!lesson) return; const allSlides = [...(lesson.slides || []), ...(lesson.pool || [])]; allSlides.forEach(slide => { if (slide.type === 'quiz' && !seen.has(slide.question)) { seen.add(slide.question); questions.push({ ...slide, lessonId: wa.lessonId, practiceType: 'quiz' }); } }); }); if (!questions.length) { // Find first incomplete accessible lesson let suggestLesson = null; for (const unit of COURSE) { for (const l of unit.lessons) { if (!S.completed.includes(l.id) && (l.free || S.premium)) { suggestLesson = l; break; } } if (suggestLesson) break; } const msgEl = document.getElementById('practice-clari-msg'); if (msgEl) { msgEl.style.display = 'block'; msgEl.innerHTML = `
${clariSVG('happy', 48)}
No weak areas yet — you're crushing it! Keep learning to build up your review queue.
${suggestLesson ? `` : ''}
`; } return; } questions = questions.slice(0, 5); } if (!questions.length) { showPracticeMsg('encouraging', "Finish at least one lesson first and I\u2019ll have questions ready for you here! \uD83D\uDCDA"); return; } matchPendingLeft = null; lessonState = { lessonId: '__practice__', slideIdx: 0, hearts: S.hearts, wrongThisLesson: 0, xpEarned: 0, gemsEarned: 0, slideAnswered: false, practiceMode: true, practiceType: type, practiceQuestions: questions, practiceIdx: 0, practiceScore: 0, practiceStartTime: Date.now(), practiceWrong: [], timedInterval: null, timedSeconds: 60, matchSelected: null, matchLeftDone: new Set(), matchRightDone: new Set(), matchPairs: [], fillBlanks: [], fillBankUsed: [], tapSelected: new Set(), correctStreak: 0 }; document.querySelectorAll('.view').forEach(v => v.classList.remove('active')); document.getElementById('view-lesson').classList.add('active'); document.getElementById('top-bar').classList.remove('visible'); document.getElementById('bottom-nav').classList.remove('visible'); renderPracticeQuestion(); if (type === 'timed') startTimedBar(); } function startTimedBar() { // NOTE: DOM bar is injected by renderPracticeQuestion on each render — no injection here lessonState.timedSeconds = 60; lessonState.timedInterval = setInterval(() => { lessonState.timedSeconds--; var _tPct = (lessonState.timedSeconds / 60) * 100; var _tCirc = 138.23; var _tFill = document.getElementById('timed-ring-fill'); var _tLabel = document.getElementById('timed-ring-label'); if (_tFill) { _tFill.setAttribute('stroke-dashoffset', String(_tCirc * (1 - _tPct / 100))); _tFill.setAttribute('stroke', lessonState.timedSeconds <= 5 ? '#ef4444' : lessonState.timedSeconds <= 10 ? '#f97316' : '#58cc02'); } if (_tLabel) _tLabel.textContent = String(lessonState.timedSeconds); // Legacy bar (now hidden via CSS, kept for safety) var bar = document.getElementById('timed-bar'); if (bar) bar.style.width = _tPct + '%'; if (lessonState.timedSeconds <= 0) { clearInterval(lessonState.timedInterval); finishPractice(); } }, 1000); } function renderPracticeQuestion() { const q = lessonState.practiceQuestions[lessonState.practiceIdx]; const total = lessonState.practiceQuestions.length; const idx = lessonState.practiceIdx; document.getElementById('lesson-progress-bar').style.width = ((idx / total) * 100) + '%'; document.getElementById('lesson-hearts').innerHTML = renderHearts(lessonState.hearts, 5); lessonState.slideAnswered = false; const _qCorrect = q.correct != null ? q.correct : (q.answer != null ? q.answer : 0); const opts = q.options.map((o, i) => `` ).join(''); document.getElementById('lesson-content').innerHTML = `
Question ${idx+1} of ${total}
${clariSVG('think', 60)}
${q.question}
${opts}
`; document.getElementById('lesson-footer').innerHTML = ``; if (lessonState.practiceType === 'timed') { var _rPct = (lessonState.timedSeconds / 60) * 100; var _rCirc = 138.23; var _rOffset = _rCirc * (1 - _rPct / 100); var _rColour = lessonState.timedSeconds <= 5 ? '#ef4444' : lessonState.timedSeconds <= 10 ? '#f97316' : '#58cc02'; var _ringHtml = '
' + '
' + '' + '
' + lessonState.timedSeconds + '
' + '

'; var footer = document.getElementById('lesson-footer'); footer.innerHTML = _ringHtml + footer.innerHTML; } } var _PRACTICE_MOTIVATE_MSGS = [ 'Nice one!', 'Keep it up!', "You're on fire!", 'Excellent!', 'Brilliant!', 'Nailed it!', 'Way to go!', 'Superstar!' ]; var _pmIdx = 0; function showPracticeMotivate() { var fb = document.getElementById('quiz-feedback'); if (!fb) return; // Remove any existing motivate element var old = fb.querySelector('.practice-motivate-msg'); if (old) old.remove(); var msg = _PRACTICE_MOTIVATE_MSGS[_pmIdx % _PRACTICE_MOTIVATE_MSGS.length]; _pmIdx++; var el = document.createElement('div'); el.className = 'practice-motivate-msg'; el.textContent = msg; fb.appendChild(el); // Trigger fade-in on next frame requestAnimationFrame(function() { requestAnimationFrame(function() { el.classList.add('visible'); }); }); // Fade out after 1.5 s, then remove setTimeout(function() { el.classList.remove('visible'); setTimeout(function() { if (el.parentNode) el.parentNode.removeChild(el); }, 300); }, 1500); } function selectPracticeOption(el, idx, correct) { if (lessonState.slideAnswered) return; const allOpts = el.closest('.quiz-options').querySelectorAll('.quiz-option'); allOpts.forEach(o => o.classList.remove('selected')); lessonState.slideAnswered = true; if (idx === correct) { el.classList.add('correct'); lessonState.practiceScore++; lessonState.correctStreak = (lessonState.correctStreak || 0) + 1; addXP(5); SoundManager.playCorrect(); showFeedback(true, getCorrectMsg()); if (lessonState.correctStreak === 3) { setTimeout(function() { showClariPopup('star', 'clari-tada', 'On a roll!', 1200); }, 400); } showPracticeMotivate(); } else { el.classList.add('wrong'); allOpts[correct].classList.add('show-correct'); loseHeart(); SoundManager.playIncorrect(); showFeedback(false, getWrongMsg(), allOpts[correct].textContent.trim()); if (_aq) { lessonState.practiceAttempted.push({ question: _aq.question || '', options: _aq.options || [], correct: correct, userCorrect: (idx === correct) }); } })(); // Increment daily goal counter (function() { var _today = (typeof todayStr === 'function') ? todayStr() : new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]; var _td = S.practice_today || { date: '', count: 0 }; var _newCount = (_td.date === _today) ? ((_td.count || 0) + 1) : 1; save('practice_today', { date: _today, count: _newCount }); })(); // Track for wrong-answer review if (!lessonState.practiceWrong) lessonState.practiceWrong = []; const _curQ = lessonState.practiceQuestions[lessonState.practiceIdx]; if (_curQ) lessonState.practiceWrong.push({ ..._curQ, correctIdx: correct }); lessonState.correctStreak = 0; } const btn = document.getElementById('lesson-next-btn'); if (btn) btn.disabled = false; } function nextPracticeQuestion() { lessonState.practiceIdx++; if (lessonState.practiceIdx >= lessonState.practiceQuestions.length) { if (lessonState.timedInterval) clearInterval(lessonState.timedInterval); finishPractice(); } else { renderPracticeQuestion(); if (lessonState.practiceType === 'timed') { // Re-attach timed bar (handled in renderPracticeQuestion) } } } function calculatePracticeXP(score, type, perfect, streakDays) { var _base = 20; var _rows = [{ label: 'Base practice XP', val: _base, bonus: false }]; var _typeBonus = 0; if (type === 'timed') { _typeBonus = 20; _rows.push({ label: 'Speed bonus (Timed mode)', val: _typeBonus, bonus: true }); } else if (type === 'review') { _typeBonus = 15; _rows.push({ label: 'Review mode bonus', val: _typeBonus, bonus: true }); } var _perfectBonus = 0; if (perfect) { _perfectBonus = 10; _rows.push({ label: 'Perfect score bonus', val: _perfectBonus, bonus: true }); } var _streakBonus = 0; if (streakDays >= 7) { _streakBonus = 5; _rows.push({ label: '7-day streak bonus', val: _streakBonus, bonus: true }); } else if (streakDays >= 3) { _streakBonus = 2; _rows.push({ label: '3-day streak bonus', val: _streakBonus, bonus: true }); } var _total = _base + _typeBonus + _perfectBonus + _streakBonus; return { rows: _rows, total: _total }; } function challengeFriend() { var _score = (lessonState && lessonState.practiceScore != null) ? lessonState.practiceScore : 0; var _total = (lessonState && lessonState.practiceQuestions) ? lessonState.practiceQuestions.length : 0; var _pct = _total > 0 ? Math.round((_score / _total) * 100) : 0; var _msg = 'I scored ' + _pct + '% on AI Mentor practice! Can you beat me? Try it at clari.ai \U0001F916'; if (navigator.share) { navigator.share({ title: 'AI Mentor Practice Challenge', text: _msg, url: 'https://clari.ai' }) .catch(function() {}); } else { try { navigator.clipboard.writeText(_msg); showToast('Challenge copied to clipboard! \U0001F4CB', 'success', 2500); } catch(e) { showToast(_msg, 'info', 4000); } } } function finishPractice() { const total = lessonState.practiceQuestions.length; const score = lessonState.practiceScore; const isReview = lessonState.practiceType === 'review'; const bonusXP = lessonState.practiceType === 'timed' ? 20 : isReview ? 15 : 0; addXP(20 + bonusXP); // base practice XP addGems(5); // Update SR stages for reviewed lessons if (isReview) { const passed = score / Math.max(total, 1) >= 0.8; const reviewedLessonIds = [...new Set(lessonState.practiceQuestions.map(q => q.lessonId))]; reviewedLessonIds.forEach(id => updateReviewStage(id, passed)); updateNavBadges(); } // Save to history const hist = S.practice_history || []; hist.push({ type: lessonState.practiceType, score, total, date: todayStr() }); if (hist.length > 20) hist.shift(); save('practice_history', hist); // Increment weekly session counter (function() { const _cw = (typeof getISOWeek === 'function') ? getISOWeek() : ''; const _psw = S.practice_sessions_week || { week: '', count: 0 }; const _newCount = (_psw.week === _cw) ? (_psw.count + 1) : 1; save('practice_sessions_week', { week: _cw, count: _newCount }); })(); // Track best score per practice type const _bestMap = S.practice_best || {}; const _typeKey = lessonState.practiceType; const _pct = total > 0 ? Math.round((score / total) * 100) : 0; if (!_bestMap[_typeKey] || _pct > _bestMap[_typeKey]) { _bestMap[_typeKey] = _pct; save('practice_best', _bestMap); } // Achievement const earned = S.achievements || []; if (!earned.includes('practice_1')) { save('achievements', [...earned, 'practice_1']); showAchievementToast('practice_1'); } document.getElementById('lesson-progress-bar').style.width = '100%'; const _elapsed = Math.round((Date.now() - (lessonState.practiceStartTime || Date.now())) / 1000); const _elapsedStr = _elapsed >= 60 ? Math.floor(_elapsed/60) + 'm ' + (_elapsed%60) + 's' : _elapsed + 's'; const _accuracy = total > 0 ? Math.round((score / total) * 100) : 0; const _bestMap2 = S.practice_best || {}; const _prevBest = _bestMap2[lessonState.practiceType]; const _isNewBest = _prevBest !== undefined && _accuracy >= _prevBest && total > 0; const _bestLine = _prevBest !== undefined ? (_isNewBest && _accuracy > (_prevBest - (_isNewBest ? 0 : 1)) ? '
⭐ New best! ' + _accuracy + '%
' : '
Best: ' + _prevBest + '%
') : ''; document.getElementById('lesson-content').innerHTML = `
${clariSVG(score >= total * 0.7 ? 'celebrating' : 'happy', 100)}
${score}/${total}
${_accuracy}% accuracy
${_bestLine}
Time: ${_elapsedStr}
${score === total ? 'Perfect — you nailed every single one!' : score >= total * 0.7 ? 'Solid work! You\'re building real skills.' : 'Every try makes you better — come back again!'}
+${20 + bonusXP} XP earned
${lessonState.practiceType === 'timed' ? '
Timed bonus XP included!
' : lessonState.practiceType === 'review' ? "
Review bonus XP — memory locked in!
" : ''}
`; // Render answer-review collapsible panel (function() { var _attempted = lessonState.practiceAttempted || []; if (_attempted.length === 0) return; var _scoreCardEl = document.querySelector('#lesson-content .score-card'); if (!_scoreCardEl) return; var _panelDiv = document.createElement('div'); _panelDiv.className = 'practice-review-panel'; var _correctCount = _attempted.filter(function(a) { return a.userCorrect; }).length; _panelDiv.innerHTML = '' + '
' + _attempted.map(function(a) { var _q = a.question.length > 60 ? a.question.slice(0, 57) + '...' : a.question; var _correctText = (a.options && a.options[a.correct]) ? a.options[a.correct] : ''; var _icon = a.userCorrect ? '✓' : '✗'; return '
' + _icon + '
' + _q + '
' + (a.userCorrect ? '' : '
✔ ' + _correctText + '
') + '
'; }).join('') + '
'; _scoreCardEl.appendChild(_panelDiv); })(); // Render animated XP breakdown (function() { var _panel = document.getElementById('practice-xp-breakdown-panel'); if (!_panel) return; // Compute streak for bonus var _log = S.lesson_log || {}; var _streak = 0; var _sd = new Date(); for (var _si = 0; _si < 365; _si++) { var _ds = _sd.toISOString().split('T')[0]; if (_log[_ds]) { _streak++; _sd.setDate(_sd.getDate() - 1); } else { break; } } var _xpData = calculatePracticeXP(_accuracy, lessonState.practiceType, _accuracy === 100 && total > 0, _streak); var _rowsHtml = _xpData.rows.map(function(r, i) { return '
' + '' + r.label + '' + '+' + r.val + ' XP' + '

' + '

Try Hard mode next time 💪', 'success', 3500); }, 800); } else if (_accuracy <= 40 && _curDiff !== 'easy') { setTimeout(function() { showToast('Try Easy mode to build confidence 🎯', 'info', 3500); }, 800); } })(); document.getElementById('lesson-footer').innerHTML = _reviewBtn + `` + `` + ``; } // ============================================================ // DYNAMIC RECOMMENDATIONS // ============================================================ function getDynamicRecommendations(q1Key, n) { const categoryMap = { writing: ['u2l3', 'u1l3', 'u4l2', 'u2l1', 'u3l2'], research: ['u2l4', 'u1l2', 'u5l1', 'u3l3', 'u5l2'], work: ['u3l1', 'u3l2', 'u3l4', 'u3l3', 'u2l2'], creative: ['u4l1', 'u4l2', 'u4l3', 'u2l1', 'u8l2'], basics: ['u1l1', 'u1l2', 'u1l3', 'u2l1', 'u2l2'], // Profession-specific pools — these lead with the dedicated unit lessons admin: ['u10l1', 'u10l2', 'u10l3', 'u10l4', 'u2l3', 'u1l3'], bookkeeping: ['u11l1', 'u11l2', 'u11l3', 'u11l4', 'u2l3', 'u1l3'], customer_service: ['u12l1', 'u12l2', 'u12l3', 'u12l4', 'u2l3', 'u1l3'], finance: ['u9l1', 'u9l2', 'u9l3', 'u11l1', 'u2l3'] }; // Profession takes priority over q1 category if available const sa = S.survey_answers || obState.surveyAnswers || {}; const profCategory = PROFESSION_MAP && sa.q_profession ? PROFESSION_MAP[sa.q_profession] : null; const effectiveKey = profCategory || q1Key; const pool = [...(categoryMap[effectiveKey] || categoryMap.basics)]; // Add lessons from wrong_answers first (review priority) const wrongLessonIds = [...new Set((S.wrong_answers || []).map(w => w.lessonId))]; const reviewFirst = wrongLessonIds.filter(id => !S.completed.includes(id) && !pool.includes(id)); const fullPool = [...reviewFirst, ...pool]; // Filter out completed const incomplete = fullPool.filter(id => !S.completed.includes(id) && findLesson(id)); // Fall back to any incomplete lesson if pool exhausted if (incomplete.length < n) { for (const unit of COURSE) { for (const l of unit.lessons) { if (!S.completed.includes(l.id) && !incomplete.includes(l.id)) { incomplete.push(l.id); } } } } return incomplete.slice(0, n); } // ============================================================ // MY PLAN TAB // ============================================================ // Restart the onboarding survey so the user can (re)build their plan function retakePlanSurvey() { obState.surveyStep = 0; obState.surveyAnswers = {}; document.querySelectorAll('.view').forEach(function(v) { v.classList.remove('active'); }); document.getElementById('view-onboarding').classList.add('active'); document.getElementById('top-bar').classList.remove('visible'); document.getElementById('bottom-nav').classList.remove('visible'); renderObDots('ob-dots-survey', 2, 6); renderSurveyQuestion(); obShowScreen('ob-survey'); } function renderPlanTab() { var sa = S.survey_answers || {}; // Empty state — survey not completed yet if (!sa.q1) { document.getElementById('plan-content').innerHTML = '
' + clariSVG('encouraging', 80) + '
Personalize your AI plan!
' + '
Answer 4 quick questions so I can recommend the right lessons and tools for you.
' + '' + '

'#58CC02' : (_gClose ? Otherwise fall back to AVATAR_CONFIGS[idx]. const skin = (customOpts && customOpts.skin) || (AVATAR_CONFIGS[idx] || AVATAR_CONFIGS[0]).skin; const hair = (customOpts && customOpts.hairColor) || (AVATAR_CONFIGS[idx] || AVATAR_CONFIGS[0]).hair; const hairStyle = (customOpts && customOpts.hairStyle) || (AVATAR_CONFIGS[idx] ? (AVATAR_CONFIGS[idx].curly ? 'curly' : (AVATAR_CONFIGS[idx].hairStyle || 'straight')) : 'straight'); const glasses = (customOpts && customOpts.glasses !== undefined) ? customOpts.glasses : !!((AVATAR_CONFIGS[idx] || {}).hasGlasses); const hat = (customOpts && customOpts.hat) || false; const cx = size / 2, cy = size / 2; const r = size * 0.34; // Better-looking head: slightly oval (taller than wide) // Background circle (subtle light tone) const bg = ``; // Neck const neckW = r * 0.38, neckH = r * 0.32; const neck = ``; // Shoulders (give avatar a body feel) const shoulY = cy + r * 1.0; const shoulders = ``; // Face oval (slightly taller) const face = ``; // --- Hair --- let hairSVG = ''; if (hairStyle === 'curly') { hairSVG = ` `; } else if (hairStyle === 'short') { hairSVG = ``; } else if (hairStyle === 'long') { hairSVG = ` `; } else if (hairStyle === 'none') { hairSVG = ''; // bald } else { // straight / default hairSVG = ``; } // Eyebrows const eyeLX = cx - r * 0.32, eyeRX = cx + r * 0.32, eyeY = cy - r * 0.1; const browY = eyeY - r * 0.22; const browW = r * 0.34; const eyebrows = ` `; // Eyes (white sclera + dark iris + glint) const eyeR = r * 0.13; const eyes = ` `; // Nose (small simple shape) const noseY = cy + r * 0.22; const nose = ``; // Smile const mouthY = cy + r * 0.55; const smile = ``; // Glasses overlay let glassesSVG = ''; if (glasses) { const gY = eyeY, gR = eyeR * 1.55, gStroke = Math.max(1.2, size * 0.03); glassesSVG = ` `; } // Hat let hatSVG = ''; if (hat) { const hatW = r * 1.5, hatH = r * 0.55, hatBrimW = r * 1.8, hatBrimH = r * 0.18; const hatTopY = cy - r * 1.05; hatSVG = ` `; } return ``; } function rateLessonStar(rating) { var ratings = Object.assign({}, S.lesson_ratings || {}); ratings[lessonState.lessonId] = rating; save('lesson_ratings', ratings); document.querySelectorAll('.lesson-rating-star').forEach(function(btn, i) { btn.classList.toggle('filled', i < rating); }); var msgs = ['', 'Thanks for the feedback!', 'Got it, thanks!', 'Good to know!', 'Glad you enjoyed it!', '🌟 Awesome — you loved it!']; showToast(msgs[rating] || 'Thanks!', 'success', 1500); } function toggleVocabGlossary() { var btn = document.getElementById('vocab-glossary-btn'); var list = document.getElementById('vocab-glossary-list'); if (!btn || !list) return; var isOpen = list.classList.contains('open'); list.classList.toggle('open', !isOpen); btn.classList.toggle('open', !isOpen); var arrow = btn.querySelector('.vtoggle-arrow'); if (arrow) arrow.textContent = isOpen ? '▼' : '▲'; } function toggleQuizHint() { var btn = document.getElementById('quiz-hint-btn'); var box = document.getElementById('quiz-hint-box'); if (!btn || !box) return; if (!lessonState.hintUsed && lessonState.wrongThisLesson === 0) { btn.textContent = '💡 Try first!'; setTimeout(function() { btn.innerHTML = '💡 Hint'; }, 1200); return; } lessonState.hintUsed = true; var isVisible = box.classList.contains('visible'); if (isVisible) { box.classList.remove('visible'); btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false'); } else { box.classList.add('visible'); btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true'); btn.classList.add('hint-used'); } } function saveCompleteLessonNote() { var textarea = document.getElementById('lesson-note-input'); if (!textarea) return; var notes = Object.assign({}, S.lesson_notes || {}); notes[lessonState.lessonId] = textarea.value.trim(); save('lesson_notes', notes); // Flash the inline saved indicator (if present), else show toast var ind = document.getElementById('note-autosave-ind'); if (ind) { ind.classList.add('visible'); setTimeout(function() { ind.classList.remove('visible'); }, 1800); } else { showToast('📝 Note saved!', 'success', 1500); } } function toggleFocusMode() { var lessonView = document.getElementById('view-lesson'); var btn = document.getElementById('focus-mode-btn'); if (!lessonView) return; var isActive = lessonView.classList.toggle('focus-mode'); if (btn) btn.classList.toggle('active', isActive); showToast(isActive ? '🎯 Focus mode on' : 'Focus mode off', 'info', 1500); } function getAvatarOpts() { if (S.avatar_custom) return S.avatar_custom; return null; // use S.avatar index } function editProfileName() { const nameEl = document.getElementById('profile-name-text'); const editBtn = document.querySelector('.profile-name-edit-btn'); const current = S.user_name || 'Learner'; nameEl.innerHTML = ``; if (editBtn) editBtn.style.display = 'none'; const input = document.getElementById('profile-name-edit-input'); input.focus(); input.select(); input.onkeydown = e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') saveProfileName(); if (e.key === 'Escape') renderProfileTab(); }; } function saveProfileName() { const input = document.getElementById('profile-name-edit-input'); if (!input) return; const newName = input.value.trim(); if (newName) save('user_name', newName); renderProfileTab(); } function editProfileGoal() { var _wrap = document.getElementById('profile-goal-row-wrap'); var _textEl = document.getElementById('profile-goal-text-el'); if (!_wrap || !_textEl) return; var _sa = S.survey_answers || {}; var _cur = (_sa.q1 || '').trim() || 'Set your learning goal'; _wrap.innerHTML = '

'; })(); const _levelChipWrap = document.getElementById('profile-level-chip-wrap'); if (_levelChipWrap) _levelChipWrap.innerHTML = `

`; const _xpInLevel = (S.xp || 0) % 100; const _xpBarOuter = document.getElementById('profile-xp-bar-wrap-outer'); // Build 7-day XP sparkline (function() { const _spDays = Array.from({ length: 7 }, (_, i) => { const d = new Date(); d.setDate(d.getDate() - (6 - i)); return d.toISOString().split('T')[0]; }); const _spLog = S.xp_log || []; const _spVals = _spDays.map(d => { const e = _spLog.find(x => x.d === d); return e ? e.xp : 0; }); const _spMax = Math.max(..._spVals, 1); const _spW = 80, _spH = 22, _spPad = 2; const _spPoints = _spVals.map((v, i) => { const x = _spPad + i * ((_spW - _spPad * 2) / 6); const y = _spH - _spPad - (v / _spMax) * (_spH - _spPad * 2); return x.toFixed(1) + ',' + y.toFixed(1); }).join(' '); const _hasAnyXp = _spVals.some(v => v > 0); const _spSvg = _hasAnyXp ? `` : ``; if (_xpBarOuter) _xpBarOuter.innerHTML = `
${_xpInLevel} / 100 XP to Level ${level + 1}
${_spSvg}
7-day XP trend
`; })(); const _strip = document.getElementById('profile-stat-strip'); if (_strip) _strip.innerHTML = `
