Certificates
' + _certsInner; _settingsCard.parentNode.insertBefore(_certCard, _settingsCard); } } // My Terms Glossary section let _glossaryCard = document.getElementById('profile-glossary-card'); if (!_glossaryCard) { _glossaryCard = document.createElement('div'); _glossaryCard.className = 'section-card'; _glossaryCard.id = 'profile-glossary-card'; const _profileBody = document.querySelector('#view-profile .profile-body'); if (_profileBody) _profileBody.appendChild(_glossaryCard); } if (_glossaryCard) { _glossaryCard.innerHTML = `
\u{1F4D6} My Terms (${(S.glossary||[]).length})
\u{1F50D}
${(S.glossary||[]).length} term${(S.glossary||[]).length !== 1 ? 's' : ''} saved
`; renderGlossary(''); } // Render lesson notes renderProfileNotes(); renderUnit1CertBtn(); } // ── Glossary helpers ────────────────────────────────────── function saveToGlossary(term, definition, source) { if (!term || !definition) return; const existing = (S.glossary || []).find(t => t.term.toLowerCase() === term.toLowerCase()); if (existing) return; // already saved const entry = { term, definition, source: source || 'Lesson', date: todayStr() }; const updated = [entry, ...(S.glossary || [])]; save('glossary', updated); showToast('\u{1F4D6} "' + term + '" saved to My Terms!', 'success', 2500); } function removeFromGlossary(term) { const updated = (S.glossary || []).filter(t => t.term !== term); save('glossary', updated); renderGlossary(document.getElementById('glossary-search-input')?.value || ''); } function renderGlossary(filter) { const container = document.getElementById('glossary-list'); if (!container) return; const q = (filter || '').toLowerCase().trim(); const terms = (S.glossary || []).filter(t => !q || t.term.toLowerCase().includes(q) || t.definition.toLowerCase().includes(q) ); const countEl = document.getElementById('glossary-count'); if (countEl) countEl.textContent = (S.glossary || []).length + ' term' + ((S.glossary||[]).length !== 1 ? 's' : '') + ' saved'; if (!terms.length) { container.innerHTML = `
\u{1F4D6}
${q ? 'No terms match "' + q + '"' : 'No terms saved yet. Complete lessons to build your glossary!'}
`; return; } container.innerHTML = terms.map(t => `
${t.term}
${t.definition}
${t.source} ${t.date}
`).join(''); } function selectAvatar(idx) { save('avatar', idx); save('avatar_custom', null); document.querySelectorAll('.avatar-option').forEach((el, i) => el.classList.toggle('selected', i === idx)); var _ringOuter = document.getElementById('profile-avatar-ring'); if (_ringOuter) { var _inner = _ringOuter.querySelector('.profile-avatar-ring-animated'); if (_inner) { _inner.innerHTML = avatarSVG(idx, 82); } else { _ringOuter.innerHTML = avatarSVG(idx, 88); } } } function toggleAvatarCustomizer() { // no-op — customizer is now always visible return; } function updateAvatarCustom(prop, val) { const cur = S.avatar_custom || (() => { const cfg = AVATAR_CONFIGS[S.avatar || 0] || AVATAR_CONFIGS[0]; return { skin: cfg.skin, hairStyle: cfg.curly ? 'curly' : (cfg.hairStyle || 'straight'), hairColor: cfg.hair, glasses: !!cfg.hasGlasses, hat: false }; })(); const next = Object.assign({}, cur, { [prop]: val }); save('avatar_custom', next); // Update preview const prev = document.getElementById('av-preview'); if (prev) prev.innerHTML = avatarSVG(null, 88, next); // Update ring const ring = document.getElementById('profile-avatar-ring'); if (ring) { var _ri = ring.querySelector('.profile-avatar-ring-animated'); if (_ri) { _ri.innerHTML = avatarSVG(null, 82, next); } else { ring.innerHTML = avatarSVG(null, 88, next); } } // Deselect preset document.querySelectorAll('.avatar-option').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('selected')); // Update swatch/button selection document.querySelectorAll('.av-swatch').forEach(el => { const c = el.style.background; el.classList.toggle('selected', c === val || c === next.skin || c === next.hairColor); }); } function clearAvatarCustom() { save('avatar_custom', null); renderProfileTab(); } function cycleDailyGoal() { const goals = [1, 2, 3, 5]; const idx = goals.indexOf(S.daily_goal); const next = goals[(idx + 1) % goals.length]; save('daily_goal', next); renderProfileTab(); } function setTextSize(size) { save('text_size', size); document.body.classList.remove('text-large', 'text-xl'); if (size === 'large') document.body.classList.add('text-large'); if (size === 'xl') document.body.classList.add('text-xl'); renderProfileTab(); } function showHeatmapTooltip(e, date, count) { let tip = document.getElementById('hm-tooltip-el'); if (!tip) { tip = document.createElement('div'); tip.id = 'hm-tooltip-el'; tip.className = 'hm-tooltip'; document.body.appendChild(tip); } const label = count === 0 ? 'No lessons' : count === 1 ? '1 lesson' : count + ' lessons'; const d = new Date(date + 'T12:00:00'); const dateStr = d.toLocaleDateString('en-GB', { day: 'numeric', month: 'short' }); tip.textContent = dateStr + ' · ' + label; tip.classList.add('visible'); const rect = e.target.getBoundingClientRect(); tip.style.left = Math.min(rect.left + rect.width/2 - 70, window.innerWidth - 190) + 'px'; tip.style.top = (rect.top - 44) + 'px'; setTimeout(() => tip.classList.remove('visible'), 2000); } function toggleReminder(enabled) { save('reminder_enabled', !!enabled); renderProfileTab(); } function setReminderTime(timeVal) { if (timeVal) save('reminder_time', timeVal); // Re-render only the note text if present, no full re-render needed var _noteEl = document.querySelector('.reminder-note'); if (_noteEl) { var _t = S.reminder_time || '08:00'; _noteEl.textContent = 'We\'ll remind you at ' + _t + ' each day. Enable notifications in your browser settings to receive alerts.'; } var _inp = document.querySelector('.reminder-time-input'); if (_inp && _inp.value !== timeVal) _inp.value = timeVal; } function confirmReset() { if (confirm('Reset all progress? This cannot be undone.')) { const keys = ['xp','streak','streak_date','hearts','completed','premium', 'user_name','experience','tech_comfort','gems','level','achievements', 'daily_goal','goal_date','goal_today','avatar','active_days','wrong_answers', 'survey_answers','onboarded','text_size','practice_history','practice_best','practice_sessions_week', 'dark_mode','sound_enabled','resume_lesson','clari_theme','xp_boost_active', 'streak_freeze','premium_pending','lesson_reviews', 'weekly_xp','weekly_week','weekly_best','weekly_completed','weekly_lessons_done','weekly_perfect_count', 'tts_enabled','tts_rate','earned_certs', 'clari_tips_seen','clari_streak_celebrated','xp_log','track_collapsed','last_welcome_date', 'avatar_custom','lesson_log','glossary','best_streak','reminder_enabled','reminder_time']; keys.forEach(k => localStorage.removeItem('clariai_' + k)); location.reload(); } } // ============================================================ // LESSON NOTES // ============================================================ function toggleLessonNote(lessonId) { const area = document.getElementById('lesson-note-area'); const saveBtn = document.getElementById('lesson-note-save'); const toggleBtn = document.getElementById('lesson-note-toggle'); if (!area) return; const isVisible = area.classList.contains('visible'); area.classList.toggle('visible', !isVisible); if (saveBtn) saveBtn.classList.toggle('visible', !isVisible); if (toggleBtn && !isVisible) area.focus(); } function saveLessonNote(lessonId) { const area = document.getElementById('lesson-note-area'); if (!area) return; const text = area.value.trim(); const notes = Object.assign({}, S.notes || {}); if (text) { notes[lessonId] = text; } else { delete notes[lessonId]; } save('notes', notes); const toggleBtn = document.getElementById('lesson-note-toggle'); if (toggleBtn) { toggleBtn.className = 'lesson-note-btn' + (text ? ' has-note' : ''); toggleBtn.innerHTML = '\u{1F4DD} ' + (text ? 'Edit Note' : 'Add Note'); } showToast(text ? 'Note saved!' : 'Note cleared', 'success', 1800); } function renderProfileNotes() { const el = document.getElementById('profile-notes-list'); if (!el) return; const notes = S.notes || {}; const keys = Object.keys(notes); if (keys.length === 0) { el.innerHTML = '
No notes yet — tap "Add Note" on any info slide to jot something down.
'; return; } el.innerHTML = keys.map(lessonId => { const lesson = findLesson(lessonId); const title = lesson ? lesson.title : lessonId; const text = escHtml(notes[lessonId]); return '
\u{1F5D1} Delete
' + escHtml(title) + '
' + text + '
'; }).join(''); } function deleteLessonNote(lessonId) { const notes = Object.assign({}, S.notes || {}); delete notes[lessonId]; save('notes', notes); renderProfileNotes(); } // ============================================================ // COPY PROMPT // ============================================================ function copyPromptText(text, btn) { if (!navigator.clipboard) { showToast('Copy not supported in this browser', 'error', 2000); return; } navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(function() { if (btn) { btn.classList.add('copied'); btn.textContent = 'Copied!'; setTimeout(function() { btn.classList.remove('copied'); btn.innerHTML = '⎘ Copy'; }, 1800); } showToast('Prompt copied to clipboard!', 'success', 2000); }).catch(function() { showToast('Could not copy — try selecting it manually', 'error', 2500); }); } // ============================================================ // TOAST // ============================================================ function showToast(msg, level, duration) { let toast = document.getElementById('clari-toast'); if (!toast) { toast = document.createElement('div'); toast.id = 'clari-toast'; toast.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;bottom:80px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(80px);z-index:9999;background:var(--white);border-radius:14px;padding:11px 16px 11px 14px;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);min-width:220px;max-width:340px;text-align:left;transition:transform 0.3s,opacity 0.3s;opacity:0;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;'; document.body.appendChild(toast); } // Icon + accent color per level const TOAST_LEVELS = { success: { color: 'var(--green)', icon: '' }, error: { color: 'var(--red)', icon: '' }, info: { color: 'var(--blue)', icon: '' }, warning: { color: '#f59e0b', icon: '' } }; const cfg = TOAST_LEVELS[level] || TOAST_LEVELS.info; toast.style.borderLeft = '4px solid ' + cfg.color; toast.innerHTML = '' + cfg.icon + '' + '' + msg + ''; toast.style.transform = 'translateX(-50%) translateY(0)'; toast.style.opacity = '1'; clearTimeout(toast._t); toast._t = setTimeout(() => { toast.style.transform = 'translateX(-50%) translateY(80px)'; toast.style.opacity = '0'; }, duration || 2500); } // ============================================================ // GEM SHOP // ============================================================ const SHOP_ITEMS = [ { id: 'streak_freeze', name: 'Streak Freeze', desc: 'Protect your streak for 1 missed day', cost: 20, icon: "️" }, { id: 'heart_refill', name: 'Heart Refill', desc: 'Refill all your hearts to 5', cost: 15, icon: "️" }, { id: 'xp_boost', name: 'XP Boost (1 lesson)', desc: 'Double XP on your next lesson', cost: 30, icon: "" }, { id: 'theme_coral', name: 'Clari Theme: Coral', desc: 'Give Clari a coral gradient', cost: 50, icon: "" }, { id: 'theme_purple', name: 'Clari Theme: Purple', desc: 'Give Clari a purple gradient', cost: 50, icon: "" }, { id: 'theme_gold', name: 'Clari Theme: Gold', desc: 'Give Clari a gold gradient', cost: 75, icon: "" } ]; function openGemShop() { const modal = document.getElementById('gem-shop-modal'); if (!modal) return; document.getElementById('gem-shop-clari').innerHTML = clariSVG('excited', 70); document.getElementById('gem-shop-balance').textContent = `You have ${S.gems || 0} gems`; const list = document.getElementById('shop-items-list'); const THEME_ICONS = { theme_coral: clariSVG('happy', 36, 'coral'), theme_purple: clariSVG('happy', 36, 'purple'), theme_gold: clariSVG('happy', 36, 'gold') }; list.innerHTML = SHOP_ITEMS.map(item => { const canAfford = (S.gems || 0) >= item.cost; const iconHtml = THEME_ICONS[item.id] || item.icon; return `
${iconHtml}
${item.name}
${item.desc}
${item.cost}
`; }).join(''); modal.classList.add('open'); } function buyShopItem(itemId, cost) { if ((S.gems || 0) < cost) return; save('gems', S.gems - cost); switch(itemId) { case 'streak_freeze': save('streak_freeze', true); showToast("Streak Freeze activated! ️", 'success'); break; case 'heart_refill': save('hearts', 5); updateTopBar(); showToast("Hearts refilled! ️", 'success'); break; case 'xp_boost': save('xp_boost_active', true); showToast("XP Boost ready! Next lesson = 2x XP ", 'success'); break; case 'theme_coral': save('clari_theme', 'coral'); showToast("Clari theme changed to Coral! ", 'success'); break; case 'theme_purple': save('clari_theme', 'purple'); showToast("Clari theme changed to Purple! ", 'success'); break; case 'theme_gold': save('clari_theme', 'gold'); showToast("Clari theme changed to Gold! ", 'success'); break; } updateTopBar(); openGemShop(); // Refresh shop to show updated gem count } // ============================================================ // WEB SHARE API — MILESTONE SHARING // ============================================================ function checkMilestoneShare() { const streak = S.streak || 0; const level = xpToLevel(S.xp); const unit1Done = COURSE[0].lessons.every(l => S.completed.includes(l.id)); let shareText = null; if (streak === 7 || streak === 14 || streak === 30) { shareText = ` ${streak}-day learning streak on ClariAI! I've been learning about AI every day. Join me!`; } else if (level % 5 === 0 && level >= 5) { shareText = ` Just hit Level ${level} on ClariAI — learning AI one lesson at a time!`; } else if (unit1Done && S.completed.length === COURSE[0].lessons.length) { shareText = ` Just finished Unit 1 of ClariAI — mastering AI basics! This app is awesome.`; } if (!shareText) return ''; return `
${streak > 0 && (streak === 7 || streak === 14 || streak === 30) ? `${streak}-day streak!` : level % 5 === 0 ? `Level ${level} reached!` : 'Unit complete!'} Share your progress?
`; } function doShare(shareText) { const plainText = shareText.replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); if (navigator.share) { navigator.share({ title: 'ClariAI Progress', text: plainText, url: window.location.href }).catch(() => {}); } else { navigator.clipboard.writeText(plainText + ' ' + window.location.href).then(() => { showToast('Copied to clipboard!', 'success'); }).catch(() => { showToast('Share: ' + plainText, 'info', 4000); }); } } function showShareWinCard(lessonTitle, xpEarned, wrongCount, totalQuestions, isNewPb) { var _wrong = wrongCount || 0; var _total = totalQuestions || 0; var _perfect = _total > 0 && _wrong === 0; var _score = _total > 0 ? (_total - _wrong) + '/' + _total + ' correct' : ''; var shareText; if (_perfect && isNewPb) { shareText = '\U0001F389 I just completed \u201c' + lessonTitle + '\u201d on AI Mentor with a perfect score! \U0001F3C6 New personal best! +' + xpEarned + ' XP earned. \U0001F9E0 #AILearning #AIMentor'; } else if (_perfect) { shareText = '\U0001F389 I just completed \u201c' + lessonTitle + '\u201d on AI Mentor with a perfect score! +' + xpEarned + ' XP earned. \U0001F9E0 #AILearning #AIMentor'; } else if (_score) { shareText = '\U0001F44D I just completed \u201c' + lessonTitle + '\u201d on AI Mentor with ' + _score + '! +' + xpEarned + ' XP earned. \U0001F9E0 #AILearning #AIMentor'; } else { shareText = '\U0001F389 I just completed \u201c' + lessonTitle + '\u201d on AI Mentor and earned +' + xpEarned + ' XP! \U0001F9E0 #AILearning #AIMentor'; } var scoreDisplay = _perfect ? '
\u2B50 Perfect score!
' : (_score ? '
' + _score + '
' : ''); var pbBadge = isNewPb ? '
\U0001F3C6 New personal best!
' : ''; var shareLabel = (navigator.share ? '\U0001F4E4 Share' : '\U0001F4CB Copy to clipboard'); var modalHtml = '
' + '
' + '
AI Mentor
' + scoreDisplay + pbBadge + '
' + escHtml(lessonTitle) + '
' + '
+' + xpEarned + ' XP earned
' + '
clari.ai
' + '
' + '' + '' + '
'; let modal = document.getElementById('share-win-modal'); if (!modal) { modal = document.createElement('div'); modal.id = 'share-win-modal'; modal.className = 'modal-overlay'; modal.onclick = function(e) { if (e.target === modal) closeModal('share-win-modal'); }; document.body.appendChild(modal); } modal.innerHTML = '
' + '
\U0001F389 Share Your Win
' + modalHtml + '
'; modal.classList.add('open'); } function doShareWin(text) { if (navigator.share) { navigator.share({ title: 'ClariAI Progress', text: text, url: window.location.href }).catch(() => {}); } else { navigator.clipboard.writeText(text + ' ' + window.location.href).then(() => { showToast('Copied to clipboard — paste anywhere to share!', 'success', 2500); }).catch(() => { showToast('Share: ' + text, 'info', 4000); }); } closeModal('share-win-modal'); } // ============================================================ // COMPLETION CERTIFICATE // ============================================================ function showCertificateButton() { const freeLessons = []; COURSE.forEach(u => u.lessons.forEach(l => { if (l.free) freeLessons.push(l.id); })); const allFreeDone = freeLessons.every(id => S.completed.includes(id)); if (!allFreeDone) return ''; return `
`; } function generateCertificate() { const canvas = document.createElement('canvas'); canvas.width = 1200; canvas.height = 850; const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d'); // Background gradient const grad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 1200, 850); grad.addColorStop(0, '#e8f4ff'); grad.addColorStop(1, '#f0e8ff'); ctx.fillStyle = grad; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 1200, 850); // Border ctx.strokeStyle = '#5BC0F8'; ctx.lineWidth = 10; ctx.strokeRect(20, 20, 1160, 810); ctx.strokeStyle = '#a560f8'; ctx.lineWidth = 3; ctx.strokeRect(35, 35, 1130, 780); // Title ctx.fillStyle = '#3c3c3c'; ctx.font = 'bold 56px Georgia, serif'; ctx.textAlign = 'center'; ctx.fillText('Certificate of AI Literacy', 600, 140); // Subtitle ctx.font = '28px Georgia, serif'; ctx.fillStyle = '#777'; ctx.fillText('This certifies that', 600, 210); // Name ctx.font = 'bold 72px Georgia, serif'; ctx.fillStyle = '#5BC0F8'; ctx.fillText(S.user_name || 'Learner', 600, 310); // Body ctx.font = '26px Georgia, serif'; ctx.fillStyle = '#555'; ctx.fillText('has successfully completed the ClariAI AI Literacy Course', 600, 390); ctx.fillText('demonstrating understanding of artificial intelligence concepts,', 600, 430); ctx.fillText('practical AI tools, and responsible AI use.', 600, 470); // Stats ctx.font = 'bold 22px Arial, sans-serif'; ctx.fillStyle = '#3c3c3c'; ctx.fillText(`${S.xp} XP Earned • Level ${xpToLevel(S.xp)} • ${S.completed.length} Lessons Completed`, 600, 540); // Gold badge circle ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(600, 660, 80, 0, Math.PI * 2); const badgeGrad = ctx.createRadialGradient(600, 660, 10, 600, 660, 80); badgeGrad.addColorStop(0, '#ffe066'); badgeGrad.addColorStop(1, '#c99800'); ctx.fillStyle = badgeGrad; ctx.fill(); ctx.strokeStyle = '#9a7000'; ctx.lineWidth = 3; ctx.stroke(); ctx.font = 'bold 28px Arial, sans-serif'; ctx.fillStyle = '#5c4200'; ctx.fillText('ClariAI', 600, 650); ctx.fillText('Certified', 600, 685); // Date ctx.font = '18px Arial, sans-serif'; ctx.fillStyle = '#999'; ctx.fillText('Issued: ' + new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' }), 600, 800); // Download const a = document.createElement('a'); a.download = 'ClariAI-Certificate.png'; a.href = canvas.toDataURL('image/png'); a.click(); showToast("Certificate downloaded! ", 'success', 3000); } // ============================================================ // LEADERBOARD STUB // ============================================================ // ── profile-06: Unit 1 cert button & modal ──────────────────────────────── function renderUnit1CertBtn() { // Remove any existing button wrap first var _old = document.getElementById('unit1-cert-btn-wrap'); if (_old) _old.remove(); // Check if all unit 1 lessons are complete var _unit1Lessons = (window.COURSE && COURSE[0] && COURSE[0].lessons) ? COURSE[0].lessons : []; if (_unit1Lessons.length === 0) return; var _allDone = _unit1Lessons.every(function(l) { return (S.completed || []).includes(l.id); }); if (!_allDone) return; // Insert button below the stat-strip var _strip = document.getElementById('profile-stat-strip'); if (!_strip) return; var _wrap = document.createElement('div'); _wrap.className = 'unit1-cert-btn-wrap'; _wrap.id = 'unit1-cert-btn-wrap'; _wrap.innerHTML = ''; _strip.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', _wrap); } function openUnit1CertModal() { var _overlay = document.getElementById('unit1-cert-modal-overlay'); if (!_overlay) return; var _nameEl = document.getElementById('u1cert-name'); if (_nameEl) _nameEl.textContent = S.user_name || 'Learner'; var _dateEl = document.getElementById('u1cert-date'); if (_dateEl) _dateEl.textContent = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-AU', { day: 'numeric', month: 'long', year: 'numeric' }); _overlay.classList.add('open'); document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'; } function closeUnit1CertModal(evt, force) { if (!force && evt && evt.target !== document.getElementById('unit1-cert-modal-overlay')) return; var _overlay = document.getElementById('unit1-cert-modal-overlay'); if (_overlay) _overlay.classList.remove('open'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; } // ── profile-07: Accent color picker ────────────────────────────────────── var _ACCENT_COLORS = [ { id: 'blue', hex: '#5BC0F8', label: 'Blue' }, { id: 'green', hex: '#58CC02', label: 'Green' }, { id: 'purple', hex: '#a560f8', label: 'Purple' }, { id: 'orange', hex: '#f97316', label: 'Orange' }, { id: 'pink', hex: '#FF7EB3', label: 'Pink' } ]; function applyAccentColor(hex) { if (!hex) return; var r = document.documentElement; r.style.setProperty('--clari-blue', hex); r.style.setProperty('--blue', hex); r.style.setProperty('--primary', hex); } function setAccentColor(hex) { save('accent_color', hex); applyAccentColor(hex); // Update swatch selection state in-place without full re-render document.querySelectorAll('.accent-swatch').forEach(function(el) { el.classList.toggle('selected', el.getAttribute('data-hex') === hex); }); } // ── profile-08: stat number count-up animation ─────────────────────────── function animateStatNumbers(targetXp, targetStreak) { function _easeOut(t) { return 1 - Math.pow(1 - t, 3); } function _countUp(elementId, target, duration) { var el = document.getElementById(elementId); if (!el || target === 0) { if (el) el.textContent = target; return; } var start = null; var startVal = 0; function _step(ts) { if (!start) start = ts; var elapsed = ts - start; var progress = Math.min(elapsed / duration, 1); var eased = _easeOut(progress); var current = Math.round(startVal + (target - startVal) * eased); el.textContent = current; if (progress < 1) requestAnimationFrame(_step); else el.textContent = target; } requestAnimationFrame(_step); } _countUp('stat-num-xp', targetXp, 400); _countUp('stat-num-streak', targetStreak, 300); } function computeLevelTopPercent(level) { if (level >= 16) return 10; if (level >= 11) return 20; if (level >= 7) return 40; if (level >= 4) return 60; return 80; } function computeTopPercent(xp) { if (xp >= 800) return 5; if (xp >= 500) return 10; if (xp >= 300) return 20; if (xp >= 150) return 35; if (xp >= 50) return 50; return 75; } // ============================================================ // DARK MODE TOGGLE // ============================================================ function toggleDarkMode() { const isDark = !S.dark_mode; save('dark_mode', isDark); if (isDark) { document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', 'dark'); } else { document.documentElement.removeAttribute('data-theme'); } renderProfileTab(); } function toggleSound() { save('sound_enabled', !S.sound_enabled); renderProfileTab(); } // ============================================================ // INIT // ============================================================ function init() { loadState(); // profile-07: apply saved accent color on startup if (S.accent_color) applyAccentColor(S.accent_color); document.addEventListener('keydown', handleLessonKeyboard); // Global '?' shortcut — toggle keyboard shortcuts overlay from anywhere document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) { if (e.key !== '?') return; var _activeEl = document.activeElement; if (_activeEl && (_activeEl.tagName === 'INPUT' || _activeEl.tagName === 'TEXTAREA' || _activeEl.isContentEditable)) return; e.preventDefault(); toggleKbShortcuts(); }); // Apply text size if (S.text_size === 'large') document.body.classList.add('text-large'); if (S.text_size === 'xl') document.body.classList.add('text-xl'); // Apply dark mode; auto-detect system preference on first visit if (S.dark_mode !== undefined) { if (S.dark_mode) document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', 'dark'); } else { const _prefersDark = window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches; if (_prefersDark) { save('dark_mode', true); document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', 'dark'); } } // Offline detection banner (function() { const _offlineBanner = document.getElementById('offline-banner'); function _updateOnlineStatus() { if (_offlineBanner) _offlineBanner.classList.toggle('visible', !navigator.onLine); } _updateOnlineStatus(); window.addEventListener('online', _updateOnlineStatus); window.addEventListener('offline', _updateOnlineStatus); })(); // Check Stripe payment success const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search); if (urlParams.get('payment') === 'success') { save('premium', true); save('premium_pending', false); history.replaceState(null, '', window.location.pathname); setTimeout(() => showToast("Welcome to Clari Plus! All lessons unlocked. ", 'success', 4000), 500); } // Daily welcome toast — fires once per day when user has a streak const _todayInit = todayStr(); if (S.onboarded && S.streak > 0 && S.last_welcome_date !== _todayInit) { save('last_welcome_date', _todayInit); const _hr = new Date().getHours(); const _timeWord = _hr < 12 ? 'morning' : _hr < 17 ? 'afternoon' : 'evening'; const _heartsMsg = S.hearts === 5 ? ' Your hearts are fully refilled. ' : ' '; setTimeout(() => showToast('Good ' + _timeWord + '!' + _heartsMsg + S.streak + "-day streak ", 'success', 3500), 800); } if (S.onboarded) { // Show main app showMainUI(); document.querySelectorAll('.view').forEach(v => v.classList.remove('active')); document.getElementById('view-learn').classList.add('active'); document.getElementById('nav-learn').classList.add('active'); checkWeekReset(); renderLearnTab(); updateNavBadges(); // Returning-user greeting (subtle, in the sub-text) const rMsg = RETURNING_MSGS[Math.floor(Math.random() * RETURNING_MSGS.length)]; const sub = document.getElementById('learn-sub'); if (sub && S.completed && S.completed.length > 0) sub.textContent = rMsg; } else { // Show onboarding hideMainUI(); // Pre-fill mascots document.getElementById('ob-welcome-mascot').innerHTML = clariSVG('waving', 100); obShowScreen('ob-welcome'); } // Idle encouragement: if on dashboard with no interaction for 45s, Clari waves (function setupIdleClari() { let _idleTimer = null; const _idleMessages = [ 'Pick up where you left off!', 'Ready when you are!', 'A quick lesson takes 2 min!', 'You\'ve got this!' ]; function _resetIdleTimer() { // Only show idle popup when not in a lesson if (document.getElementById('view-lesson') && document.getElementById('view-lesson').classList.contains('active')) return; clearTimeout(_idleTimer); _idleTimer = setTimeout(function() { const _msg = _idleMessages[Math.floor(Math.random() * _idleMessages.length)]; showClariPopup('waving', 'clari-waving', _msg, 3000); }, 45000); } document.addEventListener('click', _resetIdleTimer, { passive: true }); document.addEventListener('touchstart', _resetIdleTimer, { passive: true }); document.addEventListener('keydown', _resetIdleTimer, { passive: true }); _resetIdleTimer(); })(); } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);
